TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种融合2D和3D MRI图像分割的胶质瘤分类方法，使用UNET进行分割，加权平均融合多模态图像，再用ResNet50进行分类，在BraTS数据集上取得了99.25%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 胶质瘤作为最常见的原发性脑肿瘤，具有不同的侵袭性和预后。精确的胶质瘤分类对于治疗规划和预后预测至关重要。本研究旨在开发一种融合T1、T2、T1ce和FLAIR序列MRI图像的算法，以提高胶质瘤亚类（无肿瘤、坏死核心、瘤周水肿、增强肿瘤）分类的效果。

Method: 1. 使用BraTS数据集的MRI图像，进行最大-最小归一化预处理；2. 分别使用UNET架构对2D和3D图像进行坏死核心、瘤周水肿和增强肿瘤的分割；3. 使用加权平均技术融合多模态MRI图像的分割区域；4. 将融合图像输入预训练的ResNet50模型进行胶质瘤亚类分类；5. 使用80%数据训练，20%验证。

Result: 提出的方法取得了分类准确率99.25%、精确率99.30%、召回率99.10%、F1分数99.19%、交并比84.49%、特异性99.76%，性能显著优于现有技术。

Conclusion: 这些发现强调了胶质瘤分割和分类在辅助准确诊断中的重要性。融合2D和3D分割输出通过捕捉切片中的详细特征（如肿瘤形状、边界和强度分布），同时提供脑体积内空间范围、形状、纹理和定位的全面视图，从而提高了分类准确性。

Abstract: Glioma, the prevalent primary brain tumor, exhibits diverse aggressiveness levels and prognoses. Precise classification of glioma is paramount for treatment planning and predicting prognosis. This study aims to develop an algorithm to fuse the MRI images from T1, T2, T1ce, and fluid-attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) sequences to enhance the efficacy of glioma subclass classification as no tumor, necrotic core, peritumoral edema, and enhancing tumor. The MRI images from BraTS datasets were used in this work. The images were pre-processed using max-min normalization to ensure consistency in pixel intensity values across different images. The segmentation of the necrotic core, peritumoral edema, and enhancing tumor was performed on 2D and 3D images separately using UNET architecture. Further, the segmented regions from multimodal MRI images were fused using the weighted averaging technique. Integrating 2D and 3D segmented outputs enhances classification accuracy by capturing detailed features like tumor shape, boundaries, and intensity distribution in slices, while also providing a comprehensive view of spatial extent, shape, texture, and localization within the brain volume. The fused images were used as input to the pre-trained ResNet50 model for glioma subclass classification. The network is trained on 80% and validated on 20% of the data. The proposed method achieved a classification of accuracy of 99.25%, precision of 99.30%, recall of 99.10, F1 score of 99.19%, Intersection Over Union of 84.49%, and specificity of 99.76, which showed a significantly higher performance than existing techniques. These findings emphasize the significance of glioma segmentation and classification in aiding accurate diagnosis.

</details>


### [556] [From State Changes to Creative Decisions: Documenting and Interpreting Traces Across Creative Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07184)
*Xiaohan Peng,Sotiris Piliouras,Carl Abou Saada Nujaim*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了三种互补方法来改进创意活动追踪：基于节点的界面用于状态化GenAI工件管理，可视化提示词汇作为可视化创作中的高级创意动作，以及将语义历史嵌入交互状态的编程模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在记录创意活动时存在局限性：它们记录状态变化但不保留定义高级创意动作的意图或关系。这种解耦在不同领域表现不同：GenAI工具失去非线性探索结构，可视化创作模糊表征意图，编程环境扁平化交互边界。

Method: 提出三种互补方法：1) 基于节点的界面用于状态化GenAI工件管理；2) 可视化提示词汇作为可视化创作中的高级创意动作；3) 将语义历史直接嵌入交互状态的编程模型。

Result: 这些方法能够更好地捕捉创意活动的适当粒度，并以反映创意实践结构的方式解释活动，解决了现有方法在记录意图和关系方面的不足。

Conclusion: 通过这三种互补方法，可以改进创意活动追踪，更好地保留创意过程中的意图、关系和高级结构，解决跨领域创意工具中存在的解耦问题。

Abstract: Analyzing creative activity traces requires capturing activity at appropriate granularity and interpreting it in ways that reflect the structure of creative practice. However, existing approaches record state changes without preserving the intent or relationships that define higher-level creative moves. This decoupling manifests differently across domains: GenAI tools lose non-linear exploration structure, visualization authoring obscures representational intent, and programmatic environments flatten interaction boundaries. We present three complementary approaches: a node-based interface for stateful GenAI artifact management, a vocabulary of visual cues as higher-level creative moves in visualization authoring, and a programming model that embeds semantic histories directly into interaction state.

</details>


### [557] [Learning embeddings of non-linear PDEs: the Burgers' equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07812)
*Pedro Tarancón-Álvarez,Leonid Sarieddine,Pavlos Protopapas,Raul Jimenez*

Main category: math.AP

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种为物理信息神经网络(PINNs)构建解嵌入空间的方法，通过多头部设置和主成分分析(PCA)从非线性偏微分方程的解空间中提取非退化信息，并在粘性Burgers方程上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 嵌入提供低维表示来组织复杂的函数空间并支持泛化。作者希望将这一概念推广到物理信息神经网络(PINNs)，构建非线性偏微分方程的解嵌入空间，以支持高效的检索、比较和泛化。

Method: 采用多头部设置：共享网络体学习解空间的潜在嵌入，线性头部将嵌入映射到各个具体实现。通过强制头部正交性约束，获得对训练退化鲁棒且具有直接物理解释的潜在空间主成分分解。使用主成分分析(PCA)提取非退化信息。

Result: 在粘性Burgers方程上测试该方法，同时求解一族初始条件和粘度值。获得的组件表现出快速饱和，表明少量潜在模式就能捕捉动力学的主要特征。

Conclusion: 该方法成功构建了PINNs的解嵌入空间，通过正交约束获得具有物理解释的潜在空间分解，少量模式即可捕捉主要动力学特征，为偏微分方程解空间的组织和泛化提供了新方法。

Abstract: Embeddings provide low-dimensional representations that organize complex function spaces and support generalization. They provide a geometric representation that supports efficient retrieval, comparison, and generalization. In this work we generalize the concept to Physics Informed Neural Networks. We present a method to construct solution embedding spaces of nonlinear partial differential equations using a multi-head setup, and extract non-degenerate information from them using principal component analysis (PCA). We test this method by applying it to viscous Burgers' equation, which is solved simultaneously for a family of initial conditions and values of the viscosity. A shared network body learns a latent embedding of the solution space, while linear heads map this embedding to individual realizations. By enforcing orthogonality constraints on the heads, we obtain a principal-component decomposition of the latent space that is robust to training degeneracies and admits a direct physical interpretation. The obtained components for Burgers' equation exhibit rapid saturation, indicating that a small number of latent modes captures the dominant features of the dynamics.

</details>


### [558] [Long-Short Term Agents for Pure-Vision Bronchoscopy Robotic Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07909)
*Junyang Wu,Mingyi Luo,Fangfang Xie,Minghui Zhang,Hanxiao Zhang,Chunxi Zhang,Junhao Wang,Jiayuan Sun,Yun Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种仅基于视觉的自主支气管镜导航框架，使用术前CT虚拟目标和实时内窥镜视频，无需外部跟踪，通过分层长短智能体实现长视野导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人辅助腔内介入手术中，由于内窥镜视野有限和动态伪影，准确的术中导航仍然困难。现有导航平台依赖电磁跟踪或形状感知等外部定位技术，增加了硬件复杂性且易受术中解剖不匹配影响。

Method: 采用仅视觉自主框架，使用分层长短智能体：短期反应智能体用于连续低延迟运动控制，长期战略智能体在解剖模糊点提供决策支持。当建议冲突时，世界模型批评器预测候选动作的未来视觉状态，选择其预测状态最匹配目标视图的动作。

Result: 在高保真气道模型、三个离体猪肺和活体猪模型中评估。系统在模型中到达所有计划节段目标，离体到第八代成功率80%，活体导航性能与专家支气管镜医师相当。

Conclusion: 结果支持无传感器自主支气管镜导航的临床前可行性，为机器人辅助腔内介入提供了简化且可靠的导航方案。

Abstract: Accurate intraoperative navigation is essential for robot-assisted endoluminal intervention, but remains difficult because of limited endoscopic field of view and dynamic artifacts. Existing navigation platforms often rely on external localization technologies, such as electromagnetic tracking or shape sensing, which increase hardware complexity and remain vulnerable to intraoperative anatomical mismatch. We present a vision-only autonomy framework that performs long-horizon bronchoscopic navigation using preoperative CT-derived virtual targets and live endoscopic video, without external tracking during navigation. The framework uses hierarchical long-short agents: a short-term reactive agent for continuous low-latency motion control, and a long-term strategic agent for decision support at anatomically ambiguous points. When their recommendations conflict, a world-model critic predicts future visual states for candidate actions and selects the action whose predicted state best matches the target view. We evaluated the system in a high-fidelity airway phantom, three ex vivo porcine lungs, and a live porcine model. The system reached all planned segmental targets in the phantom, maintained 80\% success to the eighth generation ex vivo, and achieved in vivo navigation performance comparable to the expert bronchoscopist. These results support the preclinical feasibility of sensor-free autonomous bronchoscopic navigation.

</details>


### [559] [Aero-Promptness: Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability for Propeller-driven Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07998)
*Antonio Franchi*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability (DAAM)几何框架，用于冗余多旋翼飞行器的控制分配，通过黎曼度量考虑电机扭矩限制和气动阻力，优化操纵性体积来避免饱和和推力损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多旋翼控制分配方法通常忽略气动阻力和电机扭矩限制，导致实际飞行中可能出现饱和和推力损失问题。需要一种能显式考虑这些物理约束的几何框架。

Method: 在螺旋桨转速空间引入基于剩余对称加速度容量的黎曼度量，通过非线性推力定律映射到广义力空间得到状态相关的操纵性体积，优化其对数行列式作为障碍函数。

Result: 证明了最优分配在局部形成光滑嵌入流形，几何刻画了由物理执行器限制和转速符号转换引起的全局跳跃不连续性。

Conclusion: DAAM框架为冗余多旋翼提供了对广义力空间任意坐标缩放不变的控制分配策略，能有效避免阻力引起的饱和和低转速推力损失。

Abstract: This work introduces the Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability (DAAM), a geometric framework for control allocation in redundant multirotors. By equipping the propeller spin-rate space with a Riemannian metric based on the remaining symmetric acceleration capacity of each motor, the formulation explicitly accounts for motor torque limits and aerodynamic drag. Mapping this metric through the nonlinear thrust law to the generalized force space yields a state-dependent manipulability volume. The log-determinant of this volume acts as a natural barrier function, strictly penalizing drag-induced saturation and low-spin thrust loss. Optimizing this volume along the allocation fibers provides a redundancy resolution strategy inherently invariant to arbitrary coordinate scaling in the generalized-force space. Analytically, we prove that the resulting optimal allocations locally form smooth embedded manifolds, and we geometrically characterize the global jump discontinuities that inevitably arise from physical actuator limits and spin-rate sign transitions.

</details>


### [560] [An explainable hybrid deep learning-enabled intelligent fault detection and diagnosis approach for automotive software systems validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08165)
*Mohammad Abboush,Ehab Ghannoum,Andreas Rausch*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于汽车软件系统故障检测、识别和定位的可解释AI方法，结合1D-CNN-GRU混合模型和多种XAI技术来提高模型透明度和适应性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汽车软件系统中基于数据驱动的故障检测与诊断模型通常是黑盒模型，缺乏可解释性，这阻碍了对预测原因的理解，限制了模型基于预测结果的适应性调整，增加了开发复杂模型的成本，并降低了在实时安全关键应用中的可信度

Method: 开发了基于1D-CNN-GRU的混合智能模型来分析汽车软件系统的实时验证记录，并采用多种可解释AI技术（IGs、DeepLIFT、Gradient SHAP、DeepLIFT SHAP）来实现模型适应性和促进根本原因分析

Result: 该方法应用于在硬件在环系统上进行虚拟测试驾驶时收集的实时数据集，能够提供对预测结果背后逻辑的清晰理解，支持模型适应和根本原因分析

Conclusion: 提出的可解释故障检测方法解决了黑盒模型在汽车软件系统中的局限性，通过结合深度学习模型和XAI技术，提高了模型的透明度、适应性和在安全关键应用中的可信度

Abstract: Advancements in data-driven machine learning have emerged as a pivotal element in supporting automotive software systems (ASSs) engineering across various levels of the V-development process. Duringsystemverificationandvalidation,theintegrationofanintelligent fault detection anddiagnosis (FDD) model with test recordings analysis process serves as a powerful tool for efficiency ensuring functional safety. However, the lack of interpretability of the black-box FDD models developed not only hinders understanding of the cause underlying the prediction, but also prevents the model from being adapted based on the prediction result. This, in turn, increases the computational cost required for developingacomplexFDDmodelandlimitsconfidenceinreal-timesafety-criticalapplications.To address this challenge, a novel explainable method for fault detection, identification, and localization is proposed in this article with the aim of providing a clear understanding of the logic behind the prediction outcome. To this end, a hybrid 1dCNN-GRU-based intelligent model was developed to analyze the recordings from the real-time validation process of ASSs. The employment of explainable AI techniques, i.e., IGs, DeepLIFT, Gradient SHAP, and DeepLIFT SHAP, was instrumental in enabling model adaptation and facilitating the root cause analysis (RCA). The proposed approach is applied to the real time dataset collected during a virtual test drive performed by the user on hardware in the loop system.

</details>


### [561] [A Blockchain-based Traceability System for AI-Driven Engine Blade Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08288)
*Mahmoud Hafez,Eman Ouda,Mohammed A. Mohammed Eltoum,Khaled Salah,Yusra Abdulrahman*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: BladeChain：基于区块链的飞机发动机叶片维护追踪系统，集成多方认证、自动检查调度和AI模型溯源，提供不可篡改的维护记录


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前飞机发动机叶片维护系统存在碎片化、难以审计、易被篡改的问题，需要一种能够提供不可篡改追踪性的解决方案，确保整个生命周期中的检查记录可信

Method: 基于Hyperledger Fabric构建四利益相关方网络（制造商、航空公司、维修组织、监管机构），使用链码强制执行状态机管理叶片状态转换，检查数据存储在IPFS中并通过SHA-256哈希链接到链上记录，检测模块可插拔

Result: 原型系统在100个叶片工作负载下实现100%生命周期完成率，吞吐量稳定在每分钟26次操作，篡改检测可在17毫秒内通过哈希验证完成

Conclusion: BladeChain为航空航天维护提供了可审计的追踪性，通过区块链技术解决了多方协作中的信任问题，同时保持了系统的灵活性和可扩展性

Abstract: Aircraft engine blade maintenance relies on inspection records shared across manufacturers, airlines, maintenance organizations, and regulators. Yet current systems are fragmented, difficult to audit, and vulnerable to tampering. This paper presents BladeChain, a blockchain-based system providing immutable traceability for blade inspections throughout the component life cycle. BladeChain is the first system to integrate multi-stakeholder endorsement, automated inspection scheduling, AI model provenance, and cryptographic evidence binding, delivering auditable maintenance traceability for aerospace deployments. Built on a four-stakeholder Hyperledger Fabric network (OEM, Airline, MRO, Regulator), BladeChain captures every life-cycle event in a tamper-evident ledger. A chaincode-enforced state machine governs blade status transitions and automatically triggers inspections when configurable flight hour, cycle, or calendar thresholds are exceeded, eliminating manual scheduling errors. Inspection artifacts are stored off-chain in IPFS and linked to on-chain records via SHA-256 hashes, with each inspection record capturing the AI model name and version used for defect detection. This enables regulators to audit both what defects were found and how they were found. The detection module is pluggable, allowing organizations to adopt or upgrade inspection models without modifying the ledger or workflows. We built a prototype and evaluated it on workloads of up to 100 blades, demonstrating 100% life cycle completion with consistent throughput of 26 operations per minute. A centralized SQL baseline quantifies the consensus overhead and highlights the security trade-off. Security validation confirms tamper detection within 17~ms through hash verification.

</details>


### [562] [Detecting Fake Reviewer Groups in Dynamic Networks: An Adaptive Graph Learning Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08332)
*Jing Zhang,Ke Huang,Yao Zhang,Bin Guo,Zhiwen Yu*

Main category: cs.SI

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出DS-DGA-GCN模型用于检测虚假评论群体，通过建模产品-评论-评论者网络，结合网络特征评分系统和动态图注意力机制，在冷启动场景下实现鲁棒检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线平台上虚假评论泛滥，尤其是有组织的虚假评论群体采用复杂策略逃避传统检测方法，在冷启动场景（新产品数据稀疏）中问题尤为突出，需要新的检测方法。

Method: 提出DS-DGA-GCN模型：1）建模产品-评论-评论者网络；2）网络特征评分系统量化邻居多样性和网络自相似性；3）动态图注意力机制捕获时序信息、节点重要性和全局网络结构特征。

Result: 在Amazon和Xiaohongshu两个真实数据集上实验，DS-DGA-GCN显著优于现有基线方法，准确率分别达到89.8%和88.3%。

Conclusion: DS-DGA-GCN通过建模多关系网络和动态注意力机制，在虚假评论群体检测中表现出色，特别适用于冷启动场景。

Abstract: The proliferation of fake reviews, often produced by organized groups, undermines consumer trust and fair competition on online platforms. These groups employ sophisticated strategies that evade traditional detection methods, particularly in cold-start scenarios involving newly launched products with sparse data. To address this, we propose the \underline{D}iversity- and \underline{S}imilarity-aware \underline{D}ynamic \underline{G}raph \underline{A}ttention-enhanced \underline{G}raph \underline{C}onvolutional \underline{N}etwork (DS-DGA-GCN), a new graph learning model for detecting fake reviewer groups. DS-DGA-GCN achieves robust detection since it focuses on the joint relationships among products, reviews, and reviewers by modeling product-review-reviewer networks. DS-DGA-GCN also achieves adaptive detection by integrating a Network Feature Scoring (NFS) system and a new dynamic graph attention mechanism. The NFS system quantifies network attributes, including neighbor diversity, network self-similarity, as a unified feature score. The dynamic graph attention mechanism improves the adaptability and computational efficiency by captures features related to temporal information, node importance, and global network structure. Extensive experiments conducted on two real-world datasets derived from Amazon and Xiaohongshu demonstrate that DS-DGA-GCN significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving accuracies of up to \textbf{89.8\% and 88.3\%}, respectively.

</details>


### [563] [Enhancing the Detection of Coronary Artery Disease Using Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06888)
*Karan Kumar Singh,Nikita Gajbhiye,Gouri Sankar Mishra*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该研究应用机器学习算法（Bi-LSTM、GRU及其混合模型）分析患者临床数据、影像和生物标志物，以改进冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的早期检测，混合模型达到97.07%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冠状动脉疾病是全球发病率和死亡率的主要原因，早期检测对改善患者预后和降低医疗成本至关重要。传统诊断方法存在局限性，机器学习在医疗诊断中显示出巨大潜力，本研究旨在探索ML算法在CAD检测中的应用价值。

Method: 使用双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）、门控循环单元（GRU）以及Bi-LSTM+GRU混合模型，在大规模患者数据集上进行训练。数据集包含临床特征、影像数据和生物标志物信息。采用先进的数据预处理技术和特征选择方法确保模型性能优化。

Result: 机器学习模型在敏感性和特异性方面均优于传统诊断方法。混合模型（Bi-LSTM+GRU）表现最佳，达到97.07%的准确率，为CAD检测提供了可靠的辅助工具。

Conclusion: 机器学习在CAD检测中具有显著优势，混合模型表现出色。该研究为ML在心血管疾病管理中的应用设立了基准，展示了ML在个性化医疗中的潜力，有望在未来心血管疾病管理中发挥关键作用。

Abstract: Coronary Artery Disease (CAD) remains a leading cause of morbidity and mortality worldwide. Early detection is critical to recover patient outcomes and decrease healthcare costs. In recent years, machine learning (ML) advancements have shown significant potential in enhancing the accuracy of CAD diagnosis. This study investigates the application of ML algorithms to improve the detection of CAD by analyzing patient data, including clinical features, imaging, and biomarker profiles. Bi-directional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM), Gated Recurrent Units (GRU), and a hybrid of Bi-LSTM+GRU were trained on large datasets to predict the presence of CAD. Results demonstrated that these ML models outperformed traditional diagnostic methods in sensitivity and specificity, offering a robust tool for clinicians to make more informed decisions. The experimental results show that the hybrid model achieved an accuracy of 97.07%. By integrating advanced data preprocessing techniques and feature selection, this study ensures optimal learning and model performance, setting a benchmark for the application of ML in CAD diagnosis. The integration of ML into CAD detection presents a promising avenue for personalized healthcare and could play a pivotal role in the future of cardiovascular disease management.

</details>


### [564] [Machine Learning for Stress Testing: Uncertainty Decomposition in Causal Panel Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07438)
*Yu Wang,Xiangchen Liu,Siguang Li*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一个用于政策路径反事实推断的面板数据框架，将数据可学习内容与混杂假设需求透明分离，包含四个组件：观测识别、因果集识别、误差分析和校准带，最终输出三层不确定性分解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 监管压力测试需要预测假设宏观经济情景下的信用损失，这本质上是因果问题但通常被当作预测问题处理。现有方法缺乏对混杂因素的透明处理，无法清晰分离数据可学习内容与假设需求。

Method: 1) 通过迭代回归进行路径条件均值的观测识别；2) 在有界混杂下的因果集识别，提供可解释的崩溃值；3) 递归展开误差的oracle不等式分析；4) 重要性加权共形校准带，包含外推成本量化和覆盖保证退化时的弃权机制。

Result: 框架能够透明分离估计不确定性和混杂不确定性，提供三层不确定性分解。通过模拟和半合成实验验证，包括COVID回顾性分析，展示了在极端情景下的诊断价值。

Conclusion: 该框架为监管压力测试中的政策路径反事实推断提供了系统方法，通过透明分离数据可学习内容与假设需求，提高了因果推断的鲁棒性和可解释性。

Abstract: Regulatory stress testing requires projecting credit losses under hypothetical macroeconomic scenarios -- a fundamentally causal question typically treated as a prediction problem. We propose a framework for policy-path counterfactual inference in panels that transparently separates what can be learned from data from what requires assumptions about confounding. Our approach has four components: (i) observational identification of path-conditional means via iterated regression, enabling continuous macro-path contrasts without requiring a control group; (ii) causal set identification under bounded confounding, yielding sharp identified sets with interpretable breakdown values that communicate robustness in a single number; (iii) an oracle inequality showing that recursive rollout error is governed by a horizon-dependent amplification factor, providing a concrete answer to how far ahead one can reliably predict under stress; and (iv) importance-weighted conformal calibration bands with diagnostics that quantify extrapolation cost and trigger abstention when coverage guarantees degrade. The final output is a three-layer uncertainty decomposition that cleanly separates estimation uncertainty from confounding uncertainty. We validate all results through simulation and semi-synthetic experiments with real unemployment data, including a Covid retrospective demonstrating the framework's diagnostic value under extreme scenarios.

</details>


### [565] [Deep Learning-Based Approach for Automatic 2D and 3D MRI Segmentation of Gliomas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.19760)
*Kiranmayee Janardhan,Christy Bobby T*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合2D和3D卷积优点的脑胶质瘤分割方法，基于UNET、Inception和ResNet架构，在BraTS数据集上实现了高精度分割（2D: 99.77%准确率，3D: 98.91%准确率）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑肿瘤诊断对临床医生具有挑战性，胶质瘤是中枢神经系统肿瘤的主要死因。手动分割耗时、易错且劳动密集，需要全自动分割方法。现有2D卷积无法充分利用体积医学影像的空间信息，而3D卷积计算成本高、内存需求大，需要平衡计算效率和空间精度。

Method: 基于UNET架构，结合Inception和ResNet模型，开发了2D和3D卷积混合方法。在BraTS 2018、2019和2020数据集上进行实验，旨在平衡2D卷积的计算效率和3D卷积的空间准确性。

Result: ResNet模型表现最佳：3D分割准确率98.91%，2D分割准确率99.77%。Dice分数分别为0.8312（2D）和0.9888（3D）。提出的方法在胶质瘤分割方面显示出优越潜力。

Conclusion: 该方法通过平衡2D和3D卷积的优势，实现了高效的脑胶质瘤分割，可应用于其他医学影像分析任务，辅助临床医生改善脑肿瘤诊断过程。

Abstract: Brain tumor diagnosis is a challenging task for clinicians in the modern world. Among the major reasons for cancer-related death is the brain tumor. Gliomas, a category of central nervous system (CNS) tumors, encompass diverse subregions. For accurate diagnosis of brain tumors, precise segmentation of brain images and quantitative analysis are required. A fully automatic approach to glioma segmentation is required because the manual segmentation process is laborious, prone to mistakes, as well as time-consuming. Modern techniques for segmenting gliomas are based on fully convolutional neural networks (FCNs), which can either use two-dimensional (2D) or three-dimensional (3D) convolutions. Nevertheless, 3D convolutions suffer from computational costs and memory demand, while 2D convolutions cannot fully utilize the spatial insights of volumetric clinical imaging data. To obtain an optimal solution, it is vital to balance the computational efficiency of 2D convolutions along with the spatial accuracy of 3D convolutions. This balance can potentially be realized by developing an advanced model to overcome these challenges. The 2D and 3D models implemented here are based on UNET architecture, Inception, and ResNet models. The research work has been implemented on the BraTS 2018, 2019, and 2020 datasets. The best performer of all the models' evaluations metrics for proposed methodologies offer superior potential in terms of the effective segmentation of gliomas. The ResNet model has resulted in 98.91% accuracy for 3D segmentation and 99.77 for 2D segmentations. The dice scores for 2D and 3D segmentations are 0.8312 and 0.9888, respectively. This model can be applied to various other medical applications with fine-tuning, thereby aiding clinicians in brain tumor analysis and improving the diagnosis process effectively.

</details>


### [566] [Distributionally Robust Geometric Joint Chance-Constrained Optimization: Neurodynamic Approaches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06597)
*Ange Valli,Siham Tassouli,Abdel Lisser*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种双时间尺度神经动力学对偶方法，用于解决分布鲁棒的几何联合机会约束优化问题，该方法使用神经网络求解多个问题实例，无需依赖传统求解器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的优化问题常常面临概率分布不确定的情况，传统的优化方法在处理分布不确定性时存在局限性。本文旨在开发一种能够处理分布不确定性的鲁棒优化方法，特别是针对联合机会约束问题，其中行向量的概率分布未知但属于某个不确定性集合。

Method: 提出了一种双时间尺度神经动力学对偶方法，基于三个投影方程设计神经动力学对偶。该方法处理三种不同的分布不确定性集合，使用神经网络求解多个问题实例，无需依赖标准的最先进求解方法。

Result: 理论分析表明该方法以概率收敛到全局最优解。在数值实验中，将该方法应用于形状优化问题和电信问题，验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: 神经网络可以用于解决分布鲁棒联合机会约束优化问题，提出的神经动力学方法能够有效处理分布不确定性，并在概率意义上收敛到全局最优解。

Abstract: This paper proposes a two-time scale neurodynamic duplex approach to solve distributionally robust geometric joint chance-constrained optimization problems. The probability distributions of the row vectors are not known in advance and belong to a certain distributional uncertainty set. In our paper, we study three uncertainty sets for the unknown distributions. The neurodynamic duplex is designed based on three projection equations. The main contribution of our work is to propose a neural network-based method to solve distributionally robust joint chance-constrained optimization problems that converges in probability to the global optimum without the use of standard state-of-the-art solving methods. We show that neural networks can be used to solve multiple instances of a problem. In the numerical experiments, we apply the proposed approach to solve a problem of shape optimisation and a telecommunication problem.

</details>


### [567] [Dynamic Targeting of Satellite Observations Using Supplemental Geostationary Satellite Data and Hierarchical Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06719)
*Akseli Kangaslahti,Itai Zilberstein,Alberto Candela,Steve Chien*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种利用地球静止卫星数据改进动态目标卫星观测任务的分层规划方法，相比传统方法性能提升可达41%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态目标（DT）任务概念通过前瞻传感器获取环境信息来智能规划观测，但面临机载前瞻数据空间范围有限、仪器移动性、数据吞吐量和机载计算约束等挑战。地球静止卫星可提供长达35分钟的前瞻信息，但搜索空间随视野增大呈指数级增长。

Method: 引入分层规划方法：首先利用地球静止卫星数据在多项式时间内规划长期观测蓝图，然后利用机载前瞻数据在短期视野内细化该计划。

Result: 在四个不同问题实例（三个云规避变体和风暴追踪场景）中，分层规划器比传统DT规划器性能提升高达41%。地球静止卫星数据在目标稀疏分布且动态变化的问题实例中最为有效。

Conclusion: 地球静止卫星数据可显著提升动态目标系统的性能，特别是在目标稀疏分布且动态变化的环境中。分层规划方法有效解决了大规模前瞻数据带来的计算复杂度问题。

Abstract: The Dynamic Targeting (DT) mission concept is an approach to satellite observation in which a lookahead sensor gathers information about the upcoming environment and uses this information to intelligently plan observations. Previous work has shown that DT has the potential to increase the science return across applications. However, DT mission concepts must address challenges, such as the limited spatial extent of onboard lookahead data and instrument mobility, data throughput, and onboard computation constraints. In this work, we show how the performance of DT systems can be improved by using supplementary data streamed from geostationary satellites that provide lookahead information up to 35 minutes ahead of time rather than the 1 minute latency from an onboard lookahead sensor. While there is a greater volume of geostationary data, the search space for observation planning explodes exponentially with the size of the horizon. To address this, we introduce a hierarchical planning approach in which the geostationary data is used to plan a long-term observation blueprint in polynomial time, then the onboard lookahead data is leveraged to refine that plan over short-term horizons. We compare the performance of our approach to that of traditional DT planners relying on onboard lookahead data across four different problem instances: three cloud avoidance variations and a storm hunting scenario. We show that our hierarchical planner outperforms the traditional DT planners by up to 41% and examine the features of the scenarios that affect the performance of our approach. We demonstrate that incorporating geostationary satellite data is most effective for dynamic problem instances in which the targets of interest are sparsely distributed throughout the overflight.

</details>


### [568] [Gradient-based Nested Co-Design of Aerodynamic Shape and Control for Winged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06760)
*Daniele Affinita,Mingda Xu,Benoît Valentin Gherardi,Pascal Fua*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于梯度的嵌套协同设计框架，用于联合优化飞行器气动外形和运动规划器，在固定翼滑翔机的栖息和短距着陆任务中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法先设计气动外形再设计运动规划器，但由于两者之间的非线性相互作用，这种顺序过程可能不是最优的。现有协同设计方法因计算可行性需要简化假设，限制了其适用性。

Method: 提出通用梯度基嵌套协同设计框架：运动规划器解决最优控制问题，动力学模型中的气动力由神经代理模型确定，能够建模复杂亚音速流动条件。

Result: 在固定翼滑翔机的栖息和短距着陆两个复杂动态任务中验证了方法有效性，优化设计相比进化基线在计算时间大幅减少的情况下提高了任务性能。

Conclusion: 该框架克服了现有协同设计方法的局限性，能够处理复杂气动条件，为飞行机器人设计提供了更有效的联合优化方法。

Abstract: Designing aerial robots for specialized tasks, from perching to payload delivery, requires tailoring their aerodynamic shape to specific mission requirements. For tasks involving wide flight envelopes, the usual sequential process of first determining the shape and then the motion planner is likely to be suboptimal due to the inherent nonlinear interactions between them. This limitation has been motivating co-design research, which involves jointly optimizing the aerodynamic shape and the motion planner. In this paper, we present a general-purpose, gradient-based, nested co-design framework where the motion planner solves an optimal control problem and the aerodynamic forces used in the dynamics model are determined by a neural surrogate model. This enables us to model complex subsonic flow conditions encountered in aerial robotics and to overcome the limited applicability of existing co-design methods. These limitations stem from the simplifying assumptions they require for computational tractability to either the planner or the aerodynamics. We validate our method on two complex dynamic tasks for fixed-wing gliders: perching and a short landing. Our optimized designs improve task performance compared to an evolutionary baseline in a fraction of the computation time.

</details>


### [569] [AI-Assisted Curation of Conference Scholarship: Compiling, Structuring, and Analyzing Two Decades of Presentations at the Society for Social Work and Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06814)
*Brian Perron,Bryan Victor,Zia Qi*

Main category: cs.DL

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该研究构建了SSWR年会20年（2005-2026）的摘要数据库，分析了研究方法、作者合作、机构参与等模式，发现会议规模显著增长，定量方法占主导，国际合作增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建社会科学研究会议的系统数据库，以分析研究方法的演变趋势、作者合作模式、机构参与和国际参与度变化，为学科发展和会议规划提供数据支持。

Method: 通过网页爬虫收集SSWR Confex系统2005-2026年的摘要元数据，使用小型语言模型（gpt-oss:20b）进行分类和提取任务（方法分类、作者机构解析），每个主要阶段都有人工审核确保准确性。

Result: 数据库包含23,793个报告，69,924条作者记录，来自4,049个机构的20,779名研究者。会议规模年增长7.5%，定量方法占61.1%，作者平均人数从2.22增至3.31，国际参与从4.5%增至13.5%。

Conclusion: SSWR会议参与度显著增长，合作和国际参与度提高，定量方法仍占主导但定性方法增长。该数据库为研究优先事项和学科发展的系统分析提供了基础设施。

Abstract: Purpose: This study developed a comprehensive database of presentation abstracts from the Society for Social Work and Research (SSWR) Annual Conference and examined patterns in research methodology, authorship, collaboration, and institutional participation over two decades.
  Method: Abstract metadata was compiled from the SSWR Confex conference management system for presentations from 2005 to 2026 using web scraping. A small language model (gpt-oss:20b) performed classification and extraction tasks on abstracts, including categorization of methodologies and parsing of author affiliations, with human review at each major stage to ensure accuracy.
  Results: The database contains 23,793 presentations with 69,924 author records representing 20,779 unique researchers from 4,049 institutions across 93 countries. Annual conference presentations increased from 423 in 2005 to 1,935 in 2026, representing a compound annual growth rate of 7.5%. Quantitative methods predominated (61.1%), followed by qualitative approaches (23.4%), mixed methods (9.1%), and reviews (5.4%). The mean number of authors per presentation increased from 2.22 in 2005 to 3.31 in 2026. International participation grew from 4.5% to 13.5% of author affiliations over the observation period.
  Discussion: Findings indicate substantial growth in SSWR conference participation, alongside increased collaboration and international engagement. The methodological distribution reveals continued quantitative predominance with growing qualitative representation. This database provides research infrastructure for systematic hypothesis testing about research priorities and disciplinary development over time, enabling analyses that inform both scholarship and conference planning.

</details>


### [570] [SMAT: Staged Multi-Agent Training for Co-Adaptive Exoskeleton Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07618)
*Yifei Yuan,Ghaith Androwis,Xianlian Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出SMAT四阶段课程学习框架，模拟人类适应外骨骼的自然过程，通过分阶段训练实现稳定辅助，在物理实验中无需特定用户重训练即可提供一致辅助。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 外骨骼辅助需要人机协同适应：设备改变关节动力学，用户重组神经肌肉协调，形成非平稳学习问题。现有学习方法未明确考虑人类运动适应的序列性，导致训练不稳定和辅助时机不佳。

Method: 提出SMAT四阶段课程学习：1)人类学习无辅助步态；2)适应设备质量；3)外骨骼学习正向辅助模式；4)双方共同适应。在MyoAssist仿真环境中使用26肌肉下肢模型和髋部外骨骼实现。

Result: 仿真显示髋部肌肉激活平均降低10.1%；物理实验中，学习到的控制器在5名受试者上提供一致辅助，平均正功率13.6W至23.8W，负功率最小，无需特定用户重训练。

Conclusion: SMAT框架通过模拟人类自然适应过程，实现了稳定的人机协同学习，为外骨骼控制提供了有效的训练方法，能够提供一致辅助而无需用户特定调整。

Abstract: Effective exoskeleton assistance requires co-adaptation: as the device alters joint dynamics, the user reorganizes neuromuscular coordination, creating a non-stationary learning problem. Most learning-based approaches do not explicitly account for the sequential nature of human motor adaptation, leading to training instability and poorly timed assistance. We propose Staged Multi-Agent Training (SMAT), a four-stage curriculum designed to mirror how users naturally acclimate to a wearable device. In SMAT, a musculoskeletal human actor and a bilateral hip exoskeleton actor are trained progressively: the human first learns unassisted gait, then adapts to the added device mass; the exoskeleton subsequently learns a positive assistance pattern against a stabilized human policy, and finally both agents co-adapt with full torque capacity and bidirectional feedback. We implement SMAT in the MyoAssist simulation environment using a 26-muscle lower-limb model and an attached hip exoskeleton. Our musculoskeletal simulations demonstrate that the learned exoskeleton control policy produces an average 10.1% reduction in hip muscle activation relative to the no-assist condition. We validated the learned controller in an offline setting using open-source gait data, then deployed it to a physical hip exoskeleton for treadmill experiments with five subjects. The resulting policy delivers consistent assistance and predominantly positive mechanical power without the need for any explicitly imposed timing shift (mean positive power: 13.6 W at 6 Nm RMS torque to 23.8 W at 9.3 Nm RMS torque, with minimal negative power) consistently across all subjects without subject-specific retraining.

</details>


### [571] [AI-Driven Phase Identification from X-ray Hyperspectral Imaging of cycled Na-ion Cathode Materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07666)
*Fayçal Adrar,Nicolas Folastre,Chloé Pablos,Stefan Stanescu,Sufal Swaraj,Raghvender Raghvender,François Cadiou,Laurence Croguennec,Matthieu Bugnet,Arnaud Demortière*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 开发了一种基于高斯混合变分自编码器（GMVAE）和皮尔逊相关系数的AI方法，用于处理稀疏采样的高光谱数据，生成纳米级分辨率的多相图，以分析钠离子电池正极材料中的相分布和演化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 钠离子电池在大规模储能应用中具有潜力，但扩散受限的钠离子传输会导致空间异质的相成核和传播，产生多相共存和局部不均匀的电化学活性，形成复杂的反应路径，这给机理理解和材料优化带来挑战。虽然可以通过研究材料的单晶区域（即单个颗粒尺度）来解决，但这类分析通常受到能量和/或空间稀疏的高光谱数据集的限制。

Method: 开发了一种AI驱动的方法，在稀疏采样条件下处理高光谱数据，生成纳米级分辨率的多相图。该方法结合了高斯混合变分自编码器（GMVAE）算法和皮尔逊相关系数，通过扫描透射X射线显微镜（STXM）数据确定NaxV2(PO4)2F3正极材料在不同荷电状态下单个颗粒中的相分布和共存。

Result: 该方法揭示了单个颗粒内的纳米级相异质性和演化，通过识别模糊区域、错误分配和晶界处的过渡相，提高了相检测的可靠性。能够生成纳米级分辨率的多相图，覆盖微米尺度的视场。

Conclusion: 提出的AI驱动方法能够有效处理稀疏高光谱数据，揭示钠离子电池正极材料中的纳米级相异质性和演化，为材料优化和机理理解提供了重要工具。

Abstract: Na-ion batteries have emerged as viable candidates for large-scale energy storage applica- tions due to resource abundance and cost advantages. The constraints imposed on their performance and durability, for instance, by complex phase transformations in positive electrode materials during electrochemical cycling, can be addressed and are thus not detrimental to their development. However, diffusion-limited Na-ion transport can drive spatially heterogeneous phase nucleation and propagation, leading to multiphase coexis- tence and locally non-uniform electrochemical activity, generating complex reaction path- ways that challenge both mechanistic understanding and predictive material optimization. These challenges can be addressed by investigating single-crystalline regions of materials, i.e. down to the scale of individual particles, although such analyses are often constrained by energetically and/or spatially sparse hyperspectral datasets. Here, we developed an AI-driven method to process hyperspectral data under sparse sampling conditions and generate multiphase maps with nanometer-scale resolution over a micrometer-scale field of view. We applied this processing on scanning transmission X-ray microscopy (STXM) data to determine the distribution and coexistence of phases in individual particles of NaxV2(PO4)2F3 cathode materials, at different states of charge. The methodology relies on a workflow which combines a Gaussian mixture variational autoencoder (GMVAE) algorithm with the Pearson corre- lation coefficient to identify the sodium content and map their spatial distribution. Our approach reveals nanoscale phase heterogeneity and evolution within individual particles, and improves the reliability of phase detection by identifying ambiguity zones, false assign- ments, and transition phases localized at grain boundaries.

</details>


### [572] [Column Generation for the Micro-Transit Zoning Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07821)
*Hins Hu,Rishav Sen,Jose Paolo Talusan,Abhishek Dubey,Aron Laszka,Samitha Samaranayake*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种改进的微交通区域规划方法，通过列生成框架解决带全局预算约束的微交通区域划分问题，相比现有方法能更高效地生成更优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微交通服务作为固定线路公共交通和单请求网约车之间的中间选择，在最大化载客量和最小化旅行时间之间取得平衡。然而，有效的微交通运营需要预先规划地理围栏区域，这涉及复杂的组合优化问题。现有方法存在局限性，需要更灵活的预算约束和更高效的求解方法。

Method: 1) 将微交通区域划分问题(MZP)推广到允许全局预算约束而非区域数量限制；2) 设计列生成(CG)框架求解该问题；3) 提出多种定价启发式算法加速计算。

Result: 在美国主要城市进行的广泛数值实验表明，该方法在广义设置下能产生更高质量的解决方案，计算效率更高，扩展性更好。

Conclusion: 提出的列生成框架和定价启发式算法能有效解决带全局预算约束的微交通区域划分问题，为微交通服务规划提供了更灵活和高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Along with the rapid development of new urban mobility options like ride-sharing over the past decade, on-demand micro-transit services stand out as a middle ground, bridging the gap between fixed-line mass transit and single-request ride-hailing, balancing ridership maximization and travel time minimization. Micro-transit adoption can have significant social impact. It improves urban sustainability, through lower energy consumption and reduced emissions, while enhancing equitable mobility access for disadvantaged communities, thanks to its lower vehicle miles per passenger, flexible schedules, and affordable pricing. However, effective operation of micro-transit services requires planning geo-fenced zones in advance, which involves solving a challenging combinatorial optimization problem. Existing approaches enumerate candidate zones first and selects a fixed number of optimal zones in the second step. In this paper, we generalize the Micro-Transit Zoning Problem (MZP) to allow a global budget rather than imposing a size limit for candidate zones. We also design a Column Generation (CG) framework to solve the problem and several pricing heuristics to accelerate computation. Extensive numerical experiments across major U.S. cities demonstrate that our approach produces higher-quality solutions more efficiently and scales better in the generalized setting.

</details>


### [573] [EndoSERV: A Vision-based Endoluminal Robot Navigation System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08324)
*Junyang Wu,Fangfang Xie,Minghui Zhang,Hanxiao Zhang,Jiayuan Sun,Yun Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出EndoSERV方法用于机器人辅助腔内手术的视觉导航定位，通过分段-结构映射和实-虚映射解决组织变形、体内伪影和缺乏标志物等挑战


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人辅助腔内手术在早期癌症干预中应用增多，但腔内解剖结构复杂、狭窄、曲折，给机器人导航带来困难。现有视觉定位方法因组织变形、体内伪影和缺乏显著标志物而容易出错。

Method: EndoSERV方法包括两个主要部分：1) 分段-结构映射：将长程复杂腔体结构划分为小段，独立估计里程；2) 实-虚映射：通过高效迁移技术将真实图像特征映射到虚拟域，利用虚拟姿态真值。训练包括离线预训练提取纹理无关特征和在线适应真实条件。

Result: 基于公共和临床数据集的广泛实验表明，该方法即使没有任何真实姿态标签也有效。

Conclusion: EndoSERV方法解决了腔内机器人视觉导航的定位挑战，通过分段处理和实虚映射实现了无真实标签的有效定位。

Abstract: Robot-assisted endoluminal procedures are increasingly used for early cancer intervention. However, the intricate, narrow and tortuous pathways within the luminal anatomy pose substantial difficulties for robot navigation. Vision-based navigation offers a promising solution, but existing localization approaches are error-prone due to tissue deformation, in vivo artifacts and a lack of distinctive landmarks for consistent localization. This paper presents a novel EndoSERV localization method to address these challenges. It includes two main parts, \textit{i.e.}, \textbf{SE}gment-to-structure and \textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual mapping, and hence the name. For long-range and complex luminal structures, we divide them into smaller sub-segments and estimate the odometry independently. To cater for label insufficiency, an efficient transfer technique maps real image features to the virtual domain to use virtual pose ground truth. The training phases of EndoSERV include an offline pretraining to extract texture-agnostic features, and an online phase that adapts to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments based on both public and clinical datasets have been performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method even without any real pose labels.

</details>


### [574] [Right Move, Right Time: Multi-Sport Space Evaluation Platform for Ultimate Frisbee, Basketball, and Soccer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06585)
*Shunsuke Iwashita,Titouan Jeannot,Braden Eberhard,Jacob Miller,Rikako Kono,Calvin Yeung,Keisuke Fujii*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 开发了一个开放、运动无关的平台，将追踪数据转换为可比较的空间度量，适用于极限飞盘、篮球和足球等专业运动，实现跨运动的空间分析标准化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同运动（极限飞盘、篮球、足球）的教练都面临相同的问题：如何识别可用空间以及何时开始无球跑动。目前缺乏统一的跨运动空间分析框架，使得不同运动之间的战术分析难以比较和复用。

Method: 开发了一个开放的运动无关平台，标准化输入数据，提供时间感知的空间评估。工作流程包括：1) 标准化输入数据格式；2) 计算可比较的空间度量；3) 实现时间感知的空间分析；4) 支持跨运动分析复用。以极限飞盘为重点测试平台，然后扩展到篮球和足球的跨运动转移分析。

Result: 成功开发了一个实用的跨运动分析平台，能够将追踪数据转换为可比较的空间度量。在极限飞盘上验证了方法的有效性，并成功展示了篮球和足球之间的分析转移能力。平台实现了不同运动之间一致、可比较的评估。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了一条实现各种入侵性运动一致、可比较评估的实用路径。通过标准化输入和提供时间感知的空间评估，使得相同的分析可以跨运动复用，为运动战术分析提供了统一的框架。

Abstract: We present an open, sport-agnostic platform that turns tracking into comparable spatial measures across professional Ultimate, basketball, and soccer. Coaches in all three sports ask the same question: where is the usable space, and when should an off-ball run start? Our workflow standardizes inputs, provides timing-aware spatial evaluations, and makes it possible to reuse the same analysis across sports. We illustrate the approach with Ultimate as a focused testbed and then examine transfer between basketball and soccer. Together, these results show a practical path toward consistent, comparable evaluation across various invasion sports.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [575] [vLLM Hook v0: A Plug-in for Programming Model Internals on vLLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06588)
*Ching-Yun Ko,Pin-Yu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: vLLM Hook是一个开源插件，用于增强vLLM推理引擎的可编程性，支持被动和主动编程模型内部状态，实现测试时模型对齐和增强方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前vLLM实现限制了部署模型内部状态的可编程性，阻碍了流行的测试时模型对齐和增强方法的应用，如基于注意力模式的对抗提示检测或基于激活导向的模型响应调整。

Method: vLLM Hook通过配置文件指定要捕获的内部状态，提供与vLLM的无缝集成，支持被动编程（探测内部状态进行分析）和主动编程（通过改变内部状态干预模型生成）。

Result: 展示了三个用例：提示注入检测、增强的检索增强生成（RAG）和激活导向，为社区提供了改进模型部署和推理的工具。

Conclusion: vLLM Hook填补了vLLM在内部状态可编程性方面的关键空白，支持更灵活的模型部署和测试时优化方法。

Abstract: Modern artificial intelligence (AI) models are deployed on inference engines to optimize runtime efficiency and resource allocation, particularly for transformer-based large language models (LLMs). The vLLM project is a major open-source library to support model serving and inference. However, the current implementation of vLLM limits programmability of the internal states of deployed models. This prevents the use of popular test-time model alignment and enhancement methods. For example, it prevents the detection of adversarial prompts based on attention patterns or the adjustment of model responses based on activation steering. To bridge this critical gap, we present vLLM Hook, an opensource plug-in to enable the programming of internal states for vLLM models. Based on a configuration file specifying which internal states to capture, vLLM Hook provides seamless integration to vLLM and supports two essential features: passive programming and active programming. For passive programming, vLLM Hook probes the selected internal states for subsequent analysis, while keeping the model generation intact. For active programming, vLLM Hook enables efficient intervention of model generation by altering the selected internal states. In addition to presenting the core functions of vLLM Hook, in version 0, we demonstrate 3 use cases including prompt injection detection, enhanced retrieval-augmented retrieval (RAG), and activation steering. Finally, we welcome the community's contribution to improve vLLM Hook via https://github.com/ibm/vllm-hook.

</details>


### [576] [How Attention Sinks Emerge in Large Language Models: An Interpretability Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06591)
*Runyu Peng,Ruixiao Li,Mingshu Chen,Yunhua Zhou,Qipeng Guo,Xipeng Qiu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文揭示了LLM中注意力汇聚（attention sink）现象的机制，发现了一个简单的P0汇聚电路，该电路使模型能在前两个Transformer块中识别位置0的token并形成注意力汇聚，且不依赖语义信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM经常对特定token分配不成比例的注意力（注意力汇聚现象），虽然通常被认为有害，但研究发现模型对输入序列第一个token的持续关注是一个例外。这种结构性偏差会影响众多下游应用，但其形成机制尚不清楚。

Method: 通过追踪输入序列第一个token周围注意力汇聚的形成，识别出P0汇聚电路机制。分析30B A3B MoE模型从头训练的训练轨迹，研究该机制的出现和发展规律。

Result: 发现P0汇聚电路使模型能在前两个Transformer块中识别位置0的token并形成注意力汇聚，不依赖语义信息。该机制在训练早期出现，并逐渐集中在前两层，可能作为预训练收敛状态的追踪信号。

Conclusion: 揭示了LLM中注意力汇聚现象的具体机制，发现了一个简单而有效的P0汇聚电路，该发现有助于理解Transformer架构的工作机制，并为预训练收敛状态监测提供了潜在信号。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often allocate disproportionate attention to specific tokens, a phenomenon commonly referred to as the attention sink. While such sinks are generally considered detrimental, prior studies have identified a notable exception: the model's consistent emphasis on the first token of the input sequence. This structural bias can influence a wide range of downstream applications and warrants careful consideration. Despite its prevalence, the precise mechanisms underlying the emergence and persistence of attention sinks remain poorly understood. In this work, we trace the formation of attention sinks around the first token of the input. We identify a simple mechanism, referred to as the P0 Sink Circuit, that enables the model to recognize token at position zero and induce an attention sink within two transformer blocks, without relying on any semantic information. This mechanism serves as the basis for the attention sink on position zero. Furthermore, by analyzing training traces from a 30B A3B MoE model trained from scratch, we find that this mechanism emerges early in training and becomes increasingly concentrated in the first two layers, suggesting a possible signal for tracking pre training convergence states.

</details>


### [577] [FuzzingRL: Reinforcement Fuzz-Testing for Revealing VLM Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06600)
*Jiajun Xu,Jiageng Mao,Ang Qi,Weiduo Yuan,Alexander Romanus,Helen Xia,Vitor Campagnolo Guizilini,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出一种通过模糊测试和强化学习微调自动生成能诱导视觉语言模型(VLMs)错误回答的问题的方法，以揭示模型漏洞


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型容易出错，识别这些错误发生的位置对于确保AI系统的可靠性和安全性至关重要。需要一种自动化的方法来发现VLMs的脆弱性。

Method: 1) 通过视觉和语言模糊测试将单个输入查询转换为大量多样化变体；2) 基于模糊测试结果，通过对抗性强化学习微调指导问题生成器产生越来越具有挑战性的查询，以触发模型失败

Result: 该方法能持续降低目标VLM的答案准确率：例如，Qwen2.5-VL-32B在生成问题上的准确率在4次RL迭代中从86.58%降至65.53%。针对单个目标VLM训练的模糊策略还能迁移到其他多个VLMs，产生同样能降低其性能的挑战性查询

Conclusion: 提出的模糊测试和强化学习微调方法能有效生成挑战性查询，揭示VLMs的脆弱性，且具有跨模型的泛化能力，为VLM的安全性和可靠性评估提供了有效工具

Abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are prone to errors, and identifying where these errors occur is critical for ensuring the reliability and safety of AI systems. In this paper, we propose an approach that automatically generates questions designed to deliberately induce incorrect responses from VLMs, thereby revealing their vulnerabilities. The core of this approach lies in fuzz testing and reinforcement finetuning: we transform a single input query into a large set of diverse variants through vision and language fuzzing. Based on the fuzzing outcomes, the question generator is further instructed by adversarial reinforcement fine-tuning to produce increasingly challenging queries that trigger model failures. With this approach, we can consistently drive down a target VLM's answer accuracy -- for example, the accuracy of Qwen2.5-VL-32B on our generated questions drops from 86.58\% to 65.53\% in four RL iterations. Moreover, a fuzzing policy trained against a single target VLM transfers to multiple other VLMs, producing challenging queries that degrade their performance as well.

</details>


### [578] [Switchable Activation Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06601)
*Laha Ale,Ning Zhang,Scott A. King,Pingzhi Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: SWAN框架为神经网络单元引入输入依赖的二进制门控机制，实现动态计算分配，在保持精度的同时减少冗余计算，统一了稀疏性、剪枝和自适应推理的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型生成模型（如LLMs和LVAs）计算成本过高，阻碍在资源受限环境中的部署。现有效率技术（如dropout、剪枝、低秩分解）只能提供部分解决方案，缺乏动态适应性。

Method: 为每个神经单元配备确定性的输入依赖二进制门，让网络学习何时激活或停用单元。这种动态控制机制自适应分配计算，支持高效动态推理，并可转换为紧凑的密集模型进行部署。

Result: SWAN框架在减少计算冗余的同时保持准确性，实现了结构化、上下文依赖的激活模式，支持动态推理和紧凑模型部署，为可持续AI和边缘智能提供了新方向。

Conclusion: 通过将效率问题重新定义为学习激活控制，SWAN统一了稀疏性、剪枝和自适应推理的优势，提出了神经计算的新原则：激活不是固定的而是上下文依赖的。

Abstract: Deep neural networks, and more recently large-scale generative models such as large language models (LLMs) and large vision-action models (LVAs), achieve remarkable performance across diverse domains, yet their prohibitive computational cost hinders deployment in resource-constrained environments. Existing efficiency techniques offer only partial remedies: dropout improves regularization during training but leaves inference unchanged, while pruning and low-rank factorization compress models post hoc into static forms with limited adaptability. Here we introduce SWAN (Switchable Activation Networks), a framework that equips each neural unit with a deterministic, input-dependent binary gate, enabling the network to learn when a unit should be active or inactive. This dynamic control mechanism allocates computation adaptively, reducing redundancy while preserving accuracy. Unlike traditional pruning, SWAN does not simply shrink networks after training; instead, it learns structured, context-dependent activation patterns that support both efficient dynamic inference and conversion into compact dense models for deployment. By reframing efficiency as a problem of learned activation control, SWAN unifies the strengths of sparsity, pruning, and adaptive inference within a single paradigm. Beyond computational gains, this perspective suggests a more general principle of neural computation, where activation is not fixed but context-dependent, pointing toward sustainable AI, edge intelligence, and future architectures inspired by the adaptability of biological brains.

</details>


### [579] [Scale Dependent Data Duplication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06603)
*Joshua Kazdan,Noam Levi,Rylan Schaeffer,Jessica Chudnovsky,Abhay Puri,Bo He,Mehmet Donmez,Sanmi Koyejo,David Donoho*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了预训练数据重复的尺度依赖性问题，发现随着模型能力增强，语义重复文档的梯度对齐度提高，且大规模语料中语义碰撞加速，导致大模型性能显著下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练数据重复会损害泛化能力并导致记忆，但现有去重方法主要关注表面形式匹配，忽略了语义重复问题。随着模型能力提升，语义重复文档可能产生冗余训练信号，影响模型缩放规律。

Method: 1) 分析不同规模模型对语义重复文档的梯度对齐度；2) 使用EmbeddingGemma-300m嵌入192M文档，分析最近邻余弦相似度分布；3) 在有限独特文档池中进行控制性预训练实验；4) 推导显式缩放定律来估计语义独特性限制的影响。

Result: 1) 大模型对语义重复文档的梯度对齐度更高；2) 大规模语料中语义碰撞加速，偏离各向同性幂律基线；3) 有限语义独特性对小模型影响轻微，但对大模型造成快速增长的损失惩罚；4) 推导出可预测缩放偏差的量化定律。

Conclusion: 数据重复具有尺度依赖性，语义重复在大规模训练中作用类似精确重复。本文识别并解决了这一未研究的尺度依赖源，使大规模预测更加准确。

Abstract: Data duplication during pretraining can degrade generalization and lead to memorization, motivating aggressive deduplication pipelines. However, at web scale, it is unclear what constitutes a ``duplicate'': beyond surface-form matches, semantically equivalent documents (e.g. translations) may induce redundant training signals once models become sufficiently capable. Practically, this means that semantic duplicates operate increasingly like exact duplicates during training. We present evidence that duplication is scale-dependent in two ways. First, as model capability increases, cross-entropy loss gradients for semantically equivalent documents become more aligned. Smaller models, by contrast, produce gradients that reflect surface similarity (e.g., shared tokens) rather than semantic similarity. Second, we embedded all 192 million FineWeb-Edu-Dedup documents using EmbeddingGemma-300m. For moderate corpus sizes, the cosine similarity between nearest-neighbors follows an isotropic power law baseline. However, as corpus size grows to hundreds of billions of tokens, the nearest-neighbor similarities deviate sharply, indicating accelerated semantic collisions. Finally, controlled pretraining on data sampled with replacement from pools of finite unique documents shows that limited uniqueness yields mild degradation for small models, but rapidly increasing loss penalties for larger models, breaking naive scaling extrapolation. We derive explicit scaling laws that allow practitioners to estimate deviation from expected scaling due to limited semantic uniqueness of the pretraining corpus. Our results identify and resolve an unstudied source of scale-dependence, allowing for more accurate prediction at scale.

</details>


### [580] [Know When You're Wrong: Aligning Confidence with Correctness for LLM Error Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06604)
*Xie Xiaohu,Liu Xiaohu,Yao Benjamin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出基于输出锚定标记概率的归一化置信度评分方法，用于检测LLM错误和幻觉，无需外部验证。理论分析显示SFT产生良好校准的置信度，而RL方法（PPO、GRPO、DPO）会导致过度自信，并提出后RL SFT自蒸馏方法恢复置信度可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM在关键决策系统中部署增加，缺乏可靠的不确定性测量方法带来了基本可信度风险。现有方法通常需要外部验证或复杂计算，难以直接检测错误和幻觉。

Method: 1）提出归一化置信度评分：基于输出锚定标记概率（结构化任务分类标签和开放生成的自评估响应Yes/No）；2）理论分析SFT通过最大似然估计产生良好校准置信度，RL方法通过奖励利用导致过度自信；3）提出后RL SFT自蒸馏方法恢复置信度可靠性。

Result: 在7个基准任务和5种不同架构/规模的LLM上验证：SFT将平均置信度-正确性AUROC从0.806提升至0.879，校准误差从0.163降至0.034（Qwen3-4B）；GRPO和DPO降低置信度可靠性；自适应RAG仅用58%检索操作恢复95%最大可达到精度增益（TriviaQA）。

Conclusion: 提出的归一化置信度评分方法能有效检测LLM错误和幻觉，无需外部验证；SFT产生良好校准置信度，RL方法导致过度自信；后RL SFT自蒸馏可恢复RL训练模型的置信度可靠性；方法具有实际应用价值，如自适应RAG。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in critical decision-making systems, the lack of reliable methods to measure their uncertainty presents a fundamental trustworthiness risk. We introduce a normalized confidence score based on output anchor token probabilities: classification labels for structured tasks and self-evaluation responses (Yes/No) for open-ended generation. This enables direct detection of errors and hallucinations with minimal overhead and without external validation. We make three key contributions. First, we propose a normalized confidence score and self-evaluation framework that exposes reliable confidence estimates for error detection across seven diverse benchmark tasks and five LLMs of varying architectures and sizes. Second, our theoretical analysis reveals that supervised fine-tuning (SFT) yields well-calibrated confidence through maximum-likelihood estimation, whereas reinforcement learning methods (PPO, GRPO) and DPO induce overconfidence via reward exploitation. Third, we propose post-RL SFT with self-distillation to restore confidence reliability in RL-trained models. Empirical results demonstrated that SFT improved average confidence-correctness AUROC from 0.806 to 0.879 and reduced calibration error from 0.163 to 0.034 on Qwen3-4B, while GRPO and DPO degraded confidence reliability. We demonstrated practical value through adaptive retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) that selectively retrieves context when the model lacks confidence, using only 58\% of retrieval operations to recover 95\% of the maximum achievable accuracy gain on TriviaQA

</details>


### [581] [CapTrack: Multifaceted Evaluation of Forgetting in LLM Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06610)
*Lukas Thede,Stefan Winzeck,Zeynep Akata,Jonathan Richard Schwarz*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了CapTrack框架，用于分析LLM后训练中的能力遗忘问题，发现遗忘不仅限于参数知识，还包括鲁棒性和默认行为的系统性漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统后训练遗忘研究主要关注参数或事实知识的损失，但这种准确性中心的视角不足以评估现代基础模型。作者认为遗忘应定义为系统性模型漂移，这会降低模型行为和用户体验。

Method: 提出了CapTrack框架，结合行为分类学和基于现有基准及针对性改编的评估套件，用于分析LLM后训练中的能力遗忘。进行了大规模实证研究，涵盖不同后训练算法、领域和模型家族（包括80B参数模型）。

Result: 研究发现遗忘超越了参数知识，在鲁棒性和默认行为方面存在显著漂移。指令微调引起最强的相对漂移，而偏好优化更为保守并能部分恢复丢失的能力。不同模型家族间的差异持续存在，没有出现通用的缓解方法。

Conclusion: 需要能力中心的遗忘分析框架来全面评估后训练影响，系统性模型漂移是比传统知识遗忘更广泛的问题，需要针对性的缓解策略。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) post-training enhances latent skills, unlocks value alignment, improves performance, and enables domain adaptation. Unfortunately, post-training is known to induce forgetting, especially in the ubiquitous use-case of leveraging third-party pre-trained models, which is typically understood as a loss of parametric or factual knowledge. We argue that this accuracy-centric view is insufficient for modern foundation models and instead define forgetting as systematic model drift that degrades behavior and user experience. In this context, we introduce \textbf{CapTrack}, a capability-centric framework for analyzing forgetting in LLMs that combines a behavioral taxonomy with an evaluation suite built on established benchmarks and targeted adaptations. Using CapTrack, we conduct a large-scale empirical study across post-training algorithms, domains, and model families, including models up to 80B parameters. We find that forgetting extends beyond parametric knowledge, with pronounced drift in robustness and default behaviors. Instruction fine-tuning induces the strongest relative drift, while preference optimization is more conservative and can partially recover lost capabilities. Differences across model families persist, and no universal mitigation emerges.

</details>


### [582] [Consensus is Not Verification: Why Crowd Wisdom Strategies Fail for LLM Truthfulness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06612)
*Yegor Denisov-Blanch,Joshua Kazdan,Jessica Chudnovsky,Rylan Schaeffer,Sheng Guan,Soji Adeshina,Sanmi Koyejo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 研究发现，在数学和代码等可验证领域，通过增加推理计算（如Pass@k）可以提升语言模型性能，但在缺乏外部验证的真实性领域，即使大幅增加推理成本（25倍），聚合方法也无法带来准确性提升，反而会放大模型间的共同错误认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索在缺乏外部验证的领域（如真实性判断），是否可以通过增加推理计算来提升语言模型性能，类似于在数学和代码等可验证领域中使用Pass@k等方法的效果。

Method: 研究在五个基准测试和多个模型上进行了实验，比较了单样本基线方法与聚合方法（如投票式聚合）的性能。分析了模型输出之间的相关性，包括在分布外随机字符串条件下的输出相关性，并评估了基于置信度加权方法的有效性。

Result: 结果显示，即使将推理成本增加到25倍，聚合方法在真实性判断任务中无法带来一致的准确性提升，反而会放大模型间的共同错误。模型错误具有强相关性，且自我报告的置信度无法可靠区分正确与错误答案。

Conclusion: 研究划定了推理时扩展的边界：在可验证领域，额外样本为验证器提供更多候选；在不可验证领域，额外样本仅强化共同错误认知。模型在预测其他模型输出方面优于识别真相，揭示了社会预测与真相验证之间的分离。

Abstract: Pass@k and other methods of scaling inference compute can improve language model performance in domains with external verifiers, including mathematics and code, where incorrect candidates can be filtered reliably. This raises a natural question: can we similarly scale compute to elicit gains in truthfulness for domains without convenient verification? We show that across five benchmarks and models, surprisingly, it cannot. Even at 25x the inference cost of naive sampling, polling-style aggregation yields no consistent accuracy gains over single-sample baselines and often amplifies shared misconceptions. We find that under uncertainty, models are better at predicting what other models will say within model ensembles than at identifying what is true, revealing a separation between social prediction and truth verification. Across models and benchmarks, aggregation fails to provide a robust truth signal because language model errors are strongly correlated. The source of correlation goes beyond any individual benchmark: we show that even when conditioned on out of distribution random strings and asked to produce pseudo-random outputs, different models produce correlated outputs. Confidence-based weighting provides no benefit because self-reported confidence fails to reliably distinguish correct from incorrect answers. These results delineate a boundary for inference-time scaling: in verified domains, additional samples provide more candidates for a verifier to filter; in unverified domains, additional samples merely reinforce shared misconceptions.

</details>


### [583] [RACER: Risk-Aware Calibrated Efficient Routing for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06616)
*Sai Hao,Hao Zeng,Hongxin Wei,Bingyi Jing*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出RACER方法，将LLM路由问题重新定义为α-VOR问题，通过输出模型集合而非单一模型来最小化预期集合大小并控制误路由风险，实现分布无关的风险控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多模型系统中，高效地将查询路由到最优LLM对于优化成本-性能权衡至关重要。现有路由器大多依赖单一模型选择，容易受到误路由的影响，需要更鲁棒的解决方案。

Method: RACER方法：1) 将LLM路由重新定义为α-VOR问题；2) 通过增强评分构建嵌套模型集合；3) 使用有限样本集中界限校准阈值，支持可变集合大小和弃权；4) 理论证明实现分布无关的风险控制。

Result: 理论证明RACER能在未见测试数据上实现严格的分布无关风险控制。大量实验验证了理论保证，并证明RACER在各种基准测试中持续提升下游准确性。

Conclusion: RACER为LLM路由提供了一种新颖的集合方法，通过控制误路由风险同时最小化集合大小，显著提高了多模型系统的鲁棒性和准确性。

Abstract: Efficiently routing queries to the optimal large language model (LLM) is crucial for optimizing the cost-performance trade-off in multi-model systems. However, most existing routers rely on single-model selection, making them susceptible to misrouting. In this work, we formulate LLM routing as the $α$-VOR problem to minimize expected set size while controlling the misrouting risk, and propose a novel method -- RACER, extending base routers to output model sets that can be subsequently aggregated for improved output. In particular, RACER constructs nested model sets via augmented scoring and utilizes finite-sample concentration bounds to calibrate a threshold that allows for both variable set sizes and abstention. We theoretically prove that RACER achieves rigorous distribution-free risk control on unseen test data in a post-hoc and model-agnostic manner. Extensive experiments verify our theoretical guarantees and demonstrate that RACER consistently enhances downstream accuracy across a wide range of benchmarks.

</details>


### [584] [Evo: Autoregressive-Diffusion Large Language Models with Evolving Balance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06617)
*Junde Wu,Minhao Hu,Jiayuan Zhu,Yuyuan Liu,Tianyi Zhang,Kang Li,Jingkun Chen,Jiazhen Pan,Min Xu,Yueming Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Evo是一个统一自回归和扩散生成的双重潜在轨迹模型，将文本生成重新概念化为语义成熟度演化的连续过程，在保持快速推理的同时实现高质量输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自回归（AR）和扩散生成模型被视为分离范式，各有优缺点。AR解码快速但缺乏全局规划，扩散生成质量高但推理慢。需要统一框架来结合两者优势，实现高效高质量生成。

Method: 提出连续演化生成框架，将每个token关联向量值嵌入，随语义成熟度变量t∈[0,1]演化。低t值对应AR式精炼，高t值对应扩散式规划。理论证明AR和扩散是共享概率流的离散化，从统一变分ELBO推导训练目标。实现为时间条件Transformer，端到端训练推断潜在码及其演化时间。

Result: Evo 8B在15个多样化基准测试中达到SOTA或高度竞争力结果，包括推理（GSM8K、ARC-C）、代码生成（HumanEval、MBPP）和通用语言理解，同时保持快速推理速度。

Conclusion: Evo为LLM设计提供了新范式，结合了强生成质量、鲁棒符号推理和解码效率，统一了AR和扩散生成的优势。

Abstract: We introduce \textbf{Evo}, a duality latent trajectory model that bridges autoregressive (AR) and diffusion-based language generation within a continuous evolutionary generative framework. Rather than treating AR decoding and diffusion generation as separate paradigms, Evo reconceptualizes text generation as a latent flow: each token is associated with a vector-valued embedding that evolves over a progression variable $t_i \in [0, 1]$, indicating its semantic maturity. Low $t_i$ values correspond to confident AR-like refinement, while high values invoke diffusion-style planning, allowing the model to adaptively balance AR and diffusion based on uncertainty. Theoretically, we show that both AR and diffusion models emerge as discretizations of a shared probability flow, and we derive Evo's training objective from a unified variational ELBO. The model is implemented as a time-conditioned Transformer governed by a shared vector field, trained end-to-end to jointly infer latent codes and their progression times. During decoding, Evo performs efficient, semantics-aware refinement, achieving high-quality outputs without sacrificing speed. Empirically, Evo 8B achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive results on 15 diverse benchmarks, including reasoning (GSM8K, ARC-C), code generation (HumanEval, MBPP), and general language understanding, while maintaining fast inference speed. Our results demonstrate that Evo delivers a new paradigm for LLM design with strong generation quality, robust symbolic reasoning, and decoding efficiency.

</details>


### [585] [Not all tokens are needed(NAT): token efficient reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06619)
*Hejian Sang,Yuanda Xu,Zhengze Zhou,Ran He,Zhipeng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: NAT框架通过选择性地只更新部分生成token来降低RL训练的计算和内存开销，同时保持完整序列RL的学习信号，在数学推理任务中达到与全token更新相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型的发展，强化学习在长思维链轨迹上的扩展受到每个生成token都需要反向传播的计算限制，这导致token长度成为RL训练的隐性成本。需要一种方法在保持学习效果的同时减少计算开销。

Method: 提出NAT框架，通过Horvitz-Thompson重加权实现无偏的部分token策略梯度估计。采用两种简单的token选择方案：均匀随机采样和随机前缀截断，减少前向和反向计算及内存使用，而不改变奖励计算或rollout流程。

Result: 在数学推理基准测试中，NAT仅使用50%的token就能匹配全token GRPO的性能。RPC方案为Qwen3-8B节省了18%的峰值GPU内存和29%的前向和反向RL训练时间。

Conclusion: NAT提供了一种高效且正交的途径来扩展RL，超越了长轨迹带来的限制，使token预算成为首要的优化原语。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key driver of progress in large language models, but scaling RL to long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories is increasingly constrained by backpropagation over every generated token. Even with optimized rollout engines, full-token updates can consume a large fraction of total training cost, turning token length into a hidden tax on RL. We introduce Not All Tokens Are Needed (NAT), a unified framework that makes the token budget a first-class optimization primitive. NAT updates the policy using only a selected subset of generated tokens while preserving the learning signal of full-sequence RL. The core idea is an unbiased partial-token policy-gradient estimator via Horvitz-Thompson reweighting, which ensures statistically correct gradients despite subsampling. We instantiate NAT with two simple, plug-and-play token selection schemes: Uniform Random Sampling (URS) and Random Prefix Cutting (RPC), both of which reduce forward and backward compute and memory without modifying the reward computation or rollout pipeline. Across mathematical reasoning benchmarks, NAT matches full-token GRPO performance while using as few as 50% of tokens, providing an efficient and orthogonal pathway to scaling RL beyond the limits imposed by long trajectories. In our experiments, RPC saves 18% peak GPU memory and 29% forward and backward RL training time for Qwen3-8B.

</details>


### [586] [Reward Under Attack: Analyzing the Robustness and Hackability of Process Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06621)
*Rishabh Tiwari,Aditya Tomar,Udbhav Bamba,Monishwaran Maheswaran,Heng Yang,Michael W. Mahoney,Kurt Keutzer,Amir Gholami*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 研究发现当前最先进的Process Reward Models（PRMs）在对抗性优化压力下存在系统性可利用漏洞，主要作为流畅性检测器而非推理验证器，导致训练信号不可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PRMs正成为LLM推理流程的核心组件，但作者发现现有PRMs在对抗性优化压力下存在系统性可利用漏洞，这威胁到其作为训练信号的可靠性，需要系统性的漏洞评估框架。

Method: 提出三级诊断框架：1) 静态扰动分析测试表面风格变化和逻辑破坏；2) 对抗性优化分析梯度攻击如何膨胀无效轨迹的奖励；3) RL诱导的奖励攻击测试策略如何利用PRM漏洞获得高奖励但低准确率。

Result: 发现PRMs存在流畅性-逻辑分离：对表面风格变化高度不变（奖励变化<0.1），但对逻辑破坏检测不一致。梯度攻击可显著膨胀无效轨迹奖励。RL训练的策略在AIME问题上获得接近完美的PRM奖励（>0.9），但真实准确率低于4%，43%的奖励增益来自风格捷径。

Conclusion: 当前PRMs主要作为流畅性检测器而非推理验证器，存在系统性盲点，不适合作为训练信号。作者发布PRM-BiasBench和诊断工具包以支持部署前的鲁棒性评估。

Abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) are rapidly becoming the backbone of LLM reasoning pipelines, yet we demonstrate that state-of-the-art PRMs are systematically exploitable under adversarial optimization pressure. To address this, we introduce a three-tiered diagnostic framework that applies increasing adversarial pressure to quantify these vulnerabilities. Static perturbation analysis uncovers a fluency-logic dissociation: high invariance to surface-level style changes reward changes $<$0.1, yet inconsistent detection of logically-corrupted reasoning, with different models failing on different attack types. Adversarial optimization demonstrates that gradient-based attacks inflate rewards on invalid trajectories, with reward landscapes exhibiting wide, exploitable peaks. RL-induced reward hacking exposes the critical failure mode: policies trained on AIME problems achieve near-perfect PRM rewards ($>$0.9), while ground-truth accuracy remains low (below 4%), with 43% of reward gains attributable to stylistic shortcuts. These findings reveal that current PRMs function as fluency detectors rather than reasoning verifiers, creating systematic blind spots that undermine their use as training signals. We release PRM-BiasBench and a diagnostic toolkit to enable robustness evaluation before deployment. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/SqueezeAILab/reward-under-attack.

</details>


### [587] [Advances in GRPO for Generation Models: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06623)
*Zexiang Liu,Xianglong He,Yangguang Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Flow-GRPO将GRPO扩展到生成模型，实现生成系统的稳定强化学习对齐，已成为现代生成模型的通用对齐框架


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模流匹配模型在文本到图像、视频、3D和语音合成等生成任务中表现出色，但将其输出与人类偏好和任务特定目标对齐仍然具有挑战性

Method: Flow-GRPO扩展了Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)到生成模型，通过奖励信号设计、信用分配、采样效率、多样性保持、奖励黑客缓解和奖励模型构建等方法实现稳定强化学习对齐

Result: Flow-GRPO触发了快速的研究增长，已扩展到文本到图像、视频生成、图像编辑、语音音频、3D建模、具身视觉语言动作系统、统一多模态模型、自回归和掩码扩散模型以及恢复任务等多个领域

Conclusion: Flow-GRPO作为现代生成模型的通用对齐框架，为可扩展和鲁棒的基于强化的生成提供了理论基础和实践适应，但仍面临关键开放挑战

Abstract: Large-scale flow matching models have achieved strong performance across generative tasks such as text-to-image, video, 3D, and speech synthesis. However, aligning their outputs with human preferences and task-specific objectives remains challenging. Flow-GRPO extends Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to generation models, enabling stable reinforcement learning alignment for generative systems. Since its introduction, Flow-GRPO has triggered rapid research growth, spanning methodological refinements and diverse application domains. This survey provides a comprehensive review of Flow-GRPO and its subsequent developments. We organize existing work along two primary dimensions. First, we analyze methodological advances beyond the original framework, including reward signal design, credit assignment, sampling efficiency, diversity preservation, reward hacking mitigation, and reward model construction. Second, we examine extensions of GRPO-based alignment across generative paradigms and modalities, including text-to-image, video generation, image editing, speech and audio, 3D modeling, embodied vision-language-action systems, unified multimodal models, autoregressive and masked diffusion models, and restoration tasks. By synthesizing theoretical insights and practical adaptations, this survey highlights Flow-GRPO as a general alignment framework for modern generative models and outlines key open challenges for scalable and robust reinforcement-based generation.

</details>


### [588] [Grouter: Decoupling Routing from Representation for Accelerated MoE Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06626)
*Yuqi Xu,Rizhen Hu,Zihan Liu,Mou Sun,Kun Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Grouter是一种预路由方法，通过从完全训练的MoE模型中蒸馏高质量结构作为固定路由器，将结构优化与权重更新解耦，显著加速MoE训练收敛


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MoE训练缺乏结构先验，需要同时训练专家权重和搜索最优路由策略，导致收敛缓慢和训练不稳定。需要解耦结构优化和权重更新来加速训练

Method: 1. 从完全训练的MoE模型中蒸馏高质量路由结构作为固定路由器；2. 引入专家折叠适应不同模型配置；3. 专家调优重新平衡不同数据分布的工作负载；4. 利用预路由结构先验进行针对性优化

Result: Grouter显著提升训练效率和性能：预训练数据利用率提升4.28倍，吞吐量加速最高达33.5%，收敛质量和速度均有显著改善

Conclusion: 预路由成为可扩展MoE训练的基本范式，通过解耦结构优化和权重更新，Grouter为MoE训练提供了高效稳定的解决方案

Abstract: Traditional Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) training typically proceeds without any structural priors, effectively requiring the model to simultaneously train expert weights while searching for an optimal routing policy within a vast combinatorial space. This entanglement often leads to sluggish convergence and training instabilities. This paper introduces Grouter, a preemptive routing method that by distilling high-quality structures from fully-trained MoE models and serving as a fixed router for target models. By decoupling structural optimization from weight updates, Grouter significantly accelerates both the speed and quality of model convergence. To ensure the framework's versatility, we also introduce expert folding to adapt Grouter across varying model configurations and expert tuning to rebalance workloads across different data distributions. Furthermore, by leveraging the structural priors provided by preemptive routing, we can implement targeted optimizations to further enhance training throughput. Experiments demonstrate that Grouter achieves superior performance and efficiency which boosts pre-training data utilization by 4.28x and achieves up to 33.5% throughput acceleration, establishing preemptive routing as a fundamental paradigm for scalable MoE training.

</details>


### [589] [Graph Property Inference in Small Language Models: Effects of Representation and Inference Strategy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06635)
*Michal Podstawski*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 研究小型指令调优语言模型在图论属性推理中的表现，发现输入表示和推理策略对结构化推理能力有重要影响


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索有限容量语言模型能否有效推理文本形式的关系结构的形式属性，理解结构化推理成功或失败的条件，为在基于图的领域中应用小型模型提供指导

Method: 系统研究小型指令调优语言模型的图论属性推理，分离输入表示和推理策略的作用，测试多种局部和全局图度量，评估不同表示方式和推理方法的效果

Result: 结构性能对关系信息组织方式高度敏感：保留邻域结构的表示能提高估计稳定性和序数一致性，多分支推理在不同配置下获得最可靠的总体增益

Conclusion: 小型语言模型的图属性推理关键取决于表示组织和推理设计，结构化能力不仅受模型规模影响，还受关系信息编码方式和预测引导方式的影响，为在受限模型容量下改进结构化推理提供了实用杠杆

Abstract: Recent progress in language modeling has expanded the range of tasks that can be approached through natural language interfaces, including problems that require structured reasoning. However, it remains unclear how effectively limited-capacity language models can infer formal properties of relational structures when those structures are presented in textual form. Understanding the conditions under which structured reasoning succeeds or fails is essential for applying small models in graph-based domains.
  We conduct a systematic study of graph-theoretic property inference in small instruction-tuned language models, isolating the roles of input representation and reasoning strategy. Across a diverse set of local and global graph metrics, we find that structural performance is highly sensitive to how relational information is organized. Representations that preserve neighborhood structure consistently improve estimation stability and ordinal consistency, while multi-branch reasoning yields the most reliable aggregate gains across configurations.
  These results show that graph property inference in small language models depends critically on representational organization and inference design. Structural competence is therefore shaped not only by model scale, but by how relational information is encoded and how predictions are elicited. The findings identify practical levers for improving structured inference under constrained model capacity.

</details>


### [590] [HEARTS: Benchmarking LLM Reasoning on Health Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06638)
*Sirui Li,Shuhan Xiao,Mihir Joshi,Ahmed Metwally,Daniel McDuff,Wei Wang,Yuzhe Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: HEARTS是一个统一的健康时间序列基准测试，评估LLMs在16个真实世界数据集、12个健康领域、20种信号模态上的分层推理能力，包含110个任务，分为感知、推理、生成和演绎四个核心能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试仅覆盖有限的健康时间序列模态和任务，无法反映真实世界生理建模的多样领域和复杂时间依赖性。需要建立一个全面的基准来评估LLMs在健康时间序列上的分层推理能力。

Method: 整合16个真实世界数据集，涵盖12个健康领域和20种信号模态，定义包含110个任务的综合分类法，分为感知、推理、生成、演绎四个核心能力。评估14个最先进的LLMs在超过20K测试样本上的表现。

Result: LLMs显著落后于专业模型，性能与一般推理分数弱相关；LLMs依赖简单启发式方法，难以处理多步时间推理；性能随时间复杂性增加而下降，模型家族内存在相似失败模式，表明仅靠扩展规模不足够。

Conclusion: HEARTS通过量化这些差距，为开发能够推理多样化健康信号的下一代LLM代理提供了标准化测试平台和持续基准。

Abstract: The rise of large language models (LLMs) has shifted time series analysis from narrow analytics to general-purpose reasoning. Yet, existing benchmarks cover only a small set of health time series modalities and tasks, failing to reflect the diverse domains and extensive temporal dependencies inherent in real-world physiological modeling. To bridge these gaps, we introduce HEARTS (Health Reasoning over Time Series), a unified benchmark for evaluating hierarchical reasoning capabilities of LLMs over general health time series. HEARTS integrates 16 real-world datasets across 12 health domains and 20 signal modalities, and defines a comprehensive taxonomy of 110 tasks grouped into four core capabilities: Perception, Inference, Generation, and Deduction. Evaluating 14 state-of-the-art LLMs on more than 20K test samples reveals intriguing findings. First, LLMs substantially underperform specialized models, and their performance is only weakly related to general reasoning scores. Moreover, LLMs often rely on simple heuristics and struggle with multi-step temporal reasoning. Finally, performance declines with increasing temporal complexity, with similar failure modes within model families, indicating that scaling alone is insufficient. By making these gaps measurable, HEARTS provides a standardized testbed and living benchmark for developing next-generation LLM agents capable of reasoning over diverse health signals.

</details>


### [591] [SR-TTT: Surprisal-Aware Residual Test-Time Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06642)
*Swamynathan V P*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: SR-TTT通过引入基于损失门控的稀疏记忆机制，在保持O(1)内存占用的同时解决TTT模型在精确回忆任务中的灾难性失败问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 测试时训练（TTT）语言模型通过用快速权重替代标准KV缓存实现了理论上无限上下文窗口和O(1)内存占用，但纯TTT架构在精确回忆任务（如大海捞针）中会出现灾难性失败，因为快速权重过度压缩上下文导致重要信息被覆盖

Method: 提出SR-TTT（惊奇感知残差测试时训练），在TTT骨干网络基础上增加损失门控稀疏记忆机制，动态路由不可压缩的高惊奇度token到传统的精确注意力残差缓存，对低熵背景上下文保持O(1)内存，对关键信息使用精确注意力

Result: 完整实现、训练脚本和预训练权重已开源，解决了TTT模型在精确回忆任务中的失败问题，同时保持了无限上下文窗口和低内存占用的优势

Conclusion: SR-TTT通过结合快速权重压缩和精确注意力缓存，在保持TTT模型效率优势的同时解决了其精确回忆能力不足的问题，为无限上下文语言模型提供了更实用的解决方案

Abstract: Test-Time Training (TTT) language models achieve theoretically infinite context windows with an O(1) memory footprint by replacing the standard exact-attention KV-cache with hidden state ``fast weights'' W_fast updated via self-supervised learning during inference. However, pure TTT architectures suffer catastrophic failures on exact-recall tasks (e.g., Needle-in-a-Haystack). Because the fast weights aggressively compress the context into an information bottleneck, highly surprising or unique tokens are rapidly overwritten and forgotten by subsequent token gradient updates. We introduce SR-TTT (Surprisal-Aware Residual Test-Time Training), which resolves this recall failure by augmenting the TTT backbone with a loss-gated sparse memory mechanism.
