Motivation: 在高风险环境中，纯粹的模仿学习或强化学习难以避免安全关键错误。模仿学习样本效率高但分布偏移下脆弱，强化学习收敛慢且计算成本高。需要一种既能安全探索又能保持竞争力的方法。

Method: OGSS框架：1) 训练基于历史棋局的强棋步预测模型；2) 从Stockfish评估学习失误预测模型来估计战术风险；3) 推理时生成候选棋步，结合策略模型的预测概率和失误概率的效用函数来选择动作，平衡性能与安全。

Result: 在数百局与强象棋引擎的对弈中，OGSS变体在探索率提高数倍的情况下仍保持较低的失误率，相比动作剪枝、SafeDAgger和基于不确定性的采样等方法表现更优。

Conclusion: OGSS是一种简单有效的安全决策框架，能够在象棋等高风险环境中支持更广泛的探索而不损害战术合理性，平衡了性能与安全性。

Abstract: In high stakes environments, agents relying purely on imitation learning or reinforcement learning often struggle to avoid safety-critical errors during exploration. Existing reinforcement learning approaches for environments such as chess require hundreds of thousands of episodes and substantial computational resources to converge. Imitation learning, on the other hand, is more sample efficient but is brittle under distributional shift and lacks mechanisms for proactive risk avoidance. In this work, we propose Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding (OGSS), a simple yet effective framework for safer decision-making, enabling safe exploration by learning a probabilistic safety model from oracle feedback in an imitation learning setting. Focusing on the domain of chess, we train a model to predict strong moves based on past games, and separately learn a blunder prediction model from Stockfish evaluations to estimate the tactical risk of each move. During inference, the agent first generates a set of candidate moves and then uses the blunder model to determine high-risk options, and uses a utility function combining the predicted move likelihood from the policy model and the blunder probability to select actions that strike a balance between performance and safety. This enables the agent to explore and play competitively while significantly reducing the chance of tactical mistakes. Across hundreds of games against a strong chess engine, we compare our approach with other methods in the literature, such as action pruning, SafeDAgger, and uncertainty-based sampling. Our results demonstrate that OGSS variants maintain a lower blunder rate even as the agent's exploration ratio is increased by several folds, highlighting its ability to support broader exploration without compromising tactical soundness.

</details>


### [703] [Impact of Connectivity on Laplacian Representations in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08558)
*Tommaso Giorgi,Pierriccardo Olivieri,Keyue Jiang,Laura Toni,Matteo Papini*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在马尔可夫决策过程中学习紧凑状态表示的理论保证，特别是基于图拉普拉斯特征向量的表示方法，并给出了值函数线性近似的误差上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模强化学习面临维度灾难问题，学习紧凑状态表示是关键。现有方法利用MDP的结构先验，通过状态图拉普拉斯特征向量的线性组合构建状态表示，但缺乏理论保证。

Method: 提出理论分析框架：1) 证明在线性值函数近似下学习到的谱特征的近似误差上界；2) 分析特征向量估计本身引入的误差；3) 推导端到端误差分解；4) 澄清RL设置中拉普拉斯算子的表达。

Result: 理论结果表明：1) 近似误差与状态图的代数连通性相关；2) 误差分解揭示了表示学习管道的端到端性能；3) 结果适用于一般（非均匀）策略，无需转移核对称性假设；4) 在gridworld环境中验证了理论发现。

Conclusion: 该工作为基于谱特征的强化学习状态表示提供了严格的理论基础，将表示质量与MDP的拓扑结构联系起来，澄清了文献中的常见误解，为大规模RL的表示学习提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Learning compact state representations in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) has proven crucial for addressing the curse of dimensionality in large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) problems. Existing principled approaches leverage structural priors on the MDP by constructing state representations as linear combinations of the state-graph Laplacian eigenvectors. When the transition graph is unknown or the state space is prohibitively large, the graph spectral features can be estimated directly via sample trajectories. In this work, we prove an upper bound on the approximation error of linear value function approximation under the learned spectral features. We show how this error scales with the algebraic connectivity of the state-graph, grounding the approximation quality in the topological structure of the MDP. We further bound the error introduced by the eigenvector estimation itself, leading to an end-to-end error decomposition across the representation learning pipeline. Additionally, our expression of the Laplacian operator for the RL setting, although equivalent to existing ones, prevents some common misunderstandings, of which we show some examples from the literature. Our results hold for general (non-uniform) policies without any assumptions on the symmetry of the induced transition kernel. We validate our theoretical findings with numerical simulations on gridworld environments.

</details>


### [704] [Towards Batch-to-Streaming Deep Reinforcement Learning for Continuous Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08588)
*Riccardo De Monte,Matteo Cederle,Gian Antonio Susto*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了两种流式深度强化学习算法S2AC和SDAC，专门设计用于与最先进的批量RL方法兼容，特别适用于设备端微调应用如Sim2Real迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前最先进的深度RL方法在连续控制任务中表现出色，但其计算复杂度高（依赖回放缓冲区、批量更新和目标网络），与资源受限硬件的约束不兼容。流式深度RL通过纯在线更新解决了这一限制。

Method: 提出了两种流式深度RL算法：流式软演员-评论家(S2AC)和流式确定性演员-评论家(SDAC)。这些算法明确设计为与最先进的批量RL方法兼容，无需繁琐的超参数调优。还研究了从批量学习到流式学习的微调过渡中的实际挑战，并提出了具体应对策略。

Result: 两种算法在标准基准测试中实现了与最先进流式基线相当的性能，无需繁琐的超参数调优。特别适用于设备端微调应用，如Sim2Real迁移。

Conclusion: 提出的S2AC和SDAC算法为资源受限环境提供了高效的流式深度RL解决方案，在保持性能的同时实现了计算效率，为设备端微调和Sim2Real迁移等应用提供了实用工具。

Abstract: State-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods have achieved remarkable performance in continuous control tasks, yet their computational complexity is often incompatible with the constraints of resource-limited hardware, due to their reliance on replay buffers, batch updates, and target networks. The emerging paradigm of streaming deep RL addresses this limitation through purely online updates, achieving strong empirical performance on standard benchmarks. In this work, we propose two novel streaming deep RL algorithms, Streaming Soft Actor-Critic (S2AC) and Streaming Deterministic Actor-Critic (SDAC), explicitly designed to be compatible with state-of-the-art batch RL methods, making them particularly suitable for on-device finetuning applications such as Sim2Real transfer. Both algorithms achieve performance comparable to state-of-the-art streaming baselines on standard benchmarks without requiring tedious hyperparameter tuning. Finally, we further investigate the practical challenges of transitioning from batch to streaming learning during finetuning and propose concrete strategies to tackle them.

</details>


### [705] [Split Federated Learning Architectures for High-Accuracy and Low-Delay Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08687)
*Yiannis Papageorgiou,Yannis Thomas,Ramin Khalili,Iordanis Koutsopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种分层联邦学习（HSFL）架构优化方法，通过联合优化模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配，在保证精度的同时降低训练延迟和通信开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分层联邦学习架构虽然采用三层训练结构（客户端、聚合器、中央服务器），但忽视了模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配对精度、延迟和开销的影响。本文旨在解决这一问题，寻找既能优化训练精度又能降低延迟和通信开销的架构设计。

Method: 1. 将模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配对精度、延迟和开销的影响形式化为联合优化问题
2. 证明该问题是NP-hard问题
3. 提出首个精度感知的启发式算法，在保持延迟效率的同时显式考虑模型精度

Result: 在公开数据集上的仿真结果表明，相比最先进的SFL和HSFL方案，该方法能提高3%的精度，同时减少20%的延迟和50%的开销。

Conclusion: 通过联合优化模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配，可以在分层联邦学习中实现精度、延迟和开销的协同优化，为高效分布式机器学习训练提供了新的架构设计思路。

Abstract: Can we find a network architecture for ML model training so as to optimize training loss (and thus, accuracy) in Split Federated Learning (SFL)? And can this architecture also reduce training delay and communication overhead? While accuracy is not influenced by how we split the model in ordinary, state-of-the-art SFL, in this work we answer the questions above in the affirmative. Recent Hierarchical SFL (HSFL) architectures adopt a three-tier training structure consisting of clients, (local) aggregators, and a central server. In this architecture, the model is partitioned at two partitioning layers into three sub-models, which are executed across the three tiers. Despite their merits, HSFL architectures overlook the impact of the partitioning layers and client-to-aggregator assignments on accuracy, delay, and overhead. This work explicitly captures the impact of the partitioning layers and client-to-aggregator assignments on accuracy, delay and overhead by formulating a joint optimization problem. We prove that the problem is NP-hard and propose the first accuracy-aware heuristic algorithm that explicitly accounts for model accuracy, while remaining delay-efficient. Simulation results on public datasets show that our approach can improve accuracy by 3%, while reducing delay by 20% and overhead by 50%, compared to state-of-the-art SFL and HSFL schemes.

</details>


### [706] [Impermanent: A Live Benchmark for Temporal Generalization in Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08707)
*Azul Garza,Renée Rosillo,Rodrigo Mendoza-Smith,David Salinas,Andrew Robert Williams,Arjun Ashok,Mononito Goswami,José Martín Juárez*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Impermanent是一个用于时间序列预测的实时基准测试框架，通过持续更新的数据流进行顺序评分，评估模型在开放世界时间变化下的表现，重点关注时间鲁棒性、分布偏移和性能稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前时间序列预测的预训练基础模型声称具有广泛泛化能力，但现有评估协议存在局限性。静态训练-测试分割容易导致数据污染（模型可能无意中在测试数据上训练或使用测试分数进行模型选择），从而夸大性能表现。

Method: 引入Impermanent实时基准测试，在持续更新的数据流上顺序评分预测模型，使用GitHub开源活动作为自然实时且高度非平稳的数据集，关注400个最受欢迎的仓库，构建问题开启、拉取请求、推送事件和新星标用户的时间序列，通过滚动窗口和每日更新进行评估。

Result: 提供了可重现、持续比较的标准化协议和排行榜，将评估从静态准确性转向持续性能，为评估时间序列预测中基础级泛化能力的实际意义提供了具体方法。

Conclusion: 通过将评估重点从静态准确性转向持续性能，Impermanent朝着评估时间序列预测中基础级泛化能力何时以及是否能够被有意义地声称迈出了具体一步。

Abstract: Recent advances in time-series forecasting increasingly rely on pre-trained foundation-style models. While these models often claim broad generalization, existing evaluation protocols provide limited evidence. Indeed, most current benchmarks use static train-test splits that can easily lead to contamination as foundation models can inadvertently train on test data or perform model selection using test scores, which can inflate performance. We introduce Impermanent, a live benchmark that evaluates forecasting models under open-world temporal change by scoring forecasts sequentially over time on continuously updated data streams, enabling the study of temporal robustness, distributional shift, and performance stability rather than one-off accuracy on a frozen test set. Impermanent is instantiated on GitHub open-source activity, providing a naturally live and highly non-stationary dataset shaped by releases, shifting contributor behavior, platform/tooling changes, and external events. We focus on the top 400 repositories by star count and construct time series from issues opened, pull requests opened, push events, and new stargazers, evaluated over a rolling window with daily updates, alongside standardized protocols and leaderboards for reproducible, ongoing comparison. By shifting evaluation from static accuracy to sustained performance, Impermanent takes a concrete step toward assessing when and whether foundation-level generalization in time-series forecasting can be meaningfully claimed. Code and a live dashboard are available at https://github.com/TimeCopilot/impermanent and https://impermanent.timecopilot.dev.

</details>


### [707] [Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search for Modern AI: A Projection-Augmented Graph Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06660)
*Kejing Lu,Zhenpeng Pan,Jianbin Qin,Yoshiharu Ishikawa,Chuan Xiao*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: PAG是一个新的近似最近邻搜索框架，通过将投影技术集成到图索引中，满足现代AI应用对查询效率、快速索引、低内存占用、高维扩展性、检索规模鲁棒性和在线插入的六大需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ANNS解决方案主要优化查询效率，但无法满足现代AI工作负载的实际需求。现代AI应用需要同时满足六个关键需求：高查询效率、快速索引、低内存占用、高维可扩展性、不同检索规模的鲁棒性以及在线插入支持。

Method: 提出投影增强图(PAG)框架，将投影技术集成到图索引中。通过投影统计检验指导的精确距离和近似距离之间的非对称比较，减少不必要的精确距离计算。设计了三个关键组件并统一到图索引中，以优化索引和搜索过程。

Result: 在六个现代数据集上的实验表明，PAG在QPS-召回率性能上始终优于现有方法，比HNSW快达5倍，同时提供快速索引速度和适中的内存占用。PAG在高维度和大检索规模下保持鲁棒性，并自然支持在线插入。

Conclusion: PAG是一个满足现代AI应用所有六个关键需求的ANNS框架，通过投影增强图索引实现了查询效率、索引速度和内存占用的良好平衡，为大规模AI应用提供了实用的近似最近邻搜索解决方案。

Abstract: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) is fundamental to modern AI applications. Most existing solutions optimize query efficiency but fail to align with the practical requirements of modern workloads. In this paper, we outline six critical demands of modern AI applications: high query efficiency, fast indexing, low memory footprint, scalability to high dimensionality, robustness across varying retrieval sizes, and support for online insertions. To satisfy all these demands, we introduce Projection-Augmented Graph (PAG), a new ANNS framework that integrates projection techniques into a graph index. PAG reduces unnecessary exact distance computations through asymmetric comparisons between exact and approximate distances as guided by projection-based statistical tests. Three key components are designed and unified to the graph index to optimize indexing and searching. Experiments on six modern datasets demonstrate that PAG consistently achieves superior query per second (QPS)-recall performance -- up to 5x faster than HNSW -- while offering fast indexing speed and moderate memory footprint. PAG remains robust as dimensionality and retrieval size increase and naturally supports online insertions.

</details>


### [708] [PolyBlocks: A Compiler Infrastructure for AI Chips and Programming Frameworks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06731)
*Uday Bondhugula,Akshay Baviskar,Navdeep Katel,Vimal Patel,Anoop JS,Arnab Dutta*

Main category: cs.PL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: PolyBlocks是一个基于MLIR的模块化编译器基础设施，用于AI编程框架和AI芯片，通过自动化代码生成实现高性能计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI编译器通常依赖厂商库和手动调优，缺乏统一的、可重用的编译器基础设施来支持多种AI芯片和框架。PolyBlocks旨在提供一个模块化、可扩展的编译器架构，实现从高级框架到底层硬件指令的自动化高性能代码生成。

Method: 基于MLIR构建模块化编译器基础设施，采用pass pipeline组合循环嵌套和SSA变换，主要依赖轻量级仿射访问分析。通过分析成本模型和启发式方法自动实现高性能代码，包括多级分块、融合、片上暂存器使用、矩阵单元映射、注意力层融合等优化。

Result: 在针对NVIDIA GPU的PyTorch和JAX即时编译评估中，PolyBlocks能够匹配或超越Torch Inductor和XLA。对于单个算子如矩阵乘和卷积，PolyBlocks生成的代码与最佳厂商调优库或手写内核具有竞争力。

Conclusion: PolyBlocks提供了一个有效的模块化编译器基础设施，能够实现从高级AI框架到底层硬件的高性能自动化代码生成，支持多种AI芯片目标，并在性能上与传统方法竞争。

Abstract: We present the design and implementation of PolyBlocks, a modular and reusable MLIR-based compiler infrastructure for AI programming frameworks and AI chips. PolyBlocks is based on pass pipelines that compose transformations on loop nests and SSA, primarily relying on lightweight affine access analysis; the transformations are stitched together in specialized ways to realize high-performance code automatically by the use of analytical cost models and heuristics. The optimizations in these passes include multi-level tiling, fusion, on-chip scratchpad usage, mapping matmuls and convolutions to matrix units, fusing the attention layer, and several other transformations for parallelism and locality. They have been developed in a way that makes it easy to build PolyBlocks-based compilers to target new chips, reusing much of the infrastructure. PolyBlocks' design and architecture enable fully automatic code generation from high-level frameworks to low-level target-specific intrinsics.
  Experimental results from evaluating PolyBlocks-powered just-in-time compilation for PyTorch and JAX targeting NVIDIA GPUs show that it is able to match or outperform Torch Inductor and XLA in several cases, although the latter rely on a combination of vendor libraries and code generation. For individual operators like matmuls and convolutions, PolyBlocks-generated code is competitive with the best vendor-tuned libraries or hand-written kernels.

</details>


### [709] [CREDO: Epistemic-Aware Conformalized Credal Envelopes for Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06826)
*Luben M. C. Cabezas,Sabina J. Sloman,Bruno M. Resende,Fanyi Wu,Michele Caprio,Rafael Izbicki*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: CREDO是一种结合了可信集方法和保形预测的方法，通过先构建可信包络再应用保形校准，在保证边际覆盖率的同时提供可解释的预测区间，能分解为偶然噪声、认知不确定性和校准松弛三个部分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统保形预测能提供分布无关的覆盖率保证，但其区间在模型外推区域可能显得过于自信，因为标准保形分数不显式表示认知不确定性。而可信集方法虽然能通过处理一组可信预测分布来显示认知效应，但通常是模型依赖的且缺乏校准保证。CREDO旨在结合两者的优势。

Method: CREDO采用"先可信后保形"的两步法：1) 构建可解释的可信包络，当局部证据弱时包络会变宽；2) 在该包络上应用分割保形校准，无需额外假设即可保证边际覆盖率。该方法基于修剪极端后验预测端点实现快速计算。

Result: 在基准回归任务上，CREDO在保持目标覆盖率的同时，以竞争性效率提高了稀疏适应性。预测区间的宽度可分解为偶然噪声、认知膨胀和分布无关的校准松弛三个可解释部分。

Conclusion: CREDO成功结合了可信集方法的认知不确定性和保形预测的校准保证，提供既可靠又可解释的预测区间，在模型外推区域表现更合理。

Abstract: Conformal prediction delivers prediction intervals with distribution-free coverage, but its intervals can look overconfident in regions where the model is extrapolating, because standard conformal scores do not explicitly represent epistemic uncertainty. Credal methods, by contrast, make epistemic effects visible by working with sets of plausible predictive distributions, but they are typically model-based and lack calibration guarantees. We introduce CREDO, a simple "credal-then-conformalize" recipe that combines both strengths. CREDO first builds an interpretable credal envelope that widens when local evidence is weak, then applies split conformal calibration on top of this envelope to guarantee marginal coverage without further assumptions. This separation of roles yields prediction intervals that are interpretable: their width can be decomposed into aleatoric noise, epistemic inflation, and a distribution-free calibration slack. We provide a fast implementation based on trimming extreme posterior predictive endpoints, prove validity, and show on benchmark regressions that CREDO maintains target coverage while improving sparsity adaptivity at competitive efficiency.

</details>


### [710] [Adaptive Discovery of Interpretable Audio Attributes with Multimodal LLMs for Low-Resource Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06991)
*Kosuke Yoshimura,Hisashi Kashima*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出使用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）替代人类在AdaFlock框架中，实现自适应发现可解释音频属性的方法，显著加快属性发现速度，并在多数音频任务中优于直接MLLM预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在低资源音频分类的预测建模中，提取高精度且可解释的属性至关重要，特别是在高可靠性应用中。虽然人类驱动的属性发现有效，但其低吞吐量成为瓶颈。需要一种更高效的方法来自适应发现可解释的音频属性。

Method: 使用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）替代人类在AdaFlock框架中，通过提示动态识别显著的声学特征，并构建基于属性的集成分类器。该方法能够自适应地发现可解释的音频属性。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多种音频任务中优于直接MLLM预测，在大多数评估案例中表现更好。整个训练在11分钟内完成，证明了其作为实用自适应解决方案的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的基于MLLMs的自适应属性发现方法显著加快了属性发现过程，超越了传统依赖人类的方法，为低资源音频分类提供了一种高效实用的解决方案。

Abstract: In predictive modeling for low-resource audio classification, extracting high-accuracy and interpretable attributes is critical. Particularly in high-reliability applications, interpretable audio attributes are indispensable. While human-driven attribute discovery is effective, its low throughput becomes a bottleneck. We propose a method for adaptively discovering interpretable audio attributes using Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). By replacing humans in the AdaFlock framework with MLLMs, our method achieves significantly faster attribute discovery. Our method dynamically identifies salient acoustic characteristics via prompting and constructs an attribute-based ensemble classifier. Experimental results across various audio tasks demonstrate that our method outperforms direct MLLM prediction in the majority of evaluated cases. The entire training completes within 11 minutes, proving it a practical, adaptive solution that surpasses conventional human-reliant approaches.

</details>


### [711] [VLN-Cache: Enabling Token Caching for VLN Models with Visual/Semantic Dynamics Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07080)
*Zihao Zheng,Zhihao Mao,Xingyue Zhou,Jiayu Chen,Maoliang Li,Xinhao Sun,Hailong Zou,Zhaobo Zhang,Xuanzhe Liu,Donggang Cao,Hong Mei,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: VLN-Cache：针对视觉语言导航任务提出的动态感知缓存框架，通过视图对齐重映射解决视觉动态问题，通过任务相关性显著性过滤解决语义动态问题，在保持导航性能的同时实现1.52倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言导航（VLN）依赖大视觉语言模型，但推理成本与实时部署需求冲突。现有token缓存方法假设静态相机和固定语义焦点，而VLN任务中相机视角和语义焦点都会动态变化，导致缓存失效。

Method: 提出VLN-Cache框架：1) 视图对齐重映射：通过几何对应恢复解决视觉动态问题；2) 任务相关性显著性过滤：检测语义转换并否决重用；3) 层自适应熵策略：平衡各层的重用预算。

Result: 在R2R-CE仿真基准测试中，实现最高1.52倍加速，同时保持竞争力的导航成功率，证明了训练免费缓存策略在动态VLN环境中的有效性。

Conclusion: VLN-Cache成功解决了视觉语言导航中的动态缓存挑战，通过几何对齐和语义感知机制，在保持性能的同时显著降低推理成本，为实时VLN部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) increasingly relies on large vision-language models, but their inference cost conflicts with real-time deployment. Token caching is a promising training-free strategy that avoids redundant computation by reusing stable visual tokens across frames. However, existing methods assume a static camera and fixed semantic focus, assumptions that VLN fundamentally violates. We identify two failure modes: (1) visual dynamics, where viewpoint shift displaces token positions across frames, causing position-wise matching to pair misaligned content; (2) semantic dynamics, where token relevance shifts across task stages as navigation progresses, making cached states stale. We propose VLN-Cache, a visual-dynamic-aware and semantic-dynamic-aware caching framework that introduces view-aligned remapping to recover geometric correspondences and a task-relevance saliency filter to veto reuse at semantic transitions. A layer-adaptive entropy policy further balances the per-layer reuse budget. Experiments on the R2R-CE simulation benchmark show up to 1.52x speedup while maintaining competitive navigation success rates.

</details>


### [712] [Beyond Data Splitting: Full-Data Conformal Prediction by Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07522)
*Young Hyun Cho,Jordan Awan*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需数据分割的全数据隐私保护共形预测框架，利用差分隐私的稳定性控制样本内外分数差距，结合保守的私有分位数算法防止覆盖率不足，相比基于分割的基线方法能产生更精确的预测集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在数据驱动决策中，隐私保护和不确定性量化日益重要。现有隐私共形预测方法通常依赖数据分割，这会减少有效样本量，影响预测性能。需要开发无需数据分割的全数据隐私保护共形预测方法。

Method: 提出全数据隐私保护共形预测框架：1) 利用差分隐私的稳定性控制样本内外共形分数差距；2) 设计保守的私有分位数算法防止覆盖率不足；3) 提供机制特定的稳定性分析以实现渐近恢复名义覆盖率水平。

Result: 实验表明，相比基于分割的隐私基线方法，该方法能产生更精确的预测集。通用差分隐私保证提供覆盖率下限，但机制特定的稳定性分析能渐近恢复名义覆盖率水平。

Conclusion: 提出的全数据隐私保护共形预测框架避免了数据分割，利用差分隐私稳定性控制样本内外分数差距，结合保守私有分位数算法，能产生比分割方法更精确的预测集，并在机制特定分析下渐近恢复名义覆盖率。

Abstract: Privacy protection and uncertainty quantification are increasingly important in data-driven decision making. Conformal prediction provides finite-sample marginal coverage, but existing private approaches often rely on data splitting, reducing the effective sample size. We propose a full-data privacy-preserving conformal prediction framework that avoids splitting. Our framework leverages stability induced by differential privacy to control the gap between in-sample and out-of-sample conformal scores, and pairs this with a conservative private quantile routine designed to prevent under-coverage. We show that a generic differential privacy guarantee yields a universal coverage floor, yet cannot generally recover the nominal $1-α$ level. We then provide a refined, mechanism-specific stability analysis and yields asymptotic recovery of the nominal level. Experiments demonstrate sharper prediction sets than the split-based private baseline.

</details>


### [713] [NaviDriveVLM: Decoupling High-Level Reasoning and Motion Planning for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07901)
*Ximeng Tao,Pardis Taghavi,Dimitar Filev,Reza Langari,Gaurav Pandey*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了NaviDriveVLM框架，将自动驾驶中的推理与动作生成解耦，使用大规模导航器进行语义理解，轻量级可训练驱动器进行精确控制，在nuScenes基准上优于现有VLM基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型(VLM)的自动驾驶系统面临高层推理与运动规划之间的权衡：大模型语义理解强但适配精确控制成本高，小模型可高效微调但推理能力弱。需要一种既能保持强大推理能力又能实现精确控制的解决方案。

Method: 提出NaviDriveVLM解耦框架：1) 大规模Navigator负责视觉观察、驾驶上下文和语言推理，生成显式的可解释中间表示；2) 轻量级可训练Driver基于中间表示进行精确运动规划。这种分离设计保留了推理能力，降低了训练成本。

Result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，NaviDriveVLM在端到端运动规划任务上优于现有大型VLM基线模型，同时保持了强大的语义理解能力和精确控制能力。

Conclusion: 通过解耦推理与动作生成，NaviDriveVLM框架有效解决了VLM在自动驾驶中推理与控制的权衡问题，提供了可解释的中间表示，为下游规划提供了更好的基础。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have emerged as a promising direction for end-to-end autonomous driving (AD) by jointly modeling visual observations, driving context, and language-based reasoning. However, existing VLM-based systems face a trade-off between high-level reasoning and motion planning: large models offer strong semantic understanding but are costly to adapt for precise control, whereas small VLM models can be fine-tuned efficiently but often exhibit weaker reasoning. We propose NaviDriveVLM, a decoupled framework that separates reasoning from action generation using a large-scale Navigator and a lightweight trainable Driver. This design preserves reasoning ability, reduces training cost, and provides an explicit interpretable intermediate representation for downstream planning. Experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that NaviDriveVLM outperforms large VLM baselines in end-to-end motion planning.

</details>


### [714] [Integrating Lagrangian Neural Networks into the Dyna Framework for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08468)
*Shreya Das,Kundan Kumar,Muhammad Iqbal,Outi Savolainen,Dominik Baumann,Laura Ruotsalainen,Simo Särkkä*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于拉格朗日神经网络(LNN)的Dyna模型强化学习框架，通过物理约束提升动力学模型准确性，并比较了两种优化器的训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于模型的强化学习(MBRL)依赖黑盒动力学模型，这些模型不遵循物理定律，在面对与训练数据不同的数据时预测不准确。作者希望引入物理约束来提升模型的泛化能力和准确性。

Method: 采用拉格朗日神经网络(LNN)在Dyna框架中建模动力学，LNN强制模型遵循拉格朗日力学结构。使用两种优化器训练网络权重：随机梯度优化器和基于状态估计的优化器。

Result: 基于状态估计的优化器在神经网络训练中收敛速度比随机梯度优化器更快。仿真结果表明，提出的LNN-based Dyna框架在MBRL中有效。

Conclusion: 通过将物理约束的LNN集成到Dyna框架中，可以提高MBRL的样本效率和模型准确性，特别是当面对分布外数据时。

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is sample-efficient but depends on the accuracy of the learned dynamics, which are often modeled using black-box methods that do not adhere to physical laws. Those methods tend to produce inaccurate predictions when presented with data that differ from the original training set. In this work, we employ Lagrangian neural networks (LNNs), which enforce an underlying Lagrangian structure to train the model within a Dyna-based MBRL framework. Furthermore, we train the LNN using stochastic gradient-based and state-estimation-based optimizers to learn the network's weights. The state-estimation-based method converges faster than the stochastic gradient-based method during neural network training. Simulation results are provided to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed LNN-based Dyna framework for MBRL.

</details>


### [715] [Pareto-Optimal Anytime Algorithms via Bayesian Racing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08493)
*Jonathan Wurth,Helena Stegherr,Neele Kemper,Michael Heider,Jörg Hähner*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出PolarBear框架，将算法比较视为时间上的帕累托优化，使用贝叶斯排序模型识别非支配算法，无需归一化或已知最优值


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法比较方法存在多个问题：需要将任意时间性能压缩为标量、需要手动解释图表、结论随算法增减而变化、需要归一化但边界或最优值通常未知、无法跨实例一致聚合

Method: 提出PolarBear框架，将算法比较视为时间上的帕累托优化：算法在某个时间点非支配，如果没有其他算法在所有时间点都优于它。使用排名而非目标值，无需边界或归一化。采用贝叶斯推理和Plackett-Luce排序模型，通过自适应采样识别帕累托集，早期消除被支配算法

Result: 方法能够一致地跨任意实例分布聚合，无需已知最优值，提供后验信念支持下游算法选择，适应任意时间偏好和风险配置

Conclusion: PolarBear提供了一个鲁棒的框架，用于任意时间算法比较，解决了现有方法的局限性，支持在未知计算预算下进行算法选择

Abstract: Selecting an optimization algorithm requires comparing candidates across problem instances, but the computational budget for deployment is often unknown at benchmarking time. Current methods either collapse anytime performance into a scalar, require manual interpretation of plots, or produce conclusions that change when algorithms are added or removed. Moreover, methods based on raw objective values require normalization, which needs bounds or optima that are often unavailable and breaks coherent aggregation across instances. We propose a framework that formulates anytime algorithm comparison as Pareto optimization over time: an algorithm is non-dominated if no competitor beats it at every timepoint. By using rankings rather than objective values, our approach requires no bounds, no normalization, and aggregates coherently across arbitrary instance distributions without requiring known optima. We introduce PolarBear (Pareto-optimal anytime algorithms via Bayesian racing), a procedure that identifies the anytime Pareto set through adaptive sampling with calibrated uncertainty. Bayesian inference over a temporal Plackett-Luce ranking model provides posterior beliefs about pairwise dominance, enabling early elimination of confidently dominated algorithms. The output Pareto set together with the posterior supports downstream algorithm selection under arbitrary time preferences and risk profiles without additional experiments.

</details>


### [716] [The Neural Compass: Probabilistic Relative Feature Fields for Robotic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08544)
*Gabriele Somaschini,Adrian Röfer,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: ProReFF：一种从无标注视觉数据中学习物体共现关系的特征场模型，通过预测预训练视觉语言模型特征的相对分布，为物体搜索任务提供语义先验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物体共现关系（如杯子通常在厨房）是高效物体搜索的关键线索。现有方法依赖显式标注数据或语言模型查询，但能否从无标注观察中隐式学习这些关系仍不清楚。本文旨在解决这一问题。

Method: 提出ProReFF特征场模型，预测预训练视觉语言模型特征的相对分布。引入基于学习的对齐策略，从可能矛盾的未标注数据中学习，将不一致观察对齐为一致的相对分布。下游物体搜索任务中，使用预测的特征分布作为语义先验指导探索。

Result: ProReFF能捕捉自然场景中有意义的相对特征分布。在Matterport3D模拟器的100个挑战中，搜索代理比最强基线效率高20%，达到人类性能的80%。

Conclusion: 从无标注视觉数据中隐式学习物体共现关系是可行的。ProReFF能有效捕捉语义先验，提升物体搜索效率，接近人类水平。

Abstract: Object co-occurrences provide a key cue for finding objects successfully and efficiently in unfamiliar environments. Typically, one looks for cups in kitchens and views fridges as evidence of being in a kitchen. Such priors have also been exploited in artificial agents, but they are typically learned from explicitly labeled data or queried from language models. It is still unclear whether these relations can be learned implicitly from unlabeled observations alone. In this work, we address this problem and propose ProReFF, a feature field model trained to predict relative distributions of features obtained from pre-trained vision language models. In addition, we introduce a learning-based strategy that enables training from unlabeled and potentially contradictory data by aligning inconsistent observations into a coherent relative distribution. For the downstream object search task, we propose an agent that leverages predicted feature distributions as a semantic prior to guide exploration toward regions with a high likelihood of containing the object. We present extensive evaluations demonstrating that ProReFF captures meaningful relative feature distributions in natural scenes and provides insight into the impact of our proposed alignment step. We further evaluate the performance of our search agent in 100 challenges in the Matterport3D simulator, comparing with feature-based baselines and human participants. The proposed agent is 20% more efficient than the strongest baseline and achieves up to 80% of human performance.

</details>


### [717] [Annealed Co-Generation: Disentangling Variables via Progressive Pairwise Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06615)
*Hantao Zhang,Jieke Wu,Mingda Xu,Xiao Hu,Yingxuan You,Pascal Fua*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出Annealed Co-Generation (ACG)框架，通过成对变量建模而非联合建模来解决科学应用中多变量协同生成的计算负担和数据不平衡问题，使用三阶段退火过程确保一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学应用中的多变量协同生成面临高维扩散建模的计算负担和变量间数据不平衡的挑战，需要更高效且一致的生成方法。

Method: 1) 训练无条件扩散模型对解耦的因果变量对；2) 推理时通过共享变量耦合成对模型；3) 采用共识、加热、冷却三阶段退火过程确保一致性并约束数据分布在学习流形上。

Result: 在流场补全和抗体生成两个科学任务上展示了框架的灵活性和有效性，代码和数据将公开。

Conclusion: 成对块建模比联合建模更高效，ACG框架通过低维扩散模型和退火过程实现了高质量的多变量协同生成，适用于科学应用。

Abstract: For multivariate co-generation in scientific applications, we advocate pairwise block rather than joint modeling of all variables. This design mitigates the computational burden and data imbalance. To this end, we propose an Annealed Co-Generation (ACG) framework that replaces high-dimensional diffusion modeling with a low-dimensional diffusion model, which enables multivariate co-generation by composing pairwise variable generations. We first train an unconditional diffusion model over causal variables that are disentangled into pairs. At inference time, we recover the joint distribution by coupling these pairwise models through shared common variables, enabling coherent multivariate generation without any additional training. By employing a three-stage annealing process-Consensus, Heating, and Cooling-our method enforces consistency across shared common variables and progressively constrains each pairwise data distribution to lie on a learnable manifold, while maintaining high likelihood within each pair. We demonstrate the framework's flexibility and efficacy on two distinct scientific tasks: flow-field completion and antibody generation. All datasets and code will be made publicly available upon publication.

</details>


### [718] [Distilling and Adapting: A Topology-Aware Framework for Zero-Shot Interaction Prediction in Multiplex Biological Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06618)
*Alana Deng,Sugitha Janarthanan,Yan Sun,Zihao Jing,Pingzhao Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出一个用于多路生物网络的零样本交互预测框架，通过上下文感知表示学习和知识蒸馏解决现有方法在建模多路性、整合结构序列信息以及零样本预测方面的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在建模多路生物网络时存在三个主要问题：1) 对多路性建模不足；2) 难以整合结构信息和序列信息；3) 对于没有先验邻域信息的未见实体难以进行零样本预测。这些限制阻碍了对复杂生物系统的深入理解。

Method: 提出一个包含四个关键组件的框架：1) 利用领域特定的基础模型生成丰富的嵌入表示；2) 引入拓扑感知的图分词器来捕获多路性和高阶连接性；3) 使用对比学习对齐不同模态的嵌入；4) 采用师生蒸馏策略实现鲁棒的零样本泛化。

Result: 实验结果表明，该框架在多路生物网络的交互预测任务上优于现有最先进方法，为探索各种生物相互作用和推进个性化治疗提供了强大工具。

Conclusion: 该研究提出的框架成功解决了多路生物网络中的零样本交互预测问题，通过结合基础模型、拓扑感知表示和知识蒸馏，实现了对未见实体的有效预测，对生物信息学和个性化医疗有重要价值。

Abstract: Multiplex Biological Networks (MBNs), which represent multiple interaction types between entities, are crucial for understanding complex biological systems. Yet, existing methods often inadequately model multiplexity, struggle to integrate structural and sequence information, and face difficulties in zero-shot prediction for unseen entities with no prior neighbourhood information. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework for zero-shot interaction prediction in MBNs by leveraging context-aware representation learning and knowledge distillation. Our approach leverages domain-specific foundation models to generate enriched embeddings, introduces a topology-aware graph tokenizer to capture multiplexity and higher-order connectivity, and employs contrastive learning to align embeddings across modalities. A teacher-student distillation strategy further enables robust zero-shot generalization. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods in interaction prediction for MBNs, providing a powerful tool for exploring various biological interactions and advancing personalized therapeutics.

</details>


### [719] [Geodesic Gradient Descent: A Generic and Learning-rate-free Optimizer on Objective Function-induced Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06651)
*Liwei Hu,Guangyao Li,Wenyong Wang,Xiaoming Zhang,Yu Xiang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种称为测地梯度下降（GGD）的无学习率黎曼梯度下降算法，通过使用n维球面近似目标函数诱导的超曲面局部邻域，确保更新轨迹保持在超曲面上，无需学习率调参。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 欧几里得梯度下降算法难以捕捉目标函数诱导超曲面的几何结构，可能导致更新轨迹偏离超曲面；黎曼梯度下降算法虽然解决了这些问题，但无法通过单一经典流形表示复杂超曲面。

Method: GGD在每次迭代中使用n维球面近似目标函数诱导超曲面的局部邻域，将欧几里得梯度导出的切向量投影到球面上形成测地线，确保更新轨迹保持在超曲面上。参数更新使用测地线端点，最大步长等于n维球面上弧长的四分之一，因此无需学习率。

Result: 在Burgers'数据集上，相比经典Adam算法，GGD在全连接网络上实现测试MSE降低35.79%到48.76%；在MNIST数据集上，卷积神经网络的交叉熵损失降低3.14%到11.59%。

Conclusion: GGD是一种通用、无学习率的黎曼梯度下降算法，能够适应任意复杂的几何结构，在保持更新轨迹在超曲面上的同时，显著提升优化性能。

Abstract: Euclidean gradient descent algorithms barely capture the geometry of objective function-induced hypersurfaces and risk driving update trajectories off the hypersurfaces. Riemannian gradient descent algorithms address these issues but fail to represent complex hypersurfaces via a single classic manifold. We propose geodesic gradient descent (GGD), a generic and learning-rate-free Riemannian gradient descent algorithm. At each iteration, GGD uses an n-dimensional sphere to approximate a local neighborhood on the objective function-induced hypersurface, adapting to arbitrarily complex geometries. A tangent vector derived from the Euclidean gradient is projected onto the sphere to form a geodesic, ensuring the update trajectory stays on the hypersurface. Parameter updates are performed using the endpoint of the geodesic. The maximum step size of the gradient in GGD is equal to a quarter of the arc length on the n-dimensional sphere, thus eliminating the need for a learning rate. Experimental results show that compared with the classic Adam algorithm, GGD achieves test MSE reductions ranging from 35.79% to 48.76% for fully connected networks on the Burgers' dataset, and cross-entropy loss reductions ranging from 3.14% to 11.59% for convolutional neural networks on the MNIST dataset.

</details>


### [720] [ERP-RiskBench: Leakage-Safe Ensemble Learning for Financial Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06671)
*Sanjay Mishra*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于ERP系统财务风险检测的重建实验框架，通过集成机器学习方法，结合混合风险定义（采购合规异常和交易欺诈），并构建了包含合成数据的ERP-RiskBench基准数据集，采用防泄漏的嵌套交叉验证，最终堆叠集成模型取得了最佳检测效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ERP系统中的财务风险检测是机器学习的重要但未充分探索的应用领域。现有研究存在数据集描述模糊、易泄漏的流程以及夸大报告性能的评估实践等问题，需要建立一个可重复、操作性强且防泄漏的实验框架。

Method: 1) 构建ERP-RiskBench基准数据集：结合公共采购事件日志、标记的欺诈数据以及带有规则注入风险类型和条件表格GAN增强的合成ERP数据集；2) 采用嵌套交叉验证：包含时间感知和组感知分割以防止数据泄漏；3) 主要模型为梯度提升方法的堆叠集成，同时测试线性基线、深度表格架构和可解释的透明替代方案；4) 使用SHAP解释和特征稳定性分析。

Result: 堆叠集成模型在多个数据集配置和结构化消融研究中取得了最佳检测结果。防泄漏协议显著降低了先前夸大的准确率估计。SHAP解释和特征稳定性分析显示，采购控制特征（特别是三方匹配差异）是最具信息量的预测因子。

Conclusion: 该框架为ERP审计和治理环境中的机器学习部署提供了一个可重复、操作性强且防泄漏的蓝图，解决了现有研究中的关键方法学缺陷，并强调了采购控制特征在财务风险检测中的重要性。

Abstract: Financial risk detection in Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems is an important but underexplored application of machine learning. Published studies in this area tend to suffer from vague dataset descriptions, leakage-prone pipelines, and evaluation practices that inflate reported performance. This paper presents a rebuilt experimental framework for ERP financial risk detection using ensemble machine learning. The risk definition is hybrid, covering both procurement compliance anomalies and transactional fraud. A composite benchmark called ERP-RiskBench is assembled from public procurement event logs, labeled fraud data, and a new synthetic ERP dataset with rule-injected risk typologies and conditional tabular GAN augmentation. Nested cross-validation with time-aware and group-aware splitting enforces leakage prevention throughout the pipeline. The primary model is a stacking ensemble of gradient boosting methods, tested alongside linear baselines, deep tabular architectures, and an interpretable glassbox alternative. Performance is measured through Matthews Correlation Coefficient, area under the precision-recall curve, and cost-sensitive decision analysis using calibrated probabilities. Across multiple dataset configurations and a structured ablation study, the stacking ensemble achieves the best detection results. Leakage-safe protocols reduce previously inflated accuracy estimates by a notable margin. SHAP-based explanations and feature stability analysis show that procurement control features, especially three-way matching discrepancies, rank as the most informative predictors. The resulting framework provides a reproducible, operationally grounded blueprint for machine learning deployment in ERP audit and governance settings.

</details>


### [721] [One step further with Monte-Carlo sampler to guide diffusion better](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06685)
*Minsi Ren,Wenhao Deng,Ruiqi Feng,Tailin Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出ABMS方法，通过额外反向去噪步骤和蒙特卡洛采样改进SDE生成模型的引导扩散，减少后验采样误差，提升条件生成质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于SDE的条件生成方法使用后验采样时存在显著估计误差，导致引导梯度不准确和生成结果不一致，需要解决这一问题

Method: 提出ABMS方法：执行额外反向去噪步骤和蒙特卡洛采样，作为即插即用的调整策略，改善引导扩散过程

Result: 实验涵盖手写轨迹生成、图像逆问题、分子逆设计等任务，ABMS能与高阶采样器有效配合，在所有场景中一致提升生成样本质量

Conclusion: ABMS方法通过理论分析和实验验证，有效解决了现有方法中的交叉条件干扰问题，显著提升了条件生成的准确性和一致性

Abstract: Stochastic differential equation (SDE)-based generative models have achieved substantial progress in conditional generation via training-free differentiable loss-guided approaches. However, existing methodologies utilizing posterior sam- pling typically confront a substantial estimation error, which results in inaccu- rate gradients for guidance and leading to inconsistent generation results. To mitigate this issue, we propose that performing an additional backward denois- ing step and Monte-Carlo sampling (ABMS) can achieve better guided diffu- sion, which is a plug-and-play adjustment strategy. To verify the effectiveness of our method, we provide theoretical analysis and propose the adoption of a dual-focus evaluation framework, which further serves to highlight the critical problem of cross-condition interference prevalent in existing approaches. We conduct experiments across various task settings and data types, mainly includ- ing conditional online handwritten trajectory generation, image inverse problems (inpainting, super resolution and gaussian deblurring) molecular inverse design and so on. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can be effec- tively used with higher order samplers and consistently improves the quality of generation samples across all the different scenarios.

</details>


### [722] [Heterogeneous Decentralized Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06741)
*Zhiying Jiang,Raihan Seraj,Marcos Villagra,Bidhan Roy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出高效去中心化扩散模型框架，支持异构训练目标，将计算需求从1176GPU天降至72GPU天，数据需求从1.58亿降至1100万，同时提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前前沿扩散模型训练需要大量集中计算资源，限制了研究参与。现有去中心化扩散模型方法计算成本高且要求同质训练目标，需要更高效支持异构目标的框架。

Method: 1) 异构去中心化训练范式，允许专家使用不同目标(DDPM和Flow Matching)，通过确定性调度感知转换统一到共同速度空间；2) 预训练检查点从ImageNet-DDPM转换到Flow Matching目标，加速收敛；3) 采用PixArt-alpha的AdaLN-Single架构减少参数。

Result: 计算需求降低16倍(1176→72GPU天)，数据需求降低14倍(158M→11M)。异构配置(2DDPM:6FM)比同质基线(8FM)获得更好的FID(11.88 vs 12.45)和更高的提示内多样性(LPIPS 0.631 vs 0.617)。

Conclusion: 该框架通过消除同步要求和支持混合DDPM/FM目标，降低了去中心化生成模型训练的基础设施需求，使更多机构能够参与前沿扩散模型研究。

Abstract: Training frontier-scale diffusion models often requires substantial computational resources concentrated in tightly coupled clusters, limiting participation to well-resourced institutions. While Decentralized Diffusion Models (DDM) enable training multiple experts in isolation, existing approaches require 1176 GPU-days and homogeneous training objectives across all experts. We present an efficient framework that reduces resource requirements while supporting heterogeneous training objectives. Our approach combines three contributions: (1) a heterogeneous decentralized training paradigm that allows experts to use different objectives (DDPM and Flow Matching), unified at inference time via a deterministic schedule-aware conversion into a common velocity space without retraining; (2) pretrained checkpoint conversion from ImageNet-DDPM to Flow Matching objectives, accelerating convergence and enabling initialization without objective-specific pretraining; and (3) PixArt-alpha's efficient AdaLN-Single architecture, reducing parameters while maintaining quality. Experiments on LAION-Aesthetics show that, relative to the training scale reported for prior DDM work, our approach reduces compute from 1176 to 72 GPU-days (16x) and data from 158M to 11M (14x). Under aligned inference settings, our heterogeneous 2DDPM:6FM configuration achieves better FID (11.88 vs. 12.45) and higher intra-prompt diversity (LPIPS 0.631 vs. 0.617) than the homogeneous 8FM baseline. By eliminating synchronization requirements and enabling mixed DDPM/FM objectives, our framework lowers infrastructure requirements for decentralized generative model training.

</details>


### [723] [Interpretable Maximum Margin Deep Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07073)
*Zhiji Yang,Mei Huang,Xinyu Li,Xianli Pan,Qi Wang,Jianhua Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: IMD-AD是一种可解释的最大边际深度异常检测方法，解决了Deep SVDD的缺陷，通过利用少量标记异常和最大边际目标来稳定训练，提供内在可解释性和可视化输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Deep SVDD作为重要的深度单类方法存在三个主要问题：1) 对超球体坍塌的脆弱性；2) 依赖启发式选择超球体参数；3) 可解释性有限。需要一种更稳定、可解释且性能更好的异常检测方法。

Method: 提出IMD-AD方法：1) 利用少量标记异常和最大边际目标来稳定训练和提高判别能力；2) 证明超球体参数与网络最后一层权重的等价性，使中心和半径能够端到端学习；3) 开发联合优化表示、边际和最后一层参数的高效训练算法。

Result: 在图像和表格基准测试上的广泛实验和消融研究表明，IMD-AD在检测性能上优于多个最先进的基线方法，同时提供可解释的决策诊断。

Conclusion: IMD-AD解决了Deep SVDD的关键缺陷，通过最大边际框架和端到端参数学习实现了稳定的训练、改进的性能和内在的可解释性，为深度异常检测提供了新的有效方法。

Abstract: Anomaly detection is a crucial machine-learning task with wide-ranging applications. Deep Support Vector Data Description (Deep SVDD) is a prominent deep one-class method, but it is vulnerable to hypersphere collapse, often relies on heuristic choices for hypersphere parameters, and provides limited interpretability. To address these issues, we propose Interpretable Maximum Margin Deep Anomaly Detection (IMD-AD), which leverages a small set of labeled anomalies and a maximum margin objective to stabilize training and improve discrimination. It is inherently resilient to hypersphere collapse. Furthermore, we prove an equivalence between hypersphere parameters and the network's final-layer weights, which allows the center and radius to be learned end-to-end as part of the model and yields intrinsic interpretability and visualizable outputs. We further develop an efficient training algorithm that jointly optimizes representation, margin, and final-layer parameters. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on image and tabular benchmarks demonstrate that IMD-AD empirically improves detection performance over several state-of-the-art baselines while providing interpretable decision diagnostics.

</details>


### [724] [Cost-Driven Representation Learning for Linear Quadratic Gaussian Control: Part II](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07437)
*Yi Tian,Kaiqing Zhang,Russ Tedrake,Suvrit Sra*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究从部分高维观测中学习状态表示用于控制的问题，通过成本驱动的状态表示学习方法，在潜在状态空间中学习预测累积成本的动态模型，为无限时域时不变LQG控制提供有限样本保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究从部分和高维观测中学习状态表示用于控制的问题，特别是在强化学习环境中，如何从原始观测中提取有效的状态表示以实现更好的控制性能。

Method: 提出成本驱动的状态表示学习方法，学习潜在状态空间中的动态模型来预测累积成本。研究两种方法：显式学习潜在状态转移函数（Part I中研究过）和隐式学习（类似MuZero方法）。关键技术创新是证明了新随机过程的持续激励性。

Result: 为无限时域时不变LQG控制建立了有限样本保证，证明能够找到接近最优的表示函数和控制器。分析了两种成本驱动表示学习方法，其中隐式方法类似于MuZero的突破性方法。

Conclusion: 成本驱动的状态表示学习是有效的，能够从部分观测中学习到有用的状态表示，为强化学习中的表示学习提供了理论保证，特别是隐式学习方法与MuZero的相似性具有重要意义。

Abstract: We study the problem of state representation learning for control from partial and potentially high-dimensional observations. We approach this problem via cost-driven state representation learning, in which we learn a dynamical model in a latent state space by predicting cumulative costs. In particular, we establish finite-sample guarantees on finding a near-optimal representation function and a near-optimal controller using the learned latent model for infinite-horizon time-invariant Linear Quadratic Gaussian (LQG) control. We study two approaches to cost-driven representation learning, which differ in whether the transition function of the latent state is learned explicitly or implicitly. The first approach has also been investigated in Part I of this work, for finite-horizon time-varying LQG control. The second approach closely resembles MuZero, a recent breakthrough in empirical reinforcement learning, in that it learns latent dynamics implicitly by predicting cumulative costs. A key technical contribution of this Part II is to prove persistency of excitation for a new stochastic process that arises from the analysis of quadratic regression in our approach, and may be of independent interest.

</details>


### [725] [Constraints Matrix Diffusion based Generative Neural Solver for Vehicle Routing Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07568)
*Zhenwei Wang,Tiehua Zhang,Ning Xue,Ender Ozcan,Ling Wang,Ruibin Bai*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出融合神经网络框架，使用离散噪声图扩散模型学习VRP约束，生成约束分配矩阵，自适应集成到自回归求解器中，在CVRPlib数据集上实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于注意力的神经求解器在异构问题参数分布上鲁棒性有限，在节点表示高度相似或长决策视野任务中性能显著下降，且改进主要局限于固定分布基准。

Method: 提出融合神经网络框架：1) 使用离散噪声图扩散模型学习VRP底层约束，生成约束分配矩阵；2) 将该矩阵自适应集成到特征表示学习和自回归求解器决策过程中，作为图结构掩码；3) 在CVRPlib数据集的378组合空间上进行全面实验。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上实现最先进性能，有效捕获和利用问题约束，解决了现有方法在异构分布、相似节点和长决策视野下的性能下降问题。

Conclusion: 提出的融合框架通过约束分配矩阵实现了全局视野与局部特征的有效整合，显著提升了神经求解器在车辆路径问题上的鲁棒性和性能。

Abstract: Over the past decade, neural network solvers powered by generative artificial intelligence have garnered significant attention in the domain of vehicle routing problems (VRPs), owing to their exceptional computational efficiency and superior reasoning capabilities. In particular, autoregressive solvers integrated with reinforcement learning have emerged as a prominent trend. However, much of the existing work emphasizes large-scale generalization of neural approaches while neglecting the limited robustness of attention-based methods across heterogeneous distributions of problem parameters. Their improvements over heuristic search remain largely restricted to hand-curated, fixed-distribution benchmarks. Furthermore, these architectures tend to degrade significantly when node representations are highly similar or when tasks involve long decision horizons. To address the aforementioned limitations, we propose a novel fusion neural network framework that employs a discrete noise graph diffusion model to learn the underlying constraints of vehicle routing problems and generate a constraint assignment matrix. This matrix is subsequently integrated adaptively into the feature representation learning and decision process of the autoregressive solver, serving as a graph structure mask that facilitates the formation of solutions characterized by both global vision and local feature integration. To the best of our knowledge, this work represents the first comprehensive experimental investigation of neural network model solvers across a 378-combinatorial space spanning four distinct dimensions within the CVRPlib public dataset. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that our proposed fusion model effectively captures and leverages problem constraints, achieving state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmark datasets.

</details>


### [726] [Bayesian Transformer for Probabilistic Load Forecasting in Smart Grids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07899)
*Sajib Debnath,Md. Uzzal Mia*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出贝叶斯Transformer框架，集成三种不确定性机制到PatchTST骨干中，用于电力负荷概率预测，在极端天气分布偏移下实现校准良好的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代电网可靠运行需要具有良好校准不确定性估计的概率负荷预测。现有深度学习模型产生过度自信的点预测，在极端天气分布偏移下表现灾难性失败。

Method: 提出贝叶斯Transformer框架，在PatchTST骨干中集成：1) Monte Carlo Dropout用于认知参数不确定性；2) 具有对数均匀权重先验的变分前馈层；3) 在pre-softmax logits上添加可学习高斯噪声扰动的随机注意力机制。使用七级多分位数pinball损失预测头和训练后等渗回归校准。

Result: 在五个电网数据集(PJM、ERCOT、ENTSO-E德国、法国、英国)上评估，在主要基准(PJM, H=24h)上达到CRPS 0.0289，比深度集成提升7.4%，比确定性LSTM提升29.9%。在90%名义水平下PICP达到90.4%，预测区间最窄(4,960 MW)。在热浪和寒潮事件中保持89.6%和90.1% PICP。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯Transformer框架通过集成多种不确定性机制，在电力负荷概率预测中实现了校准良好、尖锐的预测区间，特别是在极端天气分布偏移下表现出色，支持基于风险的备用容量规划、随机机组组合和需求响应激活。

Abstract: The reliable operation of modern power grids requires probabilistic load forecasts with well-calibrated uncertainty estimates. However, existing deep learning models produce overconfident point predictions that fail catastrophically under extreme weather distributional shifts. This study proposes a Bayesian Transformer (BT) framework that integrates three complementary uncertainty mechanisms into a PatchTST backbone: Monte Carlo Dropout for epistemic parameter uncertainty, variational feed-forward layers with log-uniform weight priors, and stochastic attention with learnable Gaussian noise perturbations on pre-softmax logits, representing, to the best of our knowledge, the first application of Bayesian attention to probabilistic load forecasting. A seven-level multi-quantile pinball-loss prediction head and post-training isotonic regression calibration produce sharp, near-nominally covered prediction intervals. Evaluation of five grid datasets (PJM, ERCOT, ENTSO-E Germany, France, and Great Britain) augmented with NOAA covariates across 24, 48, and 168-hour horizons demonstrates state-of-the-art performance. On the primary benchmark (PJM, H=24h), BT achieves a CRPS of 0.0289, improving 7.4% over Deep Ensembles and 29.9% over the deterministic LSTM, with 90.4% PICP at the 90% nominal level and the narrowest prediction intervals (4,960 MW) among all probabilistic baselines. During heat-wave and cold snap events, BT maintained 89.6% and 90.1% PICP respectively, versus 64.7% and 67.2% for the deterministic LSTM, confirming that Bayesian epistemic uncertainty naturally widens intervals for out-of-distribution inputs. Calibration remained stable across all horizons (89.8-90.4% PICP), while ablation confirmed that each component contributed a distinct value. The calibrated outputs directly support risk-based reserve sizing, stochastic unit commitment, and demand response activation.

</details>


### [727] [Training event-based neural networks with exact gradients via Differentiable ODE Solving in JAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08146)
*Lukas König,Manuel Kuhn,David Kappel,Anand Subramoney*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: Eventax是一个基于JAX的脉冲神经网络训练框架，通过结合可微分数值ODE求解器和基于事件的脉冲处理，解决了现有梯度训练方法在离散时间与连续时间之间的权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络梯度训练框架存在权衡：离散时间方法使用替代梯度支持任意神经元模型但引入梯度偏差并限制脉冲时间分辨率；连续时间方法计算精确梯度但需要脉冲时间和状态演化的解析表达式，仅限于简单神经元类型如LIF。需要一种既能支持任意神经元模型又能计算精确梯度的框架。

Method: 基于JAX构建，结合可微分数值ODE求解器（Diffrax）和基于事件的脉冲处理。用户只需指定神经元动力学、脉冲条件和重置规则。支持任意由ODE定义的神经元模型，计算相对于前向模拟的精确梯度。

Result: 在多个基准测试（Yin-Yang、MNIST）上展示了Eventax的实用性，支持多种神经元模型（LIF、QIF、EIF、Izhikevich、EGRU）和损失函数。还实现了使用人类皮层锥体神经元树突脉冲模型的多室神经元。

Conclusion: Eventax通过结合可微分ODE求解和事件处理，为脉冲神经网络提供了建模灵活性、精确梯度和易扩展性，适用于原型设计和测试基于事件的架构。

Abstract: Existing frameworks for gradient-based training of spiking neural networks face a trade-off: discrete-time methods using surrogate gradients support arbitrary neuron models but introduce gradient bias and constrain spike-time resolution, while continuous-time methods that compute exact gradients require analytical expressions for spike times and state evolution, restricting them to simple neuron types such as Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF). We introduce the Eventax framework, which resolves this trade-off by combining differentiable numerical ODE solvers with event-based spike handling. Built in JAX, our frame-work uses Diffrax ODE-solvers to compute gradients that are exact with respect to the forward simulation for any neuron model defined by ODEs . It also provides a simple API where users can specify just the neuron dynamics, spike conditions, and reset rules. Eventax prioritises modelling flexibility, supporting a wide range of neuron models, loss functions, and network architectures, which can be easily extended. We demonstrate Eventax on multiple benchmarks, including Yin-Yang and MNIST, using diverse neuron models such as Leaky Integrate-and-fire (LIF), Quadratic Integrate-and-fire (QIF), Exponential integrate-and-fire (EIF), Izhikevich and Event-based Gated Recurrent Unit (EGRU) with both time-to-first-spike and state-based loss functions, demonstrating its utility for prototyping and testing event-based architectures trained with exact gradients. We also demonstrate the application of this framework for more complex neuron types by implementing a multi-compartment neuron that uses a model of dendritic spikes in human layer 2/3 cortical Pyramidal neurons for computation. Code available at https://github.com/efficient-scalable-machine-learning/eventax.

</details>


### [728] [SCL-GNN: Towards Generalizable Graph Neural Networks via Spurious Correlation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08270)
*Yuxiang Zhang,Enyan Dai*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出SCL-GNN框架，通过HSIC度量学习虚假相关性，增强GNN在IID和OOD图上的泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GNN在训练数据中容易利用节点特征与标签之间的虚假统计相关性，这些相关性对预测不可靠，限制了模型的泛化能力，特别是在分布偏移情况下

Method: 提出SCL-GNN框架，包含：1) 基于Hilbert-Schmidt独立性准则(HSIC)的虚假相关性学习机制，量化节点表示与类别分数之间的相关性；2) 双层优化策略，联合优化模块和GNN参数以防止过拟合

Result: 在真实世界和合成数据集上的实验表明，SCL-GNN在各种分布偏移下持续优于最先进的基线方法，展示了其鲁棒性和泛化能力

Conclusion: SCL-GNN通过系统性地学习和缓解虚假相关性，有效提升了GNN在IID和OOD图上的泛化性能，为解决图神经网络中的虚假相关性问题提供了新思路

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated remarkable success across diverse tasks. However, their generalization capability is often hindered by spurious correlations between node features and labels in the graph. Our analysis reveals that GNNs tend to exploit imperceptible statistical correlations in training data, even when such correlations are unreliable for prediction. To address this challenge, we propose the Spurious Correlation Learning Graph Neural Network (SCL-GNN), a novel framework designed to enhance generalization on both Independent and Identically Distributed (IID) and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) graphs. SCL-GNN incorporates a principled spurious correlation learning mechanism, leveraging the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to quantify correlations between node representations and class scores. This enables the model to identify and mitigate irrelevant but influential spurious correlations effectively. Additionally, we introduce an efficient bi-level optimization strategy to jointly optimize modules and GNN parameters, preventing overfitting. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that SCL-GNN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines under various distribution shifts, highlighting its robustness and generalization capabilities.

</details>


### [729] [Integral Formulas for Vector Spherical Tensor Products](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08630)
*Valentin Heyraud,Zachary Weller-Davies,Jules Tilly*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文推导了向量球面张量积的积分公式，简化了Xie等人提出的方法，获得了反对称Gaunt系数的闭式表达式，实现了Clebsch-Gordan张量积的9倍计算量减少，为SO(3)-等变神经网络提供了高效实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 向量球面张量积是Gaunt张量积的推广，但现有实现复杂且计算量大。作者旨在简化该张量积的计算，为SO(3)-等变神经网络提供高效实用的实现方法。

Method: 推导积分公式简化向量球面张量积，获得反对称Gaunt系数的显式闭式表达式，通过单一向量球面张量积模拟Clebsch-Gordan张量积，并研究张量积归一化的低秩分解。

Result: 实现了Clebsch-Gordan张量积的9倍计算量减少，提供了向量球面张量积的高效实现方法，能够控制表达力与运行时间的权衡，为等变神经网络应用铺平道路。

Conclusion: 该工作简化了向量球面张量积的计算，使其在SO(3)-等变神经网络中更加实用高效，为等变神经网络架构设计提供了新的数学工具。

Abstract: We derive integral formulas that simplify the Vector Spherical Tensor Product recently introduced by Xie et al., which generalizes the Gaunt tensor product to antisymmetric couplings. In particular, we obtain explicit closed-form expressions for the antisymmetric analogues of the Gaunt coefficients. This enables us to simulate the Clebsch-Gordan tensor product using a single Vector Spherical Tensor Product, yielding a $9\times$ reduction in the required tensor product evaluations. Our results enable efficient and practical implementations of the Vector Spherical Tensor Product, paving the way for applications of this generalization of Gaunt tensor products in $\mathrm{SO}(3)$-equivariant neural networks. Moreover, we discuss how the Gaunt and the Vector Spherical Tensor Products allow to control the expressivity-runtime tradeoff associated with the usual Clebsch-Gordan Tensor Products. Finally, we investigate low rank decompositions of the normalizations of the considered tensor products in view of their use in equivariant neural networks.

</details>


### [730] [Divide and Predict: An Architecture for Input Space Partitioning and Enhanced Accuracy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08649)
*Fenix W. Huang,Henning S. Mortveit,Christian M. Reidys*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出一种量化监督学习训练数据异质性的内在度量方法，该度量基于训练点对影响的随机变量方差，可用于评估样本是否为混合分布，并通过数据净化提升测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练数据的异质性（heterogeneity）对模型性能有重要影响，但缺乏内在的量化方法。现有方法通常依赖外部知识或假设，作者希望开发一种仅从数据本身就能量化异质性的度量。

Method: 提出一种基于训练点对影响的随机变量方差作为异质性度量。该方法通过分析数据本身的信息来支持分区成块，证明方差最大时对应分布的均匀混合。采用方差驱动的数据净化后，在块上进行常规训练。

Result: 在EMNIST图像数据和合成数据上的概念验证研究表明，方差与异质性之间存在量化关联。方差驱动的数据净化结合块训练能显著提高测试准确率。

Conclusion: 数据本身包含支持分区的关键信息，提出的方差度量能有效量化数据异质性，基于此的数据净化方法能提升监督学习性能。

Abstract: In this article the authors develop an intrinsic measure for quantifying heterogeneity in training data for supervised learning. This measure is the variance of a random variable which factors through the influences of pairs of training points. The variance is shown to capture data heterogeneity and can thus be used to assess if a sample is a mixture of distributions. The authors prove that the data itself contains key information that supports a partitioning into blocks. Several proof of concept studies are provided that quantify the connection between variance and heterogeneity for EMNIST image data and synthetic data. The authors establish that variance is maximal for equal mixes of distributions, and detail how variance-based data purification followed by conventional training over blocks can lead to significant increases in test accuracy.

</details>


### [731] [T-REX: Transformer-Based Category Sequence Generation for Grocery Basket Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06631)
*Soroush Mokhtari,Muhammad Tayyab Asif,Sergiy Zubatiy*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: T-REX：针对在线杂货购物的新型Transformer架构，通过捕捉短期购物篮依赖和长期用户偏好，生成个性化品类级推荐


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线杂货购物具有重复购买模式和复杂商品关系的独特挑战，需要同时捕捉互补商品关联和跨购物会话的时间依赖，而传统推荐方法（如BERT4Rec）在下一购物篮生成中存在信息泄露问题

Method: 提出T-REX架构，包含三个关键创新：1）针对稀疏购物模式的动态序列分割采样策略；2）适应时间模式的自适应位置编码方案；3）降低维度同时保持推荐质量的品类级建模方法，采用因果掩码方法而非掩码语言建模

Result: 在大规模杂货离线数据和在线A/B测试中，相比现有系统显示出显著改进

Conclusion: T-REX通过因果掩码方法更好地适应购物篮生成的序列性质，在在线杂货推荐任务中实现了更准确的下一购物篮预测

Abstract: Online grocery shopping presents unique challenges for sequential recommendations due to repetitive purchase patterns and complex item relationships within the baskets. Unlike traditional e-commerce, grocery recommendations must capture both complementary item associations and temporal dependencies across shopping sessions. To address these challenges in Amazon's online grocery business, we propose T-REX, a novel transformer architecture that generates personalized category-level suggestions by learning both short-term basket dependencies and long-term user preferences. Our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) an efficient sampling strategy utilizing dynamic sequence splitting for sparse shopping patterns, (2) an adaptive positional encoding scheme for temporal patterns, and (3) a category-level modeling approach that reduces dimensionality while maintaining recommendation quality. Although masked language modeling techniques like BERT4Rec excel at capturing item relations, they prove less suitable for next basket generation due to information leakage issues. In contrast, T-REX's causal masking approach better aligns with the sequential nature of basket generation, enabling more accurate next-basket predictions. Experiments on large-scale grocery offline data and online A/B tests show significant improvement over existing systems.

</details>


### [732] [Beyond ReinMax: Low-Variance Gradient Estimators for Discrete Latent Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08257)
*Daniel Wang,Thang D. Bui*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了ReinMax-Rao和ReinMax-CV两种梯度估计器，通过Rao-Blackwellisation和控制变量技术降低ReinMax的方差，在离散潜变量VAE训练中表现优异，并从数值积分角度重新审视ReinMax。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散潜变量的机器学习模型需要高效的梯度估计器进行反向传播。现有的ReinMax估计器虽然通过Heun方法减少了偏差，但方差较高，需要改进。

Method: 提出了两种新的梯度估计器：1) ReinMax-Rao：结合Rao-Blackwellisation技术降低方差；2) ReinMax-CV：使用控制变量技术减少方差。同时从数值积分角度重新分析ReinMax。

Result: 新估计器在训练离散潜变量的变分自编码器时表现出优越性能，有效降低了ReinMax的方差问题。

Conclusion: 通过Rao-Blackwellisation和控制变量技术可以有效改进ReinMax估计器，为离散潜变量模型的梯度估计提供了更好的解决方案。

Abstract: Machine learning models involving discrete latent variables require gradient estimators to facilitate backpropagation in a computationally efficient manner. The most recent addition to the Straight-Through family of estimators, ReinMax, can be viewed from a numerical ODE perspective as incorporating an approximation via Heun's method to reduce bias, but at the cost of high variance. In this work, we introduce the ReinMax-Rao and ReinMax-CV estimators which incorporate Rao-Blackwellisation and control variate techniques into ReinMax to reduce its variance. Our estimators demonstrate superior performance on training variational autoencoders with discrete latent spaces. Furthermore, we investigate the possibility of leveraging alternative numerical methods for constructing more accurate gradient approximations and present an alternative view of ReinMax from a simpler numerical integration perspective.

</details>


### [733] [Adaptive Double-Booking Strategy for Outpatient Scheduling Using Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07270)
*Ninda Nurseha Amalina,Heungjo An*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出自适应门诊双预约框架，整合个体化爽约预测与多目标强化学习，通过多策略PPO和协同进化机制优化预约决策


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 患者爽约会扰乱门诊运营、降低效率并延误必要治疗。现有方法依赖固定启发式规则，无法适应实时调度条件或患者特定爽约风险，需要更智能的调度解决方案

Method: 1) 将调度问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程；2) 使用多头注意力软随机森林模型预测患者级爽约概率；3) 开发带多策略协同进化机制的多策略PPO方法；4) 基于KL散度的τ规则实现策略间选择性知识迁移；5) 使用SHAP解释爽约风险和调度决策

Result: 提出的框架能够动态决定单预约、双预约或拒绝预约请求，为传统门诊调度策略提供数据驱动的替代方案，改善收敛性和权衡多样性

Conclusion: 该自适应门诊双预约框架整合了个体化爽约预测和多目标强化学习，通过创新的多策略协同进化机制，为门诊调度提供了更智能、数据驱动的解决方案

Abstract: Patient no-shows disrupt outpatient clinic operations, reduce productivity, and may delay necessary care. Clinics often adopt overbooking or double-booking to mitigate these effects. However, poorly calibrated policies can increase congestion and waiting times. Most existing methods rely on fixed heuristics and fail to adapt to real-time scheduling conditions or patient-specific no-show risk. To address these limitations, we propose an adaptive outpatient double-booking framework that integrates individualized no-show prediction with multi-objective reinforcement learning. The scheduling problem is formulated as a Markov decision process, and patient-level no-show probabilities estimated by a Multi-Head Attention Soft Random Forest model are incorporated in the reinforcement learning state. We develop a Multi-Policy Proximal Policy Optimization method equipped with a Multi-Policy Co-Evolution Mechanism. Under this mechanism, we propose a novel τ rule based on Kullback-Leibler divergence that enables selective knowledge transfer among behaviorally similar policies, improving convergence and expanding the diversity of trade-offs. In addition, SHapley Additive exPlanations is used to interpret both the predicted no-show risk and the agent's scheduling decisions. The proposed framework determines when to single-book, double-book, or reject appointment requests, providing a dynamic and data-driven alternative to conventional outpatient scheduling policies.

</details>


### [734] [Hide and Find: A Distributed Adversarial Attack on Federated Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07743)
*Jinshan Liu,Ken Li,Jiazhe Wei,Bin Shi,Bo Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: FedShift：一种新颖的两阶段联邦图学习对抗攻击方法，通过"隐藏-寻找"策略实现高攻击成功率、强隐蔽性和高效率，能有效规避主流防御算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦图学习容易受到恶意攻击，但现有攻击方法存在攻击成功率低、计算成本高、容易被防御算法识别和缓解等问题。需要开发更有效、更隐蔽的攻击方法。

Method: 提出FedShift两阶段攻击框架：第一阶段在联邦学习开始前，向部分训练数据注入可学习的隐藏"移位器"，将中毒图表示推向目标类决策边界但不跨越，确保训练隐蔽性；第二阶段在联邦学习完成后，利用全局模型信息和隐藏移位器作为优化起点，高效找到对抗扰动，最后聚合多个恶意客户端的扰动形成最终对抗样本。

Result: 在六个大规模数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有先进攻击方法具有最高的攻击有效性，能有效规避3种主流鲁棒联邦学习防御算法，收敛时间成本降低超过90%。

Conclusion: FedShift在隐蔽性、鲁棒性和效率方面表现出色，为联邦图学习的安全研究提供了重要参考，揭示了现有防御机制的潜在脆弱性。

Abstract: Federated Graph Learning (FedGL) is vulnerable to malicious attacks, yet developing a truly effective and stealthy attack method remains a significant challenge. Existing attack methods suffer from low attack success rates, high computational costs, and are easily identified and smoothed by defense algorithms. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{FedShift}, a novel two-stage "Hide and Find" distributed adversarial attack. In the first stage, before FedGL begins, we inject a learnable and hidden "shifter" into part of the training data, which subtly pushes poisoned graph representations toward a target class's decision boundary without crossing it, ensuring attack stealthiness during training. In the second stage, after FedGL is complete, we leverage the global model information and use the hidden shifter as an optimization starting point to efficiently find the adversarial perturbations. During the final attack, we aggregate these perturbations from multiple malicious clients to form the final effective adversarial sample and trigger the attack. Extensive experiments on six large-scale datasets demonstrate that our method achieves the highest attack effectiveness compared to existing advanced attack methods. In particular, our attack can effectively evade 3 mainstream robust federated learning defense algorithms and converges with a time cost reduction of over 90\%, highlighting its exceptional stealthiness, robustness, and efficiency.

</details>


### [735] [Amortizing Maximum Inner Product Search with Learned Support Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08001)
*Theo X. Olausson,João Monteiro,Michal Klein,Marco Cuturi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出基于学习的摊销MIPS方法，通过神经网络直接预测最大内积搜索的解，针对固定查询分布和键集，分摊计算成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最大内积搜索是机器学习中的关键子程序，传统方法计算成本高。针对固定查询分布和键集，可以通过学习预测MIPS解来摊销计算成本

Method: 提出两种互补方法：1) SupportNet：使用输入凸神经网络直接建模支持函数，通过自动微分梯度计算恢复最优键；2) KeyNet：使用向量值网络直接从查询回归最优键，绕过梯度计算。引入同质化包装器和分数一致性损失

Result: 实验表明，学习到的SupportNet或KeyNet能够实现高匹配率，并为针对特定查询分布的数据库压缩开辟了新方向

Conclusion: 摊销MIPS方法通过神经网络预测MIPS解，有效分摊计算成本，为数据库压缩和高效检索提供了新思路

Abstract: Maximum inner product search (MIPS) is a crucial subroutine in machine learning, requiring the identification of key vectors that align best with a given query. We propose amortized MIPS: a learning-based approach that trains neural networks to directly predict MIPS solutions, amortizing the computational cost of matching queries (drawn from a fixed distribution) to a fixed set of keys. Our key insight is that the MIPS value function, the maximal inner product between a query and keys, is also known as the support function of the set of keys. Support functions are convex, 1-homogeneous and their gradient w.r.t. the query is exactly the optimal key in the database. We approximate the support function using two complementary approaches: (1) we train an input-convex neural network (SupportNet) to model the support function directly; the optimal key can be recovered via (autodiff) gradient computation, and (2) we regress directly the optimal key from the query using a vector valued network (KeyNet), bypassing gradient computation entirely at inference time. To learn a SupportNet, we combine score regression with gradient matching losses, and propose homogenization wrappers that enforce the positive 1-homogeneity of a neural network, theoretically linking function values to gradients. To train a KeyNet, we introduce a score consistency loss derived from the Euler theorem for homogeneous functions. Our experiments show that learned SupportNet or KeyNet achieve high match rates and open up new directions to compress databases with a specific query distribution in mind.

</details>


### [736] [Khatri-Rao Clustering for Data Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06602)
*Martino Ciaperoni,Collin Leiber,Aristides Gionis,Heikki Mannila*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Khatri-Rao聚类范式，通过假设质心来自多个简洁原质心集的相互作用，扩展传统基于质心的聚类，生成更简洁但同等准确的数据摘要。应用于k-Means和深度聚类，实验显示能获得更好的简洁性与准确性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着数据集规模和复杂性增长，寻找简洁准确的数据摘要成为关键挑战。传统基于质心的聚类方法（如k-Means）生成的数据摘要常包含冗余，限制了其在具有大量底层簇的数据集中的有效性。

Method: 引入Khatri-Rao聚类范式，假设质心来自两个或多个简洁原质心集的相互作用。提出了Khatri-Rao k-Means算法和Khatri-Rao深度聚类框架，扩展传统聚类方法以生成更简洁的数据摘要。

Result: 实验表明：1) Khatri-Rao k-Means比标准k-Means在数据摘要的简洁性和准确性之间取得更好的权衡；2) Khatri-Rao深度聚类框架进一步减少数据摘要大小，同时保持准确性。

Conclusion: Khatri-Rao聚类范式能有效减少数据摘要冗余，提高摘要效率，特别适用于具有大量底层簇的复杂数据集，为数据摘要提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: As datasets continue to grow in size and complexity, finding succinct yet accurate data summaries poses a key challenge. Centroid-based clustering, a widely adopted approach to address this challenge, finds informative summaries of datasets in terms of few prototypes, each representing a cluster in the data. Despite their wide adoption, the resulting data summaries often contain redundancies, limiting their effectiveness particularly in datasets characterized by a large number of underlying clusters. To overcome this limitation, we introduce the Khatri-Rao clustering paradigm that extends traditional centroid-based clustering to produce more succinct but equally accurate data summaries by postulating that centroids arise from the interaction of two or more succinct sets of protocentroids.
  We study two central approaches to centroid-based clustering, namely the well-established k-Means algorithm and the increasingly popular topic of deep clustering, under the lens of the Khatri-Rao paradigm. To this end, we introduce the Khatri-Rao k-Means algorithm and the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework. Extensive experiments show that Khatri-Rao k-Means can strike a more favorable trade-off between succinctness and accuracy in data summarization than standard k-Means. Leveraging representation learning, the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework offers even greater benefits, reducing even more the size of data summaries given by deep clustering while preserving their accuracy.

</details>


### [737] [LegoNet: Memory Footprint Reduction Through Block Weight Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06606)
*Joseph Bingham,Noah Green,Saman Zonouz*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: LegoNet是一种神经网络压缩技术，通过构建权重块并进行聚类，无需移除权重或改变架构即可实现64倍压缩且无精度损失，128倍压缩时精度损失小于3%，且无需重新训练或微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着神经网络应用对精度和性能要求的提高，模型规模和内存占用不断增长，这在缓存和RAM有限的嵌入式设备上成为瓶颈，限制了先进神经网络架构的部署。

Method: 提出LegoNet压缩技术：1）构建整个模型（无论层类型）的权重块；2）对这些生成的块进行聚类；3）使用块而非单个值进行权重聚类，实现高效压缩。

Result: 在Cifar-10和ImageNet上训练的ResNet-50中，仅使用32个4x4块即可实现64倍压缩且无精度损失；使用16个4x4块可实现128倍压缩，精度损失小于3%。所有结果均无需重新训练或微调。

Conclusion: LegoNet提供了一种有效的神经网络压缩方法，特别适用于资源受限的嵌入式设备，能够在保持模型精度的同时大幅减少内存占用，且无需额外的训练成本。

Abstract: As the need for neural network-based applications to become more accurate and powerful grows, so too does their size and memory footprint. With embedded devices, whose cache and RAM are limited, this growth hinders their ability to leverage state-of-the-art neural network architectures. In this work, we propose \textbf{LegoNet}, a compression technique that \textbf{constructs blocks of weights of the entire model regardless of layer type} and clusters these induced blocks. Using blocks instead of individual values to cluster the weights, we were able to compress ResNet-50 trained for Cifar-10 and ImageNet with only 32 4x4 blocks, compressing the memory footprint by over a factor of \textbf{64x without having to remove any weights} or changing the architecture and \textbf{no loss to accuracy}, nor retraining or any data, and show how to find an arrangement of 16 4x4 blocks that gives a compression ratio of \textbf{128x with less than 3\% accuracy loss}. This was all achieved with \textbf{no need for (re)training or fine-tuning}.

</details>


### [738] [Correlation Analysis of Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06614)
*Zhengguo Li,Chaobing Zheng,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于扩散模型和流匹配的统一表示框架，通过理论分析发现现有方法中噪声数据与预测目标的相关性有时较弱，可能影响学习过程


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型和流匹配方法使用神经网络从噪声数据预测预定义目标，但缺乏统一的理论框架来分析这些模型的学习过程

Method: 1. 提出使用两个简单线性方程的统一表示框架；2. 对提出的模型进行理论分析；3. 分析噪声数据与预测目标之间的相关性

Result: 理论分析表明，在现有扩散模型和流匹配中，噪声数据与预测目标之间的相关性有时较弱，这可能影响所有模型中的预测（或学习）过程

Conclusion: 需要关注扩散模型和流匹配中噪声数据与目标之间的相关性，这对学习过程至关重要，为改进这些模型提供了理论指导

Abstract: Based on literature review about existing diffusion models and flow matching with a neural network to predict a predefined target from noisy data, a unified representation is first proposed for these models using two simple linear equations in this paper. Theoretical analysis of the proposed model is then presented. Our theoretical analysis shows that the correlation between the noisy data and the predicted target is sometimes weak in the existing diffusion models and flow matching. This might affect the prediction (or learning) process which plays a crucial role in all models.

</details>


### [739] [Leakage Safe Graph Features for Interpretable Fraud Detection in Temporal Transaction Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06632)
*Hamideh Khaleghpour,Brett McKinney*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种时间尊重、防泄漏的因果图特征提取协议，用于时间交易网络中的非法实体检测，在Elliptic数据集上验证了图结构特征对交易欺诈检测的补充价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统非法交易检测主要依赖交易层面的属性，但欺诈行为也可能通过网络结构特征（如中心枢纽、高流量中介、协调邻域）表现出来。需要开发能够捕捉这些结构模式且避免前瞻偏差的图特征提取方法。

Method: 1. 构建有向交易图；2. 计算可解释的结构描述符（度统计、PageRank、HITS枢纽/权威分数、k-core指数、邻域可达性度量）；3. 为防止前瞻偏差，计算仅使用每个时间步之前观察到的边的因果图特征变体；4. 使用严格时间分割的随机森林分类器进行评估。

Result: 在保留的未来测试期间，模型表现出强区分能力（ROC-AUC约0.85，平均精度约0.54）。虽然交易属性仍是主要预测信号，但图衍生特征提供了补充的可解释性，并支持调查工作流的风险上下文分析。校准模型在分类概率对齐方面表现更好。

Conclusion: 因果图特征提取可作为时间欺诈检测流程的实用且可解释的增强方法。图结构特征虽然不如交易属性主导，但提供了有价值的补充信息，特别是在可解释性和风险上下文分析方面。

Abstract: Illicit transaction detection is often driven by transaction level attributes however, fraudulent behavior may also manifest through network structure such as central hubs, high flow intermediaries, and coordinated neighborhoods. This paper presents a time respecting, leakage safe (causal) graph feature extraction protocol for temporal transaction networks and evaluates its utility for illicit entity classification. Using the Elliptic dataset, we construct directed transaction graphs and compute interpretable structural descriptors, including degree statistics, PageRank, HITS hub or authority scores, k-core indices, and neighborhood reachability measures. To prevent look ahead bias, we additionally compute causal variants of graph features using only edges observed up to each timestep. A Random Forest classifier trained with strict temporal splits achieves strong discrimination on a held out future test period (ROC-AUC about 0.85, Average Precision about 0.54). Although transaction attributes remain the dominant predictive signal, graph derived features provide complementary interpretability and enable risk context analysis for investigation workflows. We further assess operational utility using Precision at k and evaluate probability reliability via calibration curves and Brier scores, showing that calibrated models yield better aligned probabilities for triage. Overall, the results support causal graph feature extraction as a practical and interpretable augmentation for temporal fraud detection pipelines.

</details>


### [740] [A new Uncertainty Principle in Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06634)
*V. Dolotin,A. Morozov*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文探讨了机器学习中多项式优化问题的本质物理特性，揭示了Heaviside和sigmoid展开的致命退化问题，并提出了与傅里叶分析中不确定性原理类似的新原理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多机器学习中的科学问题可简化为寻找多项式解，但Heaviside和sigmoid展开存在致命退化问题，导致梯度下降被困在峡谷底部。作者旨在从物理角度理解这一现象，而非仅从计算机科学角度

Method: 通过分析Heaviside和sigmoid函数的数学特性，揭示其与傅里叶展开的类比关系。提出新的不确定性原理：最小值越尖锐，峡谷越平滑。将机器学习优化问题重新表述为物理问题

Result: 发现了机器学习优化中存在的固有物理限制，类似于量子力学中的不确定性原理。这一原理解释了为什么标准机器学习软件需要随机初始化来避免局部最小值陷阱

Conclusion: 机器学习应用于科学时遇到的问题本质上是物理问题而非计算机科学问题。这些现象为理解不确定性原理提供了新视角，将其从傅里叶和小波分析扩展到sigmoid函数类

Abstract: Many scientific problems in the context of machine learning can be reduced to the search of polynomial answers in appropriate variables. The Hevisidization of arbitrary polynomial is actually provided by one-and-the same two-layer expression. What prevents the use of this simple idea is the fatal degeneracy of the Heaviside and sigmoid expansions, which traps the steepest-descent evolution at the bottom of canyons, close to the starting point, but far from the desired true minimum.
