Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: Artoo是一个用于机器人的学习型声学通信系统，使用端到端联合训练的神经网络替代传统信号处理，通过轻量级TTS发射器和Conformer ASR接收器在可微分通道中联合优化，实现高效、抗干扰的机器人间通信。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人间声学通信使用手工设计的信号处理，在噪声环境下性能受限。机器人通信不需要保留人类语音的副语言特征（音色、韵律等），只需要最大化解码准确性，这为端到端学习系统提供了机会。

Method: 1) 使用轻量级文本到语音发射器（118万参数）和基于Conformer的自动语音识别接收器（93.8万参数）配对；2) 通过可微分通道进行端到端联合训练；3) 采用三阶段联合训练课程：先训练ASR接收器，然后联合训练，最后在噪声通道中微调；4) 系统总参数210万（8.4MB），在CPU上端到端延迟小于13ms。

Result: 在0dB信噪比噪声条件下，系统达到8.3%的字符错误率，超越基线方法。系统轻量高效，适合资源受限的机器人平台部署。

Conclusion: Artoo展示了端到端学习在机器人声学通信中的有效性，通过联合优化的神经网络系统实现了抗干扰、高效的通信，为资源受限平台提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We present Artoo, a learned acoustic communication system for robots that replaces hand-designed signal processing with end-to-end co-trained neural networks. Our system pairs a lightweight text-to-speech (TTS) transmitter (1.18M parameters) with a conformer-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) receiver (938K parameters), jointly optimized through a differentiable channel. Unlike human speech, robot-to-robot communication is paralinguistics-free: the system need not preserve timbre, prosody, or naturalness, only maximize decoding accuracy under channel distortion. Through a three-phase co-training curriculum, the TTS transmitter learns to produce distortion-robust acoustic encodings that surpass the baseline under noise, achieving 8.3% CER at 0 dB SNR. The entire system requires only 2.1M parameters (8.4 MB) and runs in under 13 ms end-to-end on a CPU, making it suitable for deployment on resource-constrained robotic platforms.

</details>


### [818] [Accelerating Diffusion Models for Generative AI Applications with Silicon Photonics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07626)
*Tharini Suresh,Salma Afifi,Sudeep Pasricha*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于硅光子学的新型扩散模型加速器，相比现有加速器实现了至少3倍能效提升和5.5倍吞吐量改进


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型虽然能生成高质量的合成数据，但其迭代去噪过程需要计算密集的UNet和注意力机制，导致在传统电子平台上推理能耗高，需要可持续的加速方案

Method: 采用硅光子学技术设计专门的扩散模型加速器，利用光子计算的优势来加速扩散模型的推理过程

Result: 实验评估显示，该光子加速器相比最先进的扩散模型加速器实现了至少3倍的能效提升和5.5倍的吞吐量改进

Conclusion: 硅光子学为扩散模型提供了一种高效、可持续的加速方案，显著提升了能效和吞吐量

Abstract: Diffusion models have revolutionized generative AI, with their inherent capacity to generate highly realistic state-of-the-art synthetic data. However, these models employ an iterative denoising process over computationally intensive layers such as UNets and attention mechanisms. This results in high inference energy on conventional electronic platforms, and thus, there is an emerging need to accelerate these models in a sustainable manner. To address this challenge, we present a novel silicon photonics-based accelerator for diffusion models. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our photonic accelerator achieves at least 3x better energy efficiency and 5.5x throughput improvement compared to state-of-the-art diffusion model accelerators.

</details>


### [819] [Characterization and upgrade of a quantum graph neural network for charged particle tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08667)
*Matteo Argenton,Laura Cappelli,Concezio Bozzi*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究量子图神经网络在大型强子对撞机高亮度环境下带电粒子径迹重建中的应用，采用混合经典-量子架构，改进了训练收敛性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型强子对撞机升级后亮度大幅增加，导致事件更密集复杂，传统径迹重建方法面临挑战，需要探索量子机器学习等新技术来应对高能物理任务。

Method: 采用量子图神经网络架构，在模拟高亮度数据集上进行带电粒子径迹重建。模型基于事件图结构，将经典前馈网络与参数化量子电路交错组合成混合架构，对相邻探测器层间的命中连接进行分类。

Result: 报告了对原始设计的改进，提供了训练行为改善的新证据，特别是在向最终训练配置收敛方面表现出改进。

Conclusion: 量子图神经网络在高能物理径迹重建任务中具有潜力，混合经典-量子架构的设计改进有助于训练收敛，为量子机器学习在高能物理应用提供了新证据。

Abstract: In the forthcoming years the LHC experiments are going to be upgraded to benefit from the substantial increase of the LHC instantaneous luminosity, which will lead to larger, denser events, and, consequently, greater complexity in reconstructing charged particle tracks, motivating frontier research in new technologies. Quantum machine learning models are being investigated as potential new approaches to high energy physics (HEP) tasks. We characterize and upgrade a quantum graph neural network (QGNN) architecture for charged particle track reconstruction on a simulated high luminosity dataset. The model operates on a set of event graphs, each built from the hits generated in tracking detector layers by particles produced in proton collisions, performing a classification of the possible hit connections between adjacent layers. In this approach the QGNN is designed as a hybrid architecture, interleaving classical feedforward networks with parametrized quantum circuits. We characterize the interplay between the classical and quantum components. We report on the principal upgrades to the original design, and present new evidence of improved training behavior, specifically in terms of convergence toward the final trained configuration.

</details>


### [820] [From ARIMA to Attention: Power Load Forecasting Using Temporal Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06622)
*Suhasnadh Reddy Veluru,Sai Teja Erukude,Viswa Chaitanya Marella*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文对传统统计模型和深度学习方法在短期电力负荷预测上进行了实证评估，比较了ARIMA、LSTM、BiLSTM和Transformer四种模型，发现基于自注意力机制的Transformer模型在24小时预测中表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的短期电力负荷预测对于有效管理、优化和确保现代电力系统的鲁棒性至关重要。本文旨在通过实证评估比较传统统计模型和深度学习方法在短期能源负荷预测中的性能。

Method: 使用PJM每小时能源消耗数据，对四种模型（ARIMA、LSTM、BiLSTM、Transformer）进行实证评估。数据处理包括插值、归一化和滑动窗口序列方法。使用MAE、RMSE和MAPE三个指标评估24小时预测性能。

Result: 在所有测试模型中，基于自注意力算法的Transformer模型表现最佳，MAPE达到3.8%，在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于其他模型。这表明注意力架构在捕捉电力消耗数据中复杂时间模式方面具有潜力。

Conclusion: 基于注意力的架构在准确捕捉电力消耗数据中的复杂时间模式方面显示出日益增长的潜力，Transformer模型在短期电力负荷预测中表现最优。

Abstract: Accurate short-term power load forecasting is important to effectively manage, optimize, and ensure the robustness of modern power systems. This paper performs an empirical evaluation of a traditional statistical model and deep learning approaches for predicting short-term energy load. Four models, namely ARIMA, LSTM, BiLSTM, and Transformer, were leveraged on the PJM Hourly Energy Consumption data. The data processing involved interpolation, normalization, and a sliding-window sequence method. Each model's forecasting performance was evaluated for the 24-hour horizon using MAE, RMSE, and MAPE. Of the models tested, the Transformer model, which relies on self-attention algorithms, produced the best results with 3.8 percent of MAPE, with performance above any model in both accuracy and robustness. These findings underscore the growing potential of attention-based architectures in accurately capturing complex temporal patterns in power consumption data.

</details>


### [821] [HURRI-GAN: A Novel Approach for Hurricane Bias-Correction Beyond Gauge Stations using Generative Adversarial Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06649)
*Noujoud Nadera,Hadi Majed,Stefanos Giaremis,Rola El Osta,Clint Dawson,Carola Kaiser,Hartmut Kaiser*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: HURRI-GAN使用时间序列生成对抗网络(TimeGAN)来修正物理风暴潮模拟模型的系统误差，通过AI增强物理模型结果，在保持预测精度的同时减少计算网格尺寸和运行时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 美国沿海地区受严重风暴事件影响，准确预测飓风风暴潮和风影响对减灾至关重要。物理模拟模型(如ADCIRC)虽然准确，但在高分辨率下计算时间过长，无法满足应急响应的实时需求。

Method: 提出HURRI-GAN方法，使用时间序列生成对抗网络(TimeGAN)来补偿物理模型的系统误差。通过AI增强物理模拟结果，减少必要的网格尺寸和运行时间，同时保持预测精度。特别关注在超出水位测量站位置的空间区域外推模型偏差修正。

Result: 模型能够准确生成超出测量站位置的目标位置偏差修正。低RMSE值表明模型生成准确外推数据的能力。将HURRI-GAN生成的修正应用于ADCIRC模拟水位，改善了大多数测试测量站的总体预测。

Conclusion: HURRI-GAN通过AI增强物理模拟模型，在保持预测精度的同时显著减少计算需求，为实时应急响应提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: The coastal regions of the eastern and southern United States are impacted by severe storm events, leading to significant loss of life and properties. Accurately forecasting storm surge and wind impacts from hurricanes is essential for mitigating some of the impacts, e.g., timely preparation of evacuations and other countermeasures. Physical simulation models like the ADCIRC hydrodynamics model, which run on high-performance computing resources, are sophisticated tools that produce increasingly accurate forecasts as the resolution of the computational meshes improves. However, a major drawback of these models is the significant time required to generate results at very high resolutions, which may not meet the near real-time demands of emergency responders. The presented work introduces HURRI-GAN, a novel AI-driven approach that augments the results produced by physical simulation models using time series generative adversarial networks (TimeGAN) to compensate for systemic errors of the physical model, thus reducing the necessary mesh size and runtime without loss in forecasting accuracy. We present first results in extrapolating model bias corrections for the spatial regions beyond the positions of the water level gauge stations. The presented results show that our methodology can accurately generate bias corrections at target locations spatially beyond gauge stations locations. The model's performance, as indicated by low root mean squared error (RMSE) values, highlights its capability to generate accurate extrapolated data. Applying the corrections generated by HURRI-GAN on the ADCIRC modeled water levels resulted in improving the overall prediction on the majority of the testing gauge stations.

</details>


### [822] [Bi Directional Feedback Fusion for Activity Aware Forecasting of Indoor CO2 and PM2.5](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06724)
*Harshala Gammulle,Lidia Morawska,Sridha Sridharan,Clinton Fookes*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种双流双向反馈融合框架，联合建模室内环境演变和人类活动嵌入，用于预测CO2和PM2.5浓度，显著优于现有方法并提供不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内空气质量预测对保障居住者健康、热舒适性和智能建筑控制至关重要。传统数据驱动模型主要依赖历史传感器轨迹，难以预测行为引起的排放峰值或浓度快速变化，需要更有效的建模方法。

Method: 提出双流双向反馈融合框架：1) 联合建模室内环境演变和人类活动嵌入；2) 上下文感知调制机制，基于共享融合状态自适应缩放和偏移各流；3) 双时间尺度时序模块，分别捕获CO2累积模式和PM2.5短期波动；4) 复合损失函数结合加权均方误差、峰值感知惩罚和不确定性正则化。

Result: 在真实世界IAQ数据集上的广泛验证表明，该方法显著优于最先进的预测基线，同时提供可解释的不确定性估计，适用于智能建筑和健康监测系统。

Conclusion: 该框架通过联合建模环境演变和人类活动，有效解决了室内空气质量预测的挑战，为智能建筑控制和健康监测提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Indoor air quality (IAQ) forecasting plays a critical role in safeguarding occupant health, ensuring thermal comfort, and supporting intelligent building control. However, predicting future concentrations of key pollutants such as carbon dioxide (CO2) and fine particulate matter (PM2.5) remains challenging due to the complex interplay between environmental factors and highly dynamic occupant behaviours. Traditional data driven models primarily rely on historical sensor trajectories and often fail to anticipate behaviour induced emission spikes or rapid concentration shifts. To address these limitations, we present a dual stream bi directional feedback fusion framework that jointly models indoor environmental evolution and action derived embeddings representing human activities. The proposed architecture integrates a context aware modulation mechanism that adaptively scales and shifts each stream based on a shared, evolving fusion state, enabling the model to selectively emphasise behavioural cues or long term environmental trends. Furthermore, we introduce dual timescale temporal modules that independently capture gradual CO2 accumulation patterns and short term PM2.5 fluctuations. A composite loss function combining weighted mean squared error, spike aware penalties, and uncertainty regularisation facilitates robust learning under volatile indoor conditions. Extensive validation on real-world IAQ datasets demonstrates that our approach significantly outperforms state of the art forecasting baselines while providing interpretable uncertainty estimates essential for practical deployment in smart buildings and health-aware monitoring systems.

</details>


### [823] [Implementation of Quantum Implicit Neural Representation in Deterministic and Probabilistic Autoencoders for Image Reconstruction/Generation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06755)
*Saadet Müzehher Eren*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于量子隐式神经表示(QINR)的自编码器和变分自编码器，用于图像重建和生成任务，展示了量子层在生成模型中的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索量子隐式神经表示在VAE和AE中的应用，证明QINR可以将潜在空间信息转换为丰富、周期性的高频特征，并解决QGAN中存在的低多样性问题，提高生成模型的稳定性。

Method: 采用量子-经典混合模型架构：经典CNN编码器 + 量子QINR解码器。训练时使用BCEWithLogits作为重建损失，QINR-VAE额外使用KL散度进行潜在正则化，并引入可学习的角度缩放机制解决优化问题。

Result: 在MNIST、E-MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上的实验表明，QINR-VAE能够用少量数据生成更多样化的图像，生成和重建的图像具有清晰的边界和细节，性能优于现有量子生成模型。

Conclusion: 在AE/VAE框架中加入基于QINR的量子层能够用有限的参数提升重建和生成性能，量子隐式表示为生成模型提供了新的可能性。

Abstract: We propose a quantum implicit neural representation (QINR)-based autoencoder (AE) and variational autoencoder (VAE) for image reconstruction and generation tasks. Our purpose is to demonstrate that the QINR in VAEs and AEs can transform information from the latent space into highly rich, periodic, and high-frequency features. Additionally, we aim to show that the QINR-VAE can be more stable than various quantum generative adversarial network (QGAN) models in image generation because it can address the low diversity problem. Our quantum-classical hybrid models consist of a classical convolutional neural network (CNN) encoder and a quantum-based QINR decoder. We train the QINR-AE/VAE with binary cross-entropy with logits (BCEWithLogits) as the reconstruction loss. For the QINR-VAE, we additionally employ Kullback-Leibler divergence for latent regularization with beta/capacity scheduling to prevent posterior collapse. We introduce learnable angle-scaling in data reuploading to address optimization challenges. We test our models on the MNIST, E-MNIST, and Fashion-MNIST datasets to reconstruct and generate images. Our results demonstrate that the QINR structure in VAE can produce a wider variety of images with a small amount of data than various generative models that have been studied. We observe that the generated and reconstructed images from the QINR-VAE/AE are clear with sharp boundaries and details. Overall, we find that the addition of QINR-based quantum layers into the AE/VAE frameworks enhances the performance of reconstruction and generation with a constrained set of parameters.

</details>


### [824] [Enhancing SHAP Explainability for Diagnostic and Prognostic ML Models in Alzheimer Disease](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06758)
*Pablo Guillén,Enrique Frias-Martinez*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个多级可解释性框架，用于评估阿尔茨海默病机器学习模型SHAP解释的鲁棒性、稳定性和一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管机器学习模型在阿尔茨海默病诊断和预后方面表现良好，但临床采用受到技术专业知识需求以及缺乏可信赖、一致模型解释的限制。现有研究通常关注孤立任务的解释，很少提供关于这些解释在不同疾病阶段、模型架构或预测目标间鲁棒性的证据。

Method: 提出多级可解释性框架，通过整合三个层面来测量解释的连贯性、稳定性和一致性：1) 特征重要性与SHAP之间的模型内连贯性指标；2) 跨阿尔茨海默病边界的SHAP稳定性；3) 诊断与预后之间的SHAP跨任务一致性。使用AutoML在NACC数据集上优化分类器，训练了四个诊断模型和四个预后模型，涵盖标准AD进展阶段。

Result: 认知和功能标记在诊断和预后的SHAP解释中占主导地位。诊断和预后模型之间的SHAP-SHAP一致性在所有分类器中都很高，具有100%的符号稳定性和解释幅度的最小变化。领域级贡献也保持稳定，仅预后中遗传特征有最小增加。

Conclusion: SHAP解释可以通过定量验证其鲁棒性和可转移性，为临床医生提供更可靠的机器学习预测解释，促进临床采用。

Abstract: Alzheimer disease (AD) diagnosis and prognosis increasingly rely on machine learning (ML) models. Although these models provide good results, clinical adoption is limited by the need for technical expertise and the lack of trustworthy and consistent model explanations. SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) is com-monly used to interpret AD models, but existing studies tend to focus on explanations for isolated tasks, providing little evidence about their robustness across disease stages, model architectures, or prediction objectives. This paper proposes a multi-level explainability framework that measures the coherence, stabil-ity and consistency of explanations by integrating: (1) within-model coherence metrics between feature importance and SHAP, (2) SHAP stability across AD boundaries, and (3) SHAP cross-task consistency be-tween diagnosis and prognosis. Using AutoML to optimize classifiers on the NACC dataset, we trained four diagnostic and four prognostic models covering the standard AD progression stages. Stability was then evaluated using correlation metrics, top-k feature overlap, SHAP sign consistency, and domain-level contribution ratios. Results show that cognitive and functional markers dominate SHAP explanations in both diagnosis and prognosis. SHAP-SHAP consistency between diagnostic and prognostic models was high across all classifiers, with 100% sign stability and minimal shifts in explanatory magnitude. Domain-level contributions also remained stable, with only minimal increases in genetic features for prognosis. These results demonstrate that SHAP explanations can be quantitatively vali-dated for robustness and transferability, providing clinicians with more reliable interpretations of ML pre-dictions.

</details>


### [825] [LF2L: Loss Fusion Horizontal Federated Learning Across Heterogeneous Feature Spaces Using External Datasets Effectively: A Case Study in Second Primary Cancer Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07249)
*Chia-Fu Lin,Yi-Ju Tseng*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种损失融合横向联邦学习框架，用于预测肺癌幸存者的第二原发癌，通过整合台湾本地数据和美国SEER外部数据，在保护隐私的同时提升预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着癌症生存率提高，第二原发癌成为日益严重的问题。早期预测对于及时临床干预至关重要。但台湾本地数据集规模小、地域范围有限，限制了传统机器学习方法的有效性和泛化能力。

Method: 提出损失融合横向联邦学习框架，整合台湾本地数据和美国SEER外部数据，避免数据共享以保护隐私。利用共同特征和独特特征，通过共享损失机制平衡它们的贡献。

Result: 实验结果显示，与本地化、横向联邦和集中式学习基线相比，在AUROC和AUPRC指标上均有统计学显著改进。

Conclusion: 不仅获取外部数据很重要，有效利用外部数据来提升真实世界临床模型性能同样关键。提出的LF2L框架能在保护隐私的同时实现跨机构有效协作。

Abstract: Second primary cancer (SPC), a new cancer in patients different from previously diagnosed, is a growing concern due to improved cancer survival rates. Early prediction of SPC is essential to enable timely clinical interventions. This study focuses on lung cancer survivors treated in Taiwanese hospitals, where the limited size and geographic scope of local datasets restrict the effectiveness and generalizability of traditional machine learning approaches. To address this, we incorporate external data from the publicly available US-based Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results (SEER) program, significantly increasing data diversity and scale. However, the integration of multi-source datasets presents challenges such as feature inconsistency and privacy constraints. Rather than naively merging data, we proposed a loss fusion horizontal federated learning (LF2L) framework that can enable effective cross-institutional collaboration while preserving institutional privacy by avoiding data sharing. Using both common and unique features and balancing their contributions through a shared loss mechanism, our method demonstrates substantial improvements in the prediction performance of SPC. Experiment results show statistically significant improvements in AUROC and AUPRC when compared to localized, horizontal federated, and centralized learning baselines. This highlights the importance of not only acquiring external data but also leveraging it effectively to enhance model performance in real-world clinical model development.

</details>


### [826] [N-Tree Diffusion for Long-Horizon Wildfire Risk Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07361)
*Yucheng Xing,Xin Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: NT-Diffusion：用于长时程野火风险预测的分层扩散模型，通过共享早期去噪阶段减少冗余计算，在稀疏事件监督下生成概率空间场


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时程野火风险预测需要在稀疏事件监督下生成概率空间场，同时保持跨多个预测时间范围的计算效率。传统扩散模型对每个时间范围独立重复去噪过程，导致冗余计算。

Method: 提出N-Tree Diffusion (NT-Diffusion)分层扩散模型，将火灾发生表示为连续的火险地图(FRMs)。模型共享早期去噪阶段，在后期分支进行特定时间范围的细化，减少冗余采样。

Result: 在新收集的真实世界野火数据集上评估，NT-Diffusion相比基线预测方法实现了持续精度提升并降低了推理成本。

Conclusion: NT-Diffusion为长时程野火风险预测提供了一种计算高效的扩散模型方法，通过分层设计平衡了预测精度和计算效率。

Abstract: Long-horizon wildfire risk forecasting requires generating probabilistic spatial fields under sparse event supervision while maintaining computational efficiency across multiple prediction horizons. Extending diffusion models to multi-step forecasting typically repeats the denoising process independently for each horizon, leading to redundant computation. We introduce N-Tree Diffusion (NT-Diffusion), a hierarchical diffusion model designed for long-horizon wildfire risk forecasting. Fire occurrences are represented as continuous Fire Risk Maps (FRMs), which provide a smoothed spatial risk field suitable for probabilistic modeling. Instead of running separate diffusion trajectories for each predicted timestamp, NT-Diffusion shares early denoising stages and branches at later levels, allowing horizon-specific refinement while reducing redundant sampling. We evaluate the proposed framework on a newly collected real-world wildfire dataset constructed for long-horizon probabilistic prediction. Results indicate that NT-Diffusion achieves consistent accuracy improvements and reduced inference cost compared to baseline forecasting approaches.

</details>


### [827] [Contact-Guided 3D Genome Structure Generation of E. coli via Diffusion Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07472)
*Mingxin Zhang,Xiaofeng Dai,Yu Yao,Ziqi Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出基于条件扩散Transformer的框架，用于生成三维大肠杆菌基因组构象集合，以Hi-C接触图为指导，实现从单分子到集合层面的基因组重构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基因组结构预测方法通常产生单一确定性结构，无法捕捉基因组在细胞内的天然构象异质性。本研究旨在开发能够生成与实验Hi-C数据一致的基因组构象集合的生成模型。

Method: 采用条件扩散Transformer框架，结合变分自编码器进行潜在扩散，通过Transformer编码器和交叉注意力注入Hi-C信息，使用流匹配目标进行稳定优化，并在粗粒度分子动力学模拟生成的合成数据集上进行训练。

Result: 在保留测试集上，生成的结构能够重现输入Hi-C数据的距离衰减和结构相关性指标，同时保持显著的构象多样性，证明扩散生成模型在集合层面3D基因组重构中的有效性。

Conclusion: 条件扩散Transformer框架能够成功生成与实验Hi-C数据一致的基因组构象集合，为理解基因组三维结构的异质性提供了新工具。

Abstract: In this study, we present a conditional diffusion-transformer framework for generating ensembles of three-dimensional Escherichia coli genome conformations guided by Hi-C contact maps. Instead of producing a single deterministic structure, we formulate genome reconstruction as a conditional generative modeling problem that samples heterogeneous conformations whose ensemble-averaged contacts are consistent with the input Hi-C data. A synthetic dataset is constructed using coarse-grained molecular dynamics simulations to generate chromatin ensembles and corresponding Hi-C maps under circular topology. Our models operate in a latent diffusion setting with a variational autoencoder that preserves per-bin alignment and supports replication-aware representations. Hi-C information is injected through a transformer-based encoder and cross-attention, enforcing a physically interpretable one-way constraint from Hi-C to structure. The model is trained using a flow-matching objective for stable optimization. On held-out ensembles, generated structures reproduce the input Hi-C distance-decay and structural correlation metrics while maintaining substantial conformational diversity, demonstrating the effectiveness of diffusion-based generative modeling for ensemble-level 3D genome reconstruction.

</details>


### [828] [Reinforcement learning-based dynamic cleaning scheduling framework for solar energy system](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07518)
*Heungjo An*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该研究提出基于强化学习的框架，用于优化沙漠地区光伏面板的清洁调度，使用PPO和SAC算法动态调整清洁间隔，在阿布扎比案例中PPO比传统方法节省13%成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提高太阳能光伏系统的可持续性和效率，特别是在干旱地区，灰尘等污染物会显著降低光伏面板的发电效率，需要优化清洁调度来减少运营成本。

Method: 采用强化学习框架，使用PPO（近端策略优化）和SAC（软演员-评论家）算法，基于不确定的环境条件动态调整光伏面板清洁间隔，并与传统模拟优化方法进行比较。

Result: 在阿布扎比案例研究中，PPO算法表现最佳，相比SAC和传统模拟优化方法，实现了高达13%的成本节约，能够更好地适应随机环境动态。

Conclusion: 强化学习驱动的自主决策在优化可再生能源系统维护操作方面具有潜力，灵活的自主调度优于固定间隔方法，未来需要增强模型的泛化能力并考虑更多约束条件。

Abstract: Advancing autonomous green technologies in solar photovoltaic (PV) systems is key to improving sustainability and efficiency in renewable energy production. This study presents a reinforcement learning (RL)-based framework to autonomously optimize the cleaning schedules of PV panels in arid regions, where soiling from dust and other airborne particles significantly reduces energy output. By employing advanced RL algorithms, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and Soft Actor-Critic (SAC), the framework dynamically adjusts cleaning intervals based on uncertain environmental conditions. The proposed approach was applied to a case study in Abu Dhabi, UAE, demonstrating that PPO outperformed SAC and traditional simulation optimization (Sim-Opt) methods, achieving up to 13% cost savings by dynamically responding to weather uncertainties. The results highlight the superiority of flexible, autonomous scheduling over fixed-interval methods, particularly in adapting to stochastic environmental dynamics. This aligns with the goals of autonomous green energy production by reducing operational costs and improving the efficiency of solar power generation systems. This work underscores the potential of RL-driven autonomous decision-making to optimize maintenance operations in renewable energy systems. In future research, it is important to enhance the generalization ability of the proposed RL model, while also considering additional factors and constraints to apply it to different regions.

</details>


### [829] [Generative prediction of laser-induced rocket ignition with dynamic latent space representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07525)
*Tony Zahtila,Ettore Saetta,Murray Cutforth,Davy Brouzet,Diego Rossinelli,Gianluca Iaccarino*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合卷积自编码器和神经常微分方程的数据驱动代理模型方法，用于快速预测激光点火火箭发动机的多物理场湍流模拟，将点火试验的预测成本降低了几个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 激光点火火箭发动机的精确模拟计算成本极高，涉及湍流混合、激光能量沉积和高速火焰生长等多物理场问题，同时设计空间庞大（激光操作条件和目标位置）。需要快速探索和不确定性量化方法。

Method: 采用卷积自编码器（cAE）将高维流场空间压缩到低维潜在空间，然后使用神经常微分方程（neural ODEs）学习系统的时域动力学。训练后，模型可以从初始条件和操作输入快速生成时空预测。

Result: 该方法将点火试验的预测成本降低了几个数量级，实现了输入参数空间的高效探索。同时，由于生成时空场预测，模型输出的物理基础评估更加可行。

Conclusion: 该方法标志着向激光点火火箭燃烧室实时数字孪生迈出了重要一步，代表了复杂系统背景下的代理建模进展。

Abstract: Accurate and predictive scale-resolving simulations of laser-ignited rocket engines are highly time-consuming because the problem includes turbulent fuel-oxidizer mixing dynamics, laser-induced energy deposition, and high-speed flame growth. This is conflated with the large design space primarily corresponding to the laser operating conditions and target location. To enable rapid exploration and uncertainty quantification, we propose a data-driven surrogate modeling approach that combines convolutional autoencoders (cAEs) with neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs). The present target application of an ML-based surrogate model to leading-edge multi-physics turbulence simulation is part of a paradigm shift in the deployment of surrogate models towards increasing real-world complexity. Sequentially, the cAE spatially compresses high-dimensional flow fields into a low-dimensional latent space, wherein the system's temporal dynamics are learned via neural ODEs. Once trained, the model generates fast spatiotemporal predictions from initial conditions and specified operating inputs. By learning a surrogate to replace the entirety of the time-evolving simulation, the cost of predicting an ignition trial is reduced by several orders of magnitude, allowing efficient exploration of the input parameter space. Further, as the current framework yields a spatiotemporal field prediction, appraisal of the model output's physical grounding is more tractable. This approach marks a significant step toward real-time digital twins for laser-ignited rocket combustors and represents surrogate modeling in a complex system context.

</details>


### [830] [ECG Classification on PTB-XL: A Data-Centric Approach with Simplified CNN-VAE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07558)
*Naqcho Ali Mehdi,Amir Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种简化的CNN-VAE架构用于ECG分类，强调数据预处理和类别平衡的重要性，在PTB XL数据集上取得了87.01%的二元准确率和0.7454加权F1分数，模型参数仅197,093个。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心电图自动分类对心血管疾病早期检测至关重要。当前方法过度依赖复杂架构的深度神经网络，作者认为通过精心设计的数据预处理、类别平衡和简化架构，可以在显著降低模型复杂度的同时获得有竞争力的性能。

Method: 采用简化的卷积神经网络与变分自编码器结合架构（CNN-VAE），重点在于系统性的数据预处理和类别平衡策略，而非复杂的网络架构设计。

Result: 在PTB XL数据集上，针对五个诊断类别（CD, HYP, MI, NORM, STTC）获得了87.01%的二元准确率和0.7454加权F1分数，模型参数仅197,093个，显著低于传统复杂架构。

Conclusion: 研究表明，在医学信号分类中，以数据为中心的机器学习实践（系统性预处理和平衡训练策略）比架构复杂性更为重要。同时识别了少数类别（特别是肥大症）检测的挑战，为处理不平衡ECG数据集提供了改进方向。

Abstract: Automated electrocardiogram (ECG) classification is essential for early detection of cardiovascular diseases. While recent approaches have increasingly relied on deep neural networks with complex architectures, we demonstrate that careful data preprocessing, class balancing, and a simplified convolutional neural network combined with a variational autoencoder (CNN-VAE) architecture can achieve competitive performance with significantly reduced model complexity. Using the publicly available PTB XL dataset, we achieve 87.01% binary accuracy and 0.7454 weighted F1-score across five diagnostic classes (CD, HYP, MI, NORM, STTC) with only 197,093 trainable parameters. Our work emphasises the importance of data-centric machine learning practices over architectural complexity, demonstrating that systematic preprocessing and balanced training strategies are critical for medical signal classification. We identify challenges in minority class detection (particularly hypertrophy) and provide insights for future improvements in handling imbalanced ECG datasets.
  Index Terms: ECG classification, convolutional neural networks, class balancing, data preprocessing, variational autoencoders, PTB-XL dataset

</details>


### [831] [Guess & Guide: Gradient-Free Zero-Shot Diffusion Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07860)
*Abduragim Shtanchaev,Albina Ilina,Yazid Janati,Arip Asadulaev,Martin Takác,Eric Moulines*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种轻量级似然替代方法，无需计算去噪网络梯度，显著降低贝叶斯逆问题推理成本，实现最快且帕累托最优的零样本生成


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练扩散模型可作为贝叶斯逆问题的有效先验，实现零样本生成。但现有方法依赖需要向量-雅可比积的替代似然，每个去噪步骤计算负担重

Method: 引入轻量级似然替代方法，无需计算去噪网络梯度，避免反向传播开销，可处理多样化逆问题

Result: 推理成本显著下降，在多个任务中获得最高结果，成为贝叶斯逆问题中最快且帕累托最优的方法

Conclusion: 提出的方法解决了现有扩散模型在逆问题中的计算瓶颈，实现了高效零样本生成，为贝叶斯逆问题提供了实用的解决方案

Abstract: Pretrained diffusion models serve as effective priors for Bayesian inverse problems. These priors enable zero-shot generation by sampling from the conditional distribution, which avoids the need for task-specific retraining. However, a major limitation of existing methods is their reliance on surrogate likelihoods that require vector-Jacobian products at each denoising step, creating a substantial computational burden. To address this, we introduce a lightweight likelihood surrogate that eliminates the need to calculate gradients through the denoiser network. This enables us to handle diverse inverse problems without backpropagation overhead. Experiments confirm that using our method, the inference cost drops dramatically. At the same time, our approach delivers the highest results in multiple tasks. Broadly speaking, we propose the fastest and Pareto optimal method for Bayesian inverse problems.

</details>


### [832] [PSTNet: Physically-Structured Turbulence Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07957)
*Boris Kriuk,Fedor Kriuk*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: PSTNet是一个轻量级物理结构化神经网络，用于实时估计大气湍流强度，通过将物理原理嵌入模型结构而非增加参数规模，在资源受限的机载系统中实现准确湍流预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决飞机在不同海拔区域（特别是海洋、极地等数据稀疏地区）实时估计大气湍流强度的挑战。传统频谱模型只能反映气候学平均值而非瞬时状态，而通用ML回归器缺乏对基本物理缩放定律的保证。

Method: 提出物理结构化湍流网络(PSTNet)，包含四个组件：1)基于Monin-Obukhov理论的无参数主干；2)由Richardson数软目标监督的机制门控专家子网络混合；3)基于局部空气密度比的特征线性调制层；4)强制惯性子范围缩放的Kolmogorov输出层约束。整个模型仅552个可学习参数。

Result: 在340个六自由度制导仿真中验证，涵盖三种飞行器类别和六种操作类别。PSTNet实现平均脱靶距离改善+2.8%，胜率78%，具有统计显著性效应。模型仅需2.5KB存储空间，在Cortex-M7微控制器上执行时间小于12秒。

Conclusion: 将领域物理知识编码为架构先验比扩大模型容量更能有效提高湍流估计精度，为资源受限、安全关键的机载制导系统提供了可行的传统查找表替代方案。

Abstract: Reliable real-time estimation of atmospheric turbulence intensity remains an open challenge for aircraft operating across diverse altitude bands, particularly over oceanic, polar, and data-sparse regions that lack operational nowcasting infrastructure. Classical spectral models encode climatological averages rather than the instantaneous atmospheric state, and generic ML regressors offer adaptivity but provide no guarantee that predictions respect fundamental scaling laws. This paper introduces the Physically-Structured Turbulence Network (PSTNet), a lightweight architecture that embeds physics directly into its structure. PSTNet couples four components: (i) a zero-parameter backbone derived from Monin-Obukhov theory, (ii) a regime-gated mixture of specialist sub-networks supervised by Richardson-number-derived soft targets, (iii) Feature-wise Linear Modulation layers conditioning hidden representations on local air-density ratio, and (iv) a Kolmogorov output layer enforcing inertial-subrange scaling as an architectural constraint. The entire model contains only 552 learnable parameters, requiring fewer than 2.5 kB of storage and executing in under 12s on a Cortex-M7 microcontroller. We validate PSTNet on 340 paired six-degree-of-freedom guidance simulations spanning three vehicle classes (Mach 2.8, 4.5, and 8.0) and six operational categories with real-time satellite weather ingestion. PSTNet achieves a mean miss-distance improvement of +2.8% with a 78% win rate and a statistically significant effect size. Our results demonstrate that encoding domain physics as architectural priors yields a more efficient and interpretable path to turbulence estimation accuracy than scaling model capacity, establishing PSTNet as a viable drop-in replacement for legacy look-up tables in resource-constrained, safety-critical on-board guidance systems.

</details>


### [833] [Explainable Condition Monitoring via Probabilistic Anomaly Detection Applied to Helicopter Transmissions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08130)
*Aurelio Raffa Ugolini,Jessica Leoni,Valentina Breschi,Damiano Paniccia,Francesco Aldo Tucci,Luigi Capone,Mara Tanelli*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种仅使用健康数据的可解释性条件监测方法，通过概率分布学习健康观测值，检测运行时异常，并提供不确定性量化和解释工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于故障是罕见事件，难以获取足够的故障数据进行监督学习，因此需要仅基于健康数据的异常检测方法，同时需要可解释性以支持安全关键应用中的决策。

Method: 基于贝叶斯框架，学习健康观测值的概率分布，定义偏离正常状态的概率度量来检测和预测故障，提供不确定性量化和描述性解释工具。

Result: 在两个应用案例（预测性维护基准数据集和真实直升机传动数据集）中，该方法在异常检测性能上与最先进方法具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 提出的可解释性条件监测方法仅需健康数据，能够有效检测异常并提供决策支持，适用于安全关键应用。

Abstract: We present a novel Explainable methodology for Condition Monitoring, relying on healthy data only. Since faults are rare events, we propose to focus on learning the probability distribution of healthy observations only, and detect Anomalies at runtime. This objective is achieved via the definition of probabilistic measures of deviation from nominality, which allow to detect and anticipate faults. The Bayesian perspective underpinning our approach allows us to perform Uncertainty Quantification to inform decisions. At the same time, we provide descriptive tools to enhance the interpretability of the results, supporting the deployment of the proposed strategy also in safety-critical applications. The methodology is validated experimentally on two use cases: a publicly available benchmark for Predictive Maintenance, and a real-world Helicopter Transmission dataset collected over multiple years. In both applications, the method achieves competitive detection performance with respect to state-of-the-art anomaly detection methods.

</details>


### [834] [Revisiting Gradient Staleness: Evaluating Distance Metrics for Asynchronous Federated Learning Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08211)
*Patrick Wilhelm,Odej Kao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究异步联邦学习中客户端模型陈旧度问题，探索使用不同距离度量（替代欧氏距离）来更准确衡量梯度陈旧度对聚合过程的影响，以提升收敛速度、模型性能和训练稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异步联邦学习中，客户端基于计算速度不同时间发送更新，常使用过时的全局模型版本，这种陈旧度会降低全局模型的收敛性和准确性。现有方法如AsyncFedED使用欧氏距离衡量陈旧度，但需要探索更准确的距离度量来捕捉梯度陈旧度的影响。

Method: 扩展AsyncFedED方法，探索替代距离度量来更准确捕捉梯度陈旧度影响，将这些度量整合到聚合过程中，在异构客户端和非独立同分布数据设置下评估其对收敛速度、模型性能和训练稳定性的影响。

Result: 结果表明某些距离度量能带来更鲁棒和高效的异步联邦学习训练，为实际部署提供更强基础。

Conclusion: 通过探索替代距离度量来更准确衡量梯度陈旧度，可以提升异步联邦学习的收敛性、准确性和稳定性，某些特定度量在异构和非独立同分布数据环境下表现更优。

Abstract: In asynchronous federated learning (FL), client devices send updates to a central server at varying times based on their computational speed, often using stale versions of the global model. This staleness can degrade the convergence and accuracy of the global model. Previous work, such as AsyncFedED, proposed an adaptive aggregation method using Euclidean distance to measure staleness. In this paper, we extend this approach by exploring alternative distance metrics to more accurately capture the effect of gradient staleness. We integrate these metrics into the aggregation process and evaluate their impact on convergence speed, model performance, and training stability under heterogeneous clients and non-IID data settings. Our results demonstrate that certain metrics lead to more robust and efficient asynchronous FL training, offering a stronger foundation for practical deployment.

</details>


### [835] [Airborne Magnetic Anomaly Navigation with Neural-Network-Augmented Online Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08265)
*Antonia Hager,Sven Nebendahl,Alexej Klushyn,Jasper Krauser,Torleiv H. Bryne,Tor Arne Johansen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种完全自适应的磁异常导航架构，具备"冷启动"能力，能够在飞行中实时识别和补偿飞机磁特征，无需离线校准飞行或预训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前磁异常导航解决方案依赖大量离线校准飞行或预训练，造成部署的物流障碍。需要一种能够在飞行中实时补偿飞机平台大动态磁干扰的方法。

Method: 使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器，增强状态向量同时估计飞机运动状态、基于物理的Tolles-Lawson校准模型系数以及神经网络参数。卡尔曼滤波更新在数学上等价于在线自然梯度下降，将二阶优化的收敛性和数据效率直接集成到导航滤波器中。神经网络被约束为残差学习角色，仅建模可解释物理校准基线未校正的非线性。

Result: 在MagNav Challenge数据集上验证，框架有效约束了惯性漂移，仅使用磁力计特征集。导航精度与离线训练的最先进模型相当，无需先前的校准飞行或专门机动。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应MagNav架构实现了冷启动能力，消除了对离线校准的依赖，提高了部署的实用性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Airborne Magnetic Anomaly Navigation (MagNav) provides a jamming-resistant and robust alternative to satellite navigation but requires the real-time compensation of the aircraft platform's large and dynamic magnetic interference. State-of-the-art solutions often rely on extensive offline calibration flights or pre-training, creating a logistical barrier to operational deployment. We present a fully adaptive MagNav architecture featuring a "cold-start" capability that identifies and compensates for the aircraft's magnetic signature entirely in-flight. The proposed method utilizes an extended Kalman filter with an augmented state vector that simultaneously estimates the aircraft's kinematic states as well as the coefficients of the physics-based Tolles-Lawson calibration model and the parameters of a Neural Network to model aircraft interferences. The Kalman filter update is mathematically equivalent to an online Natural Gradient descent, integrating superior convergence and data efficiency of state-of-the-art second-order optimization directly into the navigation filter. To enhance operational robustness, the neural network is constrained to a residual learning role, modeling only the nonlinearities uncorrected by the explainable physics-based calibration baseline. Validated on the MagNav Challenge dataset, our framework effectively bounds inertial drift using a magnetometer-only feature set. The results demonstrate navigation accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art models trained offline, without requiring prior calibration flights or dedicated maneuvers.

</details>


### [836] [Towards plausibility in time series counterfactual explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08349)
*Marcin Kostrzewa,Krzysztof Galus,Maciej Zięba*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于梯度优化的时间序列分类反事实解释生成方法，通过soft-DTW对齐和目标类k近邻确保时间结构合理性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列分类反事实解释方法在保持现实时间结构方面存在局限，需要生成既有效又具有时间合理性的解释

Method: 梯度优化输入空间，结合soft-DTW对齐和目标类k近邻的多重损失函数，平衡有效性、稀疏性、邻近性和合理性

Result: 在有效性方面表现竞争性，在目标类分布对齐方面显著优于现有方法，时间真实性更优

Conclusion: 该方法能生成既有效又具有高度合理性的时间序列分类反事实解释，保持时间模式一致性

Abstract: We present a new method for generating plausible counterfactual explanations for time series classification problems. The approach performs gradient-based optimization directly in the input space. To enforce plausibility, we integrate soft-DTW (dynamic time warping) alignment with $k$-nearest neighbors from the target class, which effectively encourages the generated counterfactuals to adopt a realistic temporal structure. The overall optimization objective is a multi-faceted loss function that balances key counterfactual properties. It incorporates losses for validity, sparsity, and proximity, alongside the novel soft-DTW-based plausibility component. We conduct an evaluation of our method against several strong reference approaches, measuring the key properties of the generated counterfactuals across multiple dimensions. The results demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance in validity while significantly outperforming existing approaches in distributional alignment with the target class, indicating superior temporal realism. Furthermore, a qualitative analysis highlights the critical limitations of existing methods in preserving realistic temporal structure. This work shows that the proposed method consistently generates counterfactual explanations for time series classifiers that are not only valid but also highly plausible and consistent with temporal patterns.

</details>


### [837] [MUSA-PINN: Multi-scale Weak-form Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Fluid Flow in Complex Geometries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08465)
*Weizheng Zhang,Xunjie Xie,Hao Pan,Xiaowei Duan,Bingteng Sun,Qiang Du,Lin lu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出MUSA-PINN方法，通过多尺度弱形式积分约束解决PINNs在复杂拓扑结构中的收敛问题，显著提升TPMS几何中流体模拟的精度和守恒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINNs在点对点残差最小化方法在处理复杂拓扑结构（如三重周期最小曲面）时存在收敛问题，局部约束无法在曲折通道中传播全局信息，导致梯度不稳定和守恒性违反。

Method: 提出多尺度弱形式PINN（MUSA-PINN），将PDE约束重新表述为分层球形控制体积上的积分守恒定律，通过控制表面上的通量平衡残差强制连续性和动量守恒。采用三尺度子域策略：大体积用于长程耦合、与传输路径对齐的骨架感知中尺度体积、小体积用于局部细化，配合两阶段训练计划优先考虑连续性。

Result: 在TPMS几何中的稳态不可压缩流动实验中，MUSA-PINN优于现有基线方法，相对误差减少高达93%，并保持质量守恒。

Conclusion: MUSA-PINN通过多尺度弱形式积分约束有效解决了PINNs在复杂拓扑结构中的收敛问题，显著提升了模拟精度和物理守恒性。

Abstract: While Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) offer a mesh-free approach to solving PDEs, standard point-wise residual minimization suffers from convergence pathologies in topologically complex domains like Triply Periodic Minimal Surfaces (TPMS). The locality bias of point-wise constraints fails to propagate global information through tortuous channels, causing unstable gradients and conservation violations. To address this, we propose the Multi-scale Weak-form PINN (MUSA-PINN), which reformulates PDE constraints as integral conservation laws over hierarchical spherical control volumes. We enforce continuity and momentum conservation via flux-balance residuals on control surfaces. Our method utilizes a three-scale subdomain strategy-comprising large volumes for long-range coupling, skeleton-aware meso-scale volumes aligned with transport pathways, and small volumes for local refinement-alongside a two-stage training schedule prioritizing continuity. Experiments on steady incompressible flow in TPMS geometries show MUSA-PINN outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing relative errors by up to 93% and preserving mass conservation.

</details>


### [838] [Echo2ECG: Enhancing ECG Representations with Cardiac Morphology from Multi-View Echos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08505)
*Michelle Espranita Liman,Özgün Turgut,Alexander Müller,Eimo Martens,Daniel Rueckert,Philip Müller*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出Echo2ECG多模态自监督学习框架，通过多视角超声心动图增强心电图表征，用于心脏形态表型分类和超声研究检索任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心电图(ECG)无法直接测量心脏形态表型(如左心室射血分数)，需要超声心动图(Echo)。现有自监督方法将ECG与单视角Echo对齐存在表征不匹配问题，因为单视角Echo只能捕捉局部解剖快照。需要利用多视角Echo的形态结构信息来增强ECG表征。

Method: 提出Echo2ECG多模态自监督学习框架，通过对比学习将ECG与多视角Echo对齐，利用多视角Echo提供更全面的心脏形态结构信息。框架作为ECG特征提取器，用于下游任务。

Result: 在心脏形态表型分类(三个数据集)和超声研究检索任务中，Echo2ECG提取的ECG表征持续优于最先进的单模态和多模态基线方法，尽管特征尺寸比最大基线小18倍。

Conclusion: Echo2ECG是一个稳健、强大的ECG特征提取器，通过多视角Echo的形态结构信息有效增强了ECG表征能力，在需要形态信息的临床任务中表现优异。

Abstract: Electrocardiography (ECG) is a low-cost, widely used modality for diagnosing electrical abnormalities like atrial fibrillation by capturing the heart's electrical activity. However, it cannot directly measure cardiac morphological phenotypes, such as left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF), which typically require echocardiography (Echo). Predicting these phenotypes from ECG would enable early, accessible health screening. Existing self-supervised methods suffer from a representational mismatch by aligning ECGs to single-view Echos, which only capture local, spatially restricted anatomical snapshots. To address this, we propose Echo2ECG, a multimodal self-supervised learning framework that enriches ECG representations with the heart's morphological structure captured in multi-view Echos. We evaluate Echo2ECG as an ECG feature extractor on two clinically relevant tasks that fundamentally require morphological information: (1) classification of structural cardiac phenotypes across three datasets, and (2) retrieval of Echo studies with similar morphological characteristics using ECG queries. Our extracted ECG representations consistently outperform those of state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal baselines across both tasks, despite being 18x smaller than the largest baseline. These results demonstrate that Echo2ECG is a robust, powerful ECG feature extractor. Our code is accessible at https://github.com/michelleespranita/Echo2ECG.

</details>


### [839] [Towards Effective and Efficient Graph Alignment without Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08526)
*Songyang Chen,Youfang Lin,Yu Liu,Shuai Zheng,Lei Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: GlobAlign提出了一种新的"全局表示与对齐"范式，通过全局注意力机制和分层跨图传输成本，改进了无监督图对齐的准确性和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督图对齐方法（嵌入方法和最优传输方法）在准确性和效率之间存在权衡限制。作者观察到这些方法遵循"局部表示，全局对齐"范式，导致对齐过程中的两个阶段不匹配。

Method: 提出GlobAlign及其高效变体GlobAlign-E，采用全局注意力机制捕捉长距离和隐式节点依赖关系，使用分层跨图传输成本，并将最优传输的立方复杂度降低到二次复杂度。

Result: 实验显示，GlobAlign在准确性上比最佳竞争对手提升高达20%，而GlobAlign-E在效率上比现有最优传输方法快一个数量级。

Conclusion: 提出的"全局表示与对齐"范式有效解决了现有方法的局限性，GlobAlign在准确性和效率方面都取得了显著改进。

Abstract: Unsupervised graph alignment aims to find the node correspondence across different graphs without any anchor node pairs. Despite the recent efforts utilizing deep learning-based techniques, such as the embedding and optimal transport (OT)-based approaches, we observe their limitations in terms of model accuracy-efficiency tradeoff. By focusing on the exploitation of local and global graph information, we formalize them as the ``local representation, global alignment'' paradigm, and present a new ``global representation and alignment'' paradigm to resolve the mismatch between the two phases in the alignment process. We then propose \underline{Gl}obal representation and \underline{o}ptimal transport-\underline{b}ased \underline{Align}ment (\texttt{GlobAlign}), and its variant, \texttt{GlobAlign-E}, for better \underline{E}fficiency. Our methods are equipped with the global attention mechanism and a hierarchical cross-graph transport cost, able to capture long-range and implicit node dependencies beyond the local graph structure. Furthermore, \texttt{GlobAlign-E} successfully closes the time complexity gap between representative embedding and OT-based methods, reducing OT's cubic complexity to quadratic terms. Through extensive experiments, our methods demonstrate superior performance, with up to a 20\% accuracy improvement over the best competitor. Meanwhile, \texttt{GlobAlign-E} achieves the best efficiency, with an order of magnitude speedup against existing OT-based methods.

</details>


### [840] [GNN For Muon Particle Momentum estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06675)
*Vishak K Bhat,Eric A. F. Reinhardt,Sergei Gleyzer*

Main category: physics.data-an

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文探索使用图神经网络（GNN）进行CMS实验中的动量计算任务，提出了两种图构建方法，并证明GNN在MAE指标上优于传统模型如TabNet。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CMS实验在大型强子对撞机中面临高数据生成率，需要硬件和软件触发器选择数据。准确的动量计算对提高CMS触发系统效率、改善低/高动量粒子分类和减少误触发至关重要。

Method: 使用图神经网络（GNN）进行动量估计，提出了两种图构建方法，利用数据的固有图结构。与TabNet等传统模型进行比较。

Result: GNN在平均绝对误差（MAE）上优于传统模型如TabNet，证明其能有效捕捉数据中的复杂依赖关系。同时发现节点特征维度对GNN效率至关重要。

Conclusion: GNN在粒子物理动量计算任务中表现出色，节点特征维度是影响模型效率的关键因素，为CMS触发系统提供了有效的改进方案。

Abstract: Due to a high rate of overall data generation relative to data generation of interest, the CMS experiment at the Large Hadron Collider uses a combination of hardware- and software-based triggers to select data for capture. Accurate momentum calculation is crucial for improving the efficiency of the CMS trigger systems, enabling better classification of low- and high- momentum particles and reducing false triggers. This paper explores the use of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for the momentum estimation task. We present two graph construction methods and apply a GNN model to leverage the inherent graph structure of the data. In this paper firstly, we show that the GNN outperforms traditional models like TabNet in terms of Mean Absolute Error (MAE), demonstrating its effectiveness in capturing complex dependencies within the data. Secondly we show that the dimension of the node feature is crucial for the efficiency of GNN.

</details>


### [841] [Prediction of Steady-State Flow through Porous Media Using Machine Learning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06762)
*Jinhong Wang,Matei C. Ignuta-Ciuncanu,Ricardo F. Martinez-Botas,Teng Cao*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个机器学习框架，用于预测多孔介质中的稳态流动，比较了三种模型架构（卷积自编码器、U-Net和傅里叶神经算子），其中FNO表现最佳，比传统CFD方法快1000倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CFD方法在计算多孔介质流动时虽然准确，但对于复杂几何结构计算成本过高。数据驱动的代理模型提供了计算效率更高的替代方案，能够实现快速可靠的预测，特别是在冷板拓扑优化等应用中。

Method: 开发了一个机器学习框架来预测由Navier-Stokes-Brinkman方程控制的多孔介质中的稳态流动。实现并比较了三种模型架构：卷积自编码器(AE)、U-Net和傅里叶神经算子(FNO)。为了增强物理一致性，还加入了物理信息损失函数。

Result: FNO在三种模型中表现最佳，达到了最低的均方误差0.0017，同时相比CFD方法实现了高达1000倍的加速。FNO的网格不变性特性使其特别适合需要不同网格分辨率的拓扑优化任务。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了机器学习在加速多孔介质流体流动预测方面的潜力，为传统数值方法提供了可扩展的替代方案，特别是在热管理应用的拓扑优化中具有重要价值。

Abstract: Solving flow through porous media is a crucial step in the topology optimisation of cold plates, a key component in modern thermal management. Traditional computational fluid dynamics (CFD) methods, while accurate, are often prohibitively expensive for large and complex geometries. In contrast, data-driven surrogate models provide a computationally efficient alternative, enabling rapid and reliable predictions. In this study, we develop a machine-learning framework for predicting steady-state flow through porous media governed by the Navier-Stokes-Brinkman equations. We implement and compare three model architectures-convolutional autoencoder (AE), U-Net, and Fourier Neural Operator (FNO)-evaluating their predictive performance. To enhance physics consistency, we incorporate physics-informed loss functions. Our results demonstrate that FNO outperforms AE and U-Net, achieving a mean squared error (MSE) as low as 0.0017 while providing speedups of up to 1000 times compared to CFD. Additionally, the mesh-invariant property of FNO emphasizes its suitability for topology optimisation tasks, where varying mesh resolutions are required. This study highlights the potential of machine learning to accelerate fluid flow predictions in porous media, offering a scalable alternative to traditional numerical methods.

</details>


### [842] [TEA-Time: Transporting Effects Across Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07018)
*Harsh Parikh,Gabriel Levin-Konigsberg,Dominique Perrault-Joncas,Alexander Volfovsky*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个时间迁移框架，用于将随机对照试验的治疗效果外推到未进行试验的时间段，通过两种识别策略（重复试验和共同治疗组）估计时间迁移平均处理效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机对照试验估计的治疗效果不仅局限于研究人群，还局限于试验进行的时间。现有方法无法将治疗效果外推到未进行试验的时间段，这限制了试验结果的长期适用性。

Method: 1) 提出时间迁移平均处理效应(TATE)概念，在可分离时间效应假设下，TATE分解为观测平均处理效应和时间比率；2) 提供两种识别策略：使用不同时间重复比较相同治疗的重复试验策略，以及使用跨时间观测的共同治疗组策略；3) 开发双重稳健、半参数有效的估计器。

Result: 蒙特卡洛模拟显示两种估计器均达到名义覆盖率，共同治疗组策略在假设成立时提供显著效率增益。应用于Upworthy研究档案的A/B测试表明两种策略存在方差-偏差权衡：共同治疗组方法精度更高，但当治疗与时间因素异质性交互时可能产生偏差。

Conclusion: 时间迁移框架为将治疗效果外推到未试验时间段提供了理论和方法基础，两种策略各有优劣，选择取决于具体应用场景和假设的可信度。

Abstract: Treatment effects estimated from randomized controlled trials are local not only to the study population but also to the time at which the trial was conducted. We develop a framework for temporal transportation: extrapolating treatment effects to time periods where no experiment was conducted. We target the transported average treatment effect (TATE) and show that under a separable temporal effects assumption, the TATE decomposes into an observed average treatment effect and a temporal ratio. We provide two identification strategies -- one using replicated trials comparing the same treatments at different times, another using common treatment arms observed across time -- and develop doubly robust, semiparametrically efficient estimators for each. Monte Carlo simulations confirm that both estimators achieve nominal coverage, with the common arm strategy yielding substantial efficiency gains when its stronger assumptions hold. We apply our methods to A/B tests from the Upworthy Research Archive, demonstrating that the two strategies exhibit a variance-bias tradeoff: the common arm approach offers greater precision but may incur bias when treatments interact heterogeneously with temporal factors.

</details>


### [843] [Towards Objective Gastrointestinal Auscultation: Automated Segmentation and Annotation of Bowel Sound Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07215)
*Zahra Mansour,Verena Uslar,Dirk Weyhe,Danilo Hollosi,Nils Strodthoff*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个基于可穿戴声学传感器的肠鸣音自动分割与分类系统，使用能量检测算法和预训练的音频谱图Transformer模型，在健康组和患者组分别达到97%和96%的准确率，自动标注减少70%人工标注时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肠鸣音通常短暂且振幅低，手动听诊难以准确检测，导致临床评估存在显著变异性。数字声学传感器可获取高质量肠鸣音并实现自动信号分析，为临床医生提供客观定量的肠道活动反馈。

Method: 使用SonicGuard可穿戴声学传感器收集83名受试者的肠鸣音数据。开发基于能量的事件检测算法检测肠鸣音事件，然后使用预训练的音频谱图Transformer(AST)模型对检测到的声音片段进行分类。采用两个专门模型分别针对健康人群和患者进行训练。

Result: 最佳配置使用两个专门模型：健康组模型达到准确率0.97、AUROC 0.98；患者组模型达到准确率0.96、AUROC 0.98。自动标注方法减少约70%人工标注时间，专家审查显示少于12%的自动检测片段需要修正。

Conclusion: 提出的自动分割与分类系统实现了肠道活动的定量评估，为临床医生提供了客观的诊断工具，可改善胃肠道功能诊断并支持大规模数据集的标注。

Abstract: Bowel sounds (BS) are typically momentary and have low amplitude, making them difficult to detect accurately through manual auscultation. This leads to significant variability in clinical assessment. Digital acoustic sensors allow the acquisition of high-quality BS and enable automated signal analysis, offering the potential to provide clinicians with both objective and quantitative feedback on bowel activity. This study presents an automated pipeline for bowel sound segmentation and classification using a wearable acoustic SonicGuard sensor. BS signals from 83 subjects were recorded using a SonicGuard sensor. Data from 40 subjects were manually annotated by clinical experts and used to train an automatic annotation algorithm, while the remaining subjects were used for further model evaluation. An energy-based event detection algorithm was developed to detect BS events. Detected sound segments were then classified into BS patterns using a pretrained Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) model. Model performance was evaluated separately for healthy individuals and patients. The best configuration used two specialized models, one trained on healthy subjects and one on patients, achieving (accuracy: 0.97, AUROC: 0.98) for healthy group and (accuracy: 0.96, AUROC: 0.98) for patient group. The auto-annotation method reduced manual labeling time by approximately 70%, and expert review showed that less than 12% of automatically detected segments required correction. The proposed automated segmentation and classification system enables quantitative assessment of bowel activity, providing clinicians with an objective diagnostic tool that may improve the diagnostic of gastrointestinal function and support the annotation of large-scale datasets.

</details>


### [844] [Conditional Rank-Rank Regression via Deep Conditional Transformation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07230)
*Xiaoyi Wang,Long Feng,Zhaojun Wang*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种改进的条件秩-秩回归（CRRR）方法，使用深度条件变换模型（DCTM）和交叉拟合来估计条件秩，用于测量代际流动性的组内变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统代际流动性研究中使用秩-秩回归（RRR）时，直接加入协变量会导致参数解释不清晰。条件秩-秩回归（CRRR）通过使用协变量调整后的条件秩来测量组内流动性，但传统CRRR在非线性、高阶交互和离散有序结果时存在局限。

Method: 1. 使用深度条件变换模型（DCTM）和交叉拟合来估计条件秩，实现端到端的条件分布学习；2. 通过ω索引的条件秩定义将CRRR扩展到离散结果；3. 建立连续结果估计量的渐近理论，验证可交换自助法推断的有效性。

Result: 1. 在简单/复杂连续和离散有序设计的模拟中，在挑战性设置下显示出明显的精度提升；2. 应用于美国收入代际流动研究，揭示了显著的组内持续性；3. 应用于印度教育流动性研究，发现了明显的性别差异。

Conclusion: 提出的改进CRRR方法通过DCTM和交叉拟合，能够更好地处理非线性、高阶交互和离散有序结果，为代际流动性分析提供了更强大和灵活的工具，揭示了重要的社会经济模式。

Abstract: Intergenerational mobility quantifies the transmission of socio-economic outcomes from parents to children. While rank-rank regression (RRR) is standard, adding covariates directly (RRRX) often yields parameters with unclear interpretation. Conditional rank-rank regression (CRRR) resolves this by using covariate-adjusted (conditional) ranks to measure within-group mobility. We improve and extend CRRR by estimating conditional ranks with a deep conditional transformation model (DCTM) and cross-fitting, enabling end-to-end conditional distribution learning with structural constraints and strong performance under nonlinearity, high-order interactions, and discrete ordered outcomes where the distributional regression used in traditional CRRR may be cumbersome or prone to misconfiguration. We further extend CRRR to discrete outcomes via an $ω$-indexed conditional-rank definition and study sensitivity to $ω$. For continuous outcomes, we establish an asymptotic theory for the proposed estimators and verify the validity of exchangeable bootstrap inference. Simulations across simple/complex continuous and discrete ordered designs show clear accuracy gains in challenging settings. Finally, we apply our method to two empirical studies, revealing substantial within-group persistence in U.S. income and pronounced gender differences in educational mobility in India.

</details>


### [845] [Analysis-Driven Procedural Generation of an Engine Sound Dataset with Embedded Control Annotations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07584)
*Robin Doerfler,Lonce Wyse*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个分析驱动的发动机声音生成框架，通过参数化谐波加噪声合成器生成具有精确控制注释的发动机音频，并发布了Procedural Engine Sounds Dataset（19小时，5,935个文件）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汽车音频行业需要大量标准化、干净的发动机音频记录用于主动声音设计、虚拟原型制作和数据驱动的发动机声音合成，但实际采集成本高、设备要求专业且容易受到噪声污染。

Method: 通过音高自适应频谱分析从真实录音中提取谐波结构，然后驱动扩展的参数化谐波加噪声合成器，生成具有样本级精确RPM和扭矩注释的发动机音频。

Result: 生成了Procedural Engine Sounds Dataset（19小时，5,935个文件），覆盖广泛的操作条件、信号复杂度和谐波轮廓。与真实录音对比验证了合成数据保留了特征谐波结构，基线实验证实其适用于基于学习的参数估计和合成任务。

Conclusion: 该框架能够生成具有精确控制注释的高质量发动机音频数据，公开的数据集支持发动机音色分析、控制参数估计、声学建模和神经生成网络的研究。

Abstract: Computational engine sound modeling is central to the automotive audio industry, particularly for active sound design, virtual prototyping, and emerging data-driven engine sound synthesis methods. These applications require large volumes of standardized, clean audio recordings with precisely time-aligned operating-state annotations: data that is difficult to obtain due to high costs, specialized measurement equipment requirements, and inevitable noise contamination.
  We present an analysis-driven framework for generating engine audio with sample-accurate control annotations. The method extracts harmonic structures from real recordings through pitch-adaptive spectral analysis, which then drive an extended parametric harmonic-plus-noise synthesizer.
  With this framework, we generate the Procedural Engine Sounds Dataset (19 hours, 5,935 files), a set of engine audio signals with sample-accurate RPM and torque annotations, spanning a wide range of operating conditions, signal complexities, and harmonic profiles. Comparison against real recordings validates that the synthesized data preserves characteristic harmonic structures, and baseline experiments confirm its suitability for learning-based parameter estimation and synthesis tasks.
  The dataset is released publicly to support research on engine timbre analysis, control parameter estimation, acoustic modeling and neural generative networks.

</details>


### [846] [A Lightweight MPC Bidding Framework for Brand Auction Ads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07721)
*Yuanlong Chen,Bowen Zhu,Bing Xia,Yichuan Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出用于品牌广告的轻量级模型预测控制框架，利用在线保序回归构建单调的竞价-花费和竞价-转化模型，实现高效成本控制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 品牌广告在建立长期消费者认知和忠诚度方面至关重要，但现有实时竞价研究很少针对品牌广告的独特特性进行算法设计。品牌广告具有稳定的用户参与模式和快速反馈循环等特点，需要专门优化的解决方案。

Method: 提出轻量级模型预测控制框架，利用在线保序回归直接从流数据构建单调的竞价-花费和竞价-转化模型，无需复杂机器学习模型。算法完全在线运行，计算开销低。

Result: 模拟结果显示，相比基线策略，该方法显著提高了花费效率和成本控制能力，为现代品牌广告平台提供了可扩展且易于实施的解决方案。

Conclusion: 该框架充分利用品牌广告的内在特性简化建模并提高效率，为品牌广告活动提供了实用且高效的算法解决方案。

Abstract: Brand advertising plays a critical role in building long-term consumer awareness and loyalty, making it a key objective for advertisers across digital platforms. Although real-time bidding has been extensively studied, there is limited literature on algorithms specifically tailored for brand auction ads that fully leverage their unique characteristics. In this paper, we propose a lightweight Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework designed for brand advertising campaigns, exploiting the inherent attributes of brand ads -- such as stable user engagement patterns and fast feedback loops -- to simplify modeling and improve efficiency. Our approach utilizes online isotonic regression to construct monotonic bid-to-spend and bid-to-conversion models directly from streaming data, eliminating the need for complex machine learning models. The algorithm operates fully online with low computational overhead, making it highly practical for real-world deployment. Simulation results demonstrate that our approach significantly improves spend efficiency and cost control compared to baseline strategies, providing a scalable and easily implementable solution for modern brand advertising platforms.

</details>


### [847] [FlowTouch: View-Invariant Visuo-Tactile Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08255)
*Seongjin Bien,Carlo Kneissl,Tobias Jülg,Frank Fundel,Thomas Ressler-Antal,Florian Walter,Björn Ommer,Gitta Kutyniok,Wolfram Burgard*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: FlowTouch提出了一种新颖的视图不变视觉-触觉预测模型，通过物体的局部3D网格编码信息来预测触觉模式，解决了触觉传感器仅在接触时可用的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉感知对于接触丰富的操作任务至关重要，但触觉传感器仅在物体被触摸时才能提供读数，这限制了其在任务规划和初始执行阶段的使用。现有方法通常直接从相机图像映射到触觉传感器输出，但这种方法严重依赖于特定设置和相机捕捉触摸区域的能力。

Method: FlowTouch使用物体的局部3D网格来编码丰富信息以预测触觉模式，同时抽象掉场景相关细节。该方法整合了场景重建和基于Flow Matching的图像生成模型，实现视图不变的视觉-触觉预测。

Result: FlowTouch能够弥合仿真到现实的差距，并泛化到新的传感器实例。生成的触觉图像可用于下游的抓取稳定性预测任务。

Conclusion: FlowTouch通过基于物体3D网格的表示方法，实现了视图不变的视觉-触觉预测，解决了触觉传感器可用性的限制问题，并展示了在机器人操作任务中的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Tactile sensation is essential for contact-rich manipulation tasks. It provides direct feedback on object geometry, surface properties, and interaction forces, enhancing perception and enabling fine-grained control. An inherent limitation of tactile sensors is that readings are available only when an object is touched. This precludes their use during planning and the initial execution phase of a task. Predicting tactile information from visual information can bridge this gap. A common approach is to learn a direct mapping from camera images to the output of vision-based tactile sensors. However, the resulting model will depend strongly on the specific setup and on how well the camera can capture the area where an object is touched. In this work, we introduce FlowTouch, a novel model for view-invariant visuo-tactile prediction. Our key idea is to use an object's local 3D mesh to encode rich information for predicting tactile patterns while abstracting away from scene-dependent details. FlowTouch integrates scene reconstruction and Flow Matching-based models for image generation. Our results show that FlowTouch is able to bridge the sim-to-real gap and generalize to new sensor instances. We further show that the resulting tactile images can be used for downstream grasp stability prediction. Our code, datasets and videos are available at https://flowtouch.github.io/

</details>


### [848] [Sign Identifiability of Causal Effects in Stationary Stochastic Dynamical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08311)
*Gijs van Seeventer,Saber Salehkaleybar*

Main category: math.ST

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究连续时间线性平稳随机微分方程中因果结构的可识别性问题，在已知因果结构但未知扩散矩阵的条件下，提出了边符号可识别性概念，并推导了判断标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常假设已知扩散矩阵，但这一假设忽略了模型的内在尺度不变性。作者希望放宽这一假设，研究在更现实的条件下因果结构的可识别性问题。

Method: 引入边符号可识别性概念：对于给定因果结构，判断特定漂移系数符号是否在所有与结构兼容的参数化诱导的观测协方差矩阵中唯一确定。在忠实性假设下，推导了判断一般图的可识别性、不可识别性和部分可识别性的标准。

Result: 将标准应用于特定因果结构（包括类似经典因果设置如工具变量，以及新颖的循环设置），确定了它们的边符号可识别性，在某些情况下获得了目标边符号相对于观测协方差矩阵的显式表达式。

Conclusion: 该研究为连续时间线性平稳随机微分方程中的因果推断提供了更现实的识别框架，放宽了扩散矩阵已知的强假设，并建立了边符号可识别性的理论标准。

Abstract: We study identifiability in continuous-time linear stationary stochastic differential equations with known causal structure. Unlike existing approaches, we relax the assumption of a known diffusion matrix, thereby respecting the model's intrinsic scale invariance. Rather than recovering drift coefficients themselves, we introduce edge-sign identifiability: for a given causal structure, we ask whether the sign of a given drift entry is uniquely determined across all observational covariance matrices induced by parametrizations compatible with that structure. Under a notion of faithfulness, we derive criteria for characterising identifiability, non-identifiability, and partial identifiability for general graphs. Applying our criteria to specific causal structures, both analogous to classical causal settings (e.g., instrumental variables) and novel cyclic settings, we determine their edge-sign identifiability and, in some cases, obtain explicit expressions for the sign of a target edge in terms of the observational covariance matrix.

</details>


### [849] [Adaptive Entropy-Driven Sensor Selection in a Camera-LiDAR Particle Filter for Single-Vessel Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08457)
*Andrei Starodubov,Yaqub Aris Prabowo,Andreas Hadjipieris,Ioannis Kyriakides,Roberto Galeazzi*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种异构多传感器融合粒子滤波跟踪器，采用信息增益自适应感知策略选择最优传感器配置，在真实海事部署中验证了LiDAR在近场精度优势、相机在远场持续覆盖能力，自适应策略通过模态切换实现精度与连续性的最佳权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定海岸平台单传感器跟踪存在模态特定退化问题：相机受光照和视觉杂波影响，LiDAR性能随距离增加和间歇性返回而下降。需要多传感器融合和自适应策略来克服单一传感器的局限性。

Method: 异构多传感器融合粒子滤波跟踪器，结合信息增益（熵减少）自适应感知策略，在每个融合时间仓选择最具信息量的传感器配置。在CMMI智能码头测试台真实部署中验证，使用岸基3D LiDAR和固定高架相机跟踪刚性充气船。

Result: LiDAR在近场精度占主导，相机在LiDAR不可用时维持更远距离覆盖，自适应策略通过基于信息增益的模态切换实现了精度与连续性的有利权衡，避免了连续多流处理，为弹性资源感知海事监视提供了实用基线。

Conclusion: 自适应多传感器融合策略能有效解决单一传感器局限性，通过智能模态切换实现更稳健、资源高效的海事监视系统，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Robust single-vessel tracking from fixed coastal platforms is hindered by modality-specific degradations: cameras suffer from illumination and visual clutter, while LiDAR performance drops with range and intermittent returns. We present a heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion particle-filter tracker that incorporates an information-gain (entropy-reduction) adaptive sensing policy to select the most informative configuration at each fusion time bin. The approach is validated in a real maritime deployment at the CMMI Smart Marina Testbed (Ayia Napa Marina, Cyprus), using a shore-mounted 3D LiDAR and an elevated fixed camera to track a rigid inflatable boat with onboard GNSS ground truth. We compare LiDAR-only, camera-only, all-sensors, and adaptive configurations. Results show LiDAR dominates near-field accuracy, the camera sustains longer-range coverage when LiDAR becomes unavailable, and the adaptive policy achieves a favorable accuracy-continuity trade-off by switching modalities based on information gain. By avoiding continuous multi-stream processing, the adaptive configuration provides a practical baseline for resilient and resource-aware maritime surveillance.

</details>


### [850] [Joint 3D Gravity and Magnetic Inversion via Rectified Flow and Ginzburg-Landau Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06829)
*Dhruman Gupta,Yashas Shende,Aritra Das,Chanda Grover Kamra,Debayan Gupta*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出基于整流流的3D重磁联合反演新框架，在Noddyverse数据集上实现，引入Ginzburg-Landau正则化器进行物理感知训练，并发布3D密度VAE模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统地质勘探方法受限，浅层矿产资源逐渐枯竭，需要开发超越传统方法的地下矿石检测技术。重磁联合反演虽然能缓解非唯一性问题，但确定性算法只能得到单一正则化解，机器学习方法也大多预测单一解而不建模整个分布

Method: 将3D重磁联合反演重构为整流流问题，在Noddyverse数据集（最大的基于物理的反演数据集）上实现。引入Ginzburg-Landau正则化器（Ising模型的推广版本）辅助矿石识别，实现物理感知训练。提出基于GL理论的引导方法，可作为即插即用模块与现有无条件去噪器配合使用

Result: 开发了完整的整流流反演框架，训练并发布了3D密度VAE模型，为领域下游工作提供便利

Conclusion: 提出的整流流框架能够建模解空间分布而非单一解，GL正则化器增强了物理一致性，为地下矿石检测提供了更全面的解决方案

Abstract: Subsurface ore detection is of paramount importance given the gradual depletion of shallow mineral resources in recent years. It is crucial to explore approaches that go beyond the limitations of traditional geological exploration methods. One such promising new method is joint magnetic and gravitational inversion. Given magnetic and gravitational data on a surface, jointly reconstructing the underlying densities that generate them remains an ill-posed inverse problem. Although joint inversion of multiple properties mitigates the non-uniqueness problem in magnetic and gravitational data, deterministic algorithms converge to a single regularized solution and thus do not capture the distribution of possible solutions. Similarly, most machine learning based techniques predict a single solution without modelling the entire distribution. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework that reframes 3D gravity and magnetic joint inversion as a rectified flow on the Noddyverse dataset, the largest physics-based dataset for inversion. We introduce a Ginzburg-Landau (GL) regularizer, a generalized version of the Ising model that aids in ore identification, enabling physics-aware training. We also propose a guidance methodology based on GL theory that can be used as a plug-and-play module with existing unconditional denoisers. Lastly, we also train and release a VAE for the 3D densities, which facilitates downstream work in the field.

</details>


### [851] [Context-free Self-Conditioned GAN for Trajectory Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08658)
*Tiago Rodrigues de Almeida,Eduardo Gutierrez Maestro,Oscar Martinez Mozos*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出基于自条件GAN的无监督上下文无关方法，用于从2D轨迹中学习不同行为模式，应用于轨迹预测任务，在人类运动和道路代理数据集上表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨迹预测中需要识别不同的行为模式，传统方法通常依赖上下文信息或监督标签。本文旨在开发一种无需上下文信息的无监督方法，通过学习轨迹中的不同行为模式来提升预测性能。

Method: 采用自条件GAN框架，在判别器的特征空间中学习不同的行为移动模式。提出了三种不同的自条件GAN训练设置来生成更好的预测器。方法完全无监督且上下文无关。

Result: 在两个数据集上测试：人类运动和道路代理。实验结果显示，在最少监督标签的情况下，方法优于之前的上下文无关方法；在人类运动数据集上全局表现优异，在道路代理数据集上也表现良好。

Conclusion: 自条件GAN的无监督方法能有效学习轨迹中的行为模式，提升轨迹预测性能，特别是在监督信息有限的情况下表现突出。

Abstract: In this paper, we present a context-free unsupervised approach based on a self-conditioned GAN to learn different modes from 2D trajectories. Our intuition is that each mode indicates a different behavioral moving pattern in the discriminator's feature space. We apply this approach to the problem of trajectory forecasting. We present three different training settings based on self-conditioned GAN, which produce better forecasters. We test our method in two data sets: human motion and road agents. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms previous context-free methods in the least representative supervised labels while performing well in the remaining labels. In addition, our approach outperforms globally in human motion, while performing well in road agents.

</details>


### [852] [Explainable and Hardware-Efficient Jamming Detection for 5G Networks Using the Convolutional Tsetlin Machine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07336)
*Vojtech Halenka,Mohammadreza Amini,Per-Arne Andersen,Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Burak Kantarci*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文提出使用卷积Tsetlin机（CTM）直接在5G同步信号块特征上进行轻量级、可解释的干扰检测，相比传统CNN在保持可比性能的同时显著减少计算和内存需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 5G网络中关键任务服务依赖稳定的射频环境，但低功率干扰攻击可能低于链路层可观测性，威胁系统可用性和可靠性。需要轻量级、可解释且硬件高效的干扰检测方法，适合资源受限的边缘环境。

Method: 使用卷积Tsetlin机（CTM）直接在5G同步信号块特征上进行干扰检测。CTM基于布尔逻辑子句对量化输入进行建模，支持比特级推理和确定性FPGA部署。在真实5G测试床上使用空中SSB数据进行实验验证，并与CNN基准进行比较。

Result: CTM在真实数据集上达到91.53%准确率（CNN为96.83%），训练速度快9.5倍，内存需求减少14倍（45MB vs 624MB）。设计了面向Zybo Z7 FPGA的紧凑架构，并提供了针对延迟、功耗和准确性的三种部署配置的资源预测。

Conclusion: CTM为RF域干扰检测提供了实用、可解释且资源高效的替代方案，是边缘部署、低延迟和安全关键5G应用的强有力候选方案，为B5G系统奠定了基础。

Abstract: All applications in fifth-generation (5G) networks rely on stable radio-frequency (RF) environments to support mission-critical services in mobility, automation, and connected intelligence. Their exposure to intentional interference or low-power jamming threatens availability and reliability, especially when such attacks remain below link-layer observability. This paper investigates lightweight, explainable, and hardware-efficient jamming detection using the Convolutional Tsetlin Machine (CTM) operating directly on 5G Synchronization Signal Block (SSB) features. CTM formulates Boolean logic clauses over quantized inputs, enabling bit-level inference and deterministic deployment on FPGA fabrics. These properties make CTM well suited for real-time, resource-constrained edge environments anticipated in 5G. The proposed approach is experimentally validated on a real 5G testbed using over-the-air SSB data, emulating practical downlink conditions. We benchmark CTM against a convolutional neural network (CNN) baseline under identical preprocessing and training pipelines. On the real dataset, CTM achieves comparable detection performance (Accuracy 91.53 +/- 1.01 vs. 96.83 +/- 1.19 for CNN) while training $9.5\times$ faster and requiring 14x less memory (45~MB vs.\ 624~MB). Furthermore, we outline a compact FPGA-oriented design for Zybo~Z7 (Zynq-7000) and provide resource projections (not measured) under three deployment profiles optimized for latency, power, and accuracy trade-offs. The results show that the CTM provides a practical, interpretable, and resource-efficient alternative to conventional DNNs for RF-domain jamming detection, establishing it as a strong candidate for edge-deployed, low-latency, and security-critical 5G applications while laying the groundwork for B5G systems.

</details>


### [853] [RL unknotter, hard unknots and unknotting number](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07955)
*Anne Dranowski,Yura Kabkov,Daniel Tubbenhauer*

Main category: math.GT

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 该论文开发了一个强化学习流程来简化纽结图，通过训练智能体学习Reidemeister移动的提议和值启发式，应用于任意纽结和链环，并在"非常困难"的无结图和4₁#9₁₀上测试，恢复了无结数上限为3的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纽结理论中的纽结简化是一个计算困难的问题，传统方法在处理复杂纽结图时效率有限。需要开发新的计算方法来有效简化纽结图，特别是对于"非常困难"的无结图。

Method: 开发了一个强化学习流程，训练智能体学习Reidemeister移动的提议和值启发式。智能体通过导航Reidemeister移动来简化纽结图，该方法可应用于任意纽结和链环。

Result: 在"非常困难"的无结图上成功测试了该流程，并在4₁#9₁₀上使用图膨胀技术，恢复了最近建立的无结数上限为3的惊人结果。

Conclusion: 强化学习为纽结简化问题提供了有效的计算方法，能够处理传统方法难以解决的复杂纽结图，并在特定案例中验证了理论结果。

Abstract: We develop a reinforcement learning pipeline for simplifying knot diagrams. A trained agent learns move proposals and a value heuristic for navigating Reidemeister moves. The pipeline applies to arbitrary knots and links; we test it on ``very hard'' unknot diagrams and, using diagram inflation, on $4_1\#9_{10}$ where we recover the recently established and surprising upper bound of three for the unknotting number.

</details>


### [854] [Pavement Missing Condition Data Imputation through Collective Learning-Based Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06625)
*Ke Yu,Lu Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于集体学习的图卷积网络方法，用于填补路面状况数据中的缺失值，通过捕捉相邻路段之间的依赖关系来提高数据补全的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 路面状况数据对于道路网络的维护和修复决策至关重要，但由于传感器错误和非周期性检查等原因，数据常常不完整。系统性缺失数据会导致信息损失、统计能力降低和评估偏差。现有方法要么丢弃包含缺失值的数据点，要么通过数据相关性进行填补，但未能充分利用相邻路段之间的空间依赖关系。

Method: 提出了一种基于集体学习的图卷积网络方法，该方法整合了相邻路段的特征和观测路段条件之间的依赖关系来学习缺失的条件值。与图神经网络的其他变体不同，该方法能够捕捉相邻路面路段条件之间的依赖关系。

Result: 使用德克萨斯州交通部奥斯汀区收集的路面状况数据进行案例研究，实验表明所提出的模型在填补缺失数据方面能够产生有希望的结果。

Conclusion: 基于集体学习的图卷积网络方法能够有效处理路面状况数据中的缺失值问题，通过利用相邻路段之间的空间依赖关系，为道路维护决策提供更完整和准确的数据支持。

Abstract: Pavement condition data is important in providing information regarding the current state of the road network and in determining the needs of maintenance and rehabilitation treatments. However, the condition data is often incomplete due to various reasons such as sensor errors and non-periodic inspection schedules. Missing data, especially data missing systematically, presents loss of information, reduces statistical power, and introduces biased assessment. Existing methods in dealing with missing data usually discard entire data points with missing values or impute through data correlation. In this paper, we used a collective learning-based Graph Convolutional Networks, which integrates both features of adjacent sections and dependencies between observed section conditions to learn missing condition values. Unlike other variants of graph neural networks, the proposed approach is able to capture dependent relationship between the conditions of adjacent pavement sections. In the case study, pavement condition data collected from Texas Department of Transportation Austin District were used. Experiments show that the proposed model was able to produce promising results in imputing the missing data.

</details>


### [855] [Physics-informed AI Accelerated Retention Analysis of Ferroelectric Vertical NAND: From Day-Scale TCAD to Second-Scale Surrogate Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06881)
*Gyujun Jeong,Sungwon Cho,Minji Shon,Namhoon Kim,Woohyun Hwang,Kwangyou Seo,Suhwan Lim,Wanki Kim,Daewon Ha,Prasanna Venkatesan,Kihang Youn,Ram Cherukuri,Yiyi Wang,Suman Datta,Asif Khan,Shimeng Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于物理信息神经算子（PINO）的AI替代模型，用于高效预测铁电场效应晶体管垂直NAND（Fe-VNAND）的阈值电压漂移和保持特性，相比传统TCAD工具实现了10000倍以上的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Fe-VNAND虽然能克服z方向缩放限制并降低编程电压，但其数据保持特性受到电荷去陷和铁电去极化复杂相互作用的阻碍。传统TCAD工具计算成本高，难以进行大规模参数空间探索以优化器件设计。

Method: 采用物理信息神经算子（PINO）框架，将基础物理原理嵌入学习架构中，构建AI替代模型来预测阈值电压漂移和保持行为。

Result: PINO框架相比TCAD实现了超过10000倍的加速，同时保持了物理准确性。研究在单个FeFET配置上验证了模型的有效性。

Conclusion: 该PINO模型为建模保持损失机制提供了有效途径，能够支持大规模参数空间探索以优化Fe-VNAND器件设计。

Abstract: Ferroelectric field-effect transistors (FeFET)-based vertical NAND (Fe-VNAND) has emerged as a promising candidate to overcome z-scaling limitations with lower programming voltages. However, the data retention of 3D Fe-VNAND is hindered by the complex interaction between charge detrapping and ferroelectric depolarization. Developing optimized device designs requires exploring an extensive parameter space, but the high computational cost of conventional Technology Computer-Aided Design (TCAD) tools makes such wide-scale optimization impractical. To overcome these simulation barriers, we present a Physics-Informed Neural Operator (PINO)-based AI surrogate model designed for high-efficiency prediction of threshold voltage (Vth) shifts and retention behavior. By embedding fundamental physical principles into the learning architecture, our PINO framework achieves a speedup exceeding 10000x compared to TCAD while maintaining physical accuracy. This study demonstrates the model's effectiveness on a single FeFET configuration, serving as a pathway toward modeling the retention loss mechanisms.

</details>


### [856] [Single-pass Possibilistic Clustering with Damped Window Footprints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06889)
*Jeffrey Dale,James Keller,Aquila Galusha*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种单通可能性聚类（SPC）算法，用于流式数据聚类，具有处理非球形聚类、任意大小阻尼窗口的闭式更新、以及使用协方差联合合并聚类估计的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大数据时代，流式聚类在网络流量分析和连续传感器数据处理中变得极为重要。可能性模型相比传统方法具有独特优势，特别是通过"模糊化"参数控制典型性随距离衰减的速度。
